, TikTok, Google)

, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn)

- Match Visuals to VO.

- know how to edit long form for YouTube 15-25 Minutes.

- Able to find clips and accurate visual sources for the video. (not overused stock footage)



Responsibilities:



- Analyze scripts and understand the vision for each video.

- Find clips and images for the videos and combine them with our assets.

- Add visuals and minor effects.

- Make sure the videos follow YouTube guidelines.

- Strong ATTENTION TO DETAIL and know how to quality check your work.

- Find the clips and images for the videos.

Pay:

- Bonuses based on video performance

- Paid on the 1st and 15th of every month

- Must have a working Payoneer account linked to your Onlinejobs

We appreciate all applicants, and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)
description:
Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)



You live and breathe Amazon Ads. You've scaled accounts from 6 to 7 and 8 figures. You don't just "manage PPC" – you build strategies that crush the competition.



If that sounds like you, keep reading. If not, this role is not for you.



About Us

We are Fox Performance, an Amazon PPC agency founded in 2018. We work mainly with German clients, but also serve international brands across Europe and the USA. Our clients come from every industry you can imagine – supplements, beauty, home & living, pet, electronics, fashion, baby products, and more.



We are obsessed with Amazon. We test everything, read every update, break down every new beta feature, and push our clients to results they didn't think were possible. No autopilot. No "set and forget". No agency BS.

Now we are looking for a Senior Amazon PPC Manager – someone who can take full ownership of a portfolio of accounts, think strategically, and mentor junior tea
mbers along the way.



Who We Are NOT Looking For

Let's be direct. Do not apply if:



You are looking for a short-term gig or just a "bridge job" until something else comes up.

You are working multiple jobs in parallel and trying to squeeze us in on the side. We need your focus. Period.

You don't want to grow, learn, and push yourself every single week.

You want to clock in, clock out and never go beyond the bare minimum.

You see Amazon PPC as "just a job" instead of a craft you want to master.

You can't take direct, honest feedback without taking it personally.



We're not for everyone – and that's okay.

Who We ARE Looking For

We are looking for a true A-Player. Someone who:



Wants to go full throttle and be one of the best in the game.

Treats client accounts like their own business.

Is hungry, curious, and obsessed with getting better.

Wants to grow with us long-term and build a real career.

Brings energy, ideas, and ownership to the table every single day.



If that's you – we'd love to meet you.



What You'll Own



Full Account Ownership: manage a portfolio of premium client accounts end-to-end – from strategy to execution to client communication.

Advertising Strategy: build PPC strategies across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display – and where relevant, Amazon DSP and AMC.

Launch & Scale: from new product launches to aggressive scaling of existing winners – you know when to push and when to defend.

Advanced Optimization: bid strategies, placement optimization, SKU-level profitability, TACoS management, dayparting, portfolio structuring – you go way beyond dashboard-level.

Account Audits & Strategic Planning: diagnose weaknesses, identify opportunities, build 30/60/90 day roadmaps for every account.

Client Communication: lead client calls, present results, push back when needed, be the trusted expert clients rely on.

Mentorship: help our Junior PPC Managers and Assistants grow – share your playbook, review their work, develop the next generation.

Process Development: help us build better SOPs, templates and internal tools – your experience shapes how we operate.

Stay Ahead: test new Amazon features, evaluate new tools, and bring fresh ideas to the team.





What You Must Know (Non-Negotiables)

These are the things you absolutely need to have under your belt as a Senior:



Deep mastery of all Sponsored Ads formats: Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands (incl. Video & Brand Store), Sponsored Display (incl. Audiences & Custom Creatives), and how they interact.

Campaign architecture: SKAG, single-keyword, theme-based, performance-based – you know which structure works when and why.

Advanced bidding strategies: dynamic bids, placement modifiers, top-of-search optimization, bid by placement, bid hijacking defense.

Keyword research & targeting: Helium 10 (Cerebro, Magnet, Frankenstein), Brand Analytics, Search Query Performance Report (SQP) – you can pull insights most managers miss.

TACoS vs ACoS: you understand the difference, when to optimize for which, and how to communicate it to clients.

Search Term Reports & Negative Mining: you build clean, performance-focused accounts without keyword cannibalization.

Brand Defense & Conquesting: you protect your client's branded search and attack competitors strategically.

Organic & Paid Synergy: you understand how PPC influences organic ranking (and vice versa) – BSR, indexation, halo effect.

Listing Fundamentals: you know that even the best PPC can't fix a bad listing – and you can identify what needs to change.

Reporting & Storytelling: you don't just deliver numbers – you tell the story behind them.

Bulk File Operations: you can edit, optimize and upload bulk files like a surgeon.

Tool Stack: Helium 10, Brand Analytics, Pacvue / Perpetua / Adtomic / Sellerboard or similar – at least one professional ad management tool you've worked with hands-on.

Bonus (high value): Amazon DSP, AMC (Amazon Marketing Cloud), Vendor Central, international marketplaces (US, UK, DE, FR, IT, ES).



If you read this list and thought "yes, that's me" – continue. If half of these are unfamiliar, this role is not the right fit yet.



What You Bring



4+ years of hands-on Amazon Advertising experience (agency or in-house), ideally managing multiple 6- and 7-figure accounts.

Proven track record of scaling Amazon accounts profitably – with real case studies you can walk us through.

Expert-level data analysis skills – Excel / Google Sheets is your playground; pivot tables, XLOOKUP, conditional logic are second nature.

Strategic mindset – you think in frameworks, not just dashboards.

Excellent English (spoken and written). German is a big plus, but not required.

Strong communication – confident in client calls, clear in writing, direct but professional.

Ownership mentality – fully accountable, no excuses.

Stable internet and a professional remote work setup.





What We Offer

You already know the foundation we offer (100% remote, MacBook, full-time, long-term, competitive USD salary, after one year: 13th month pay, 20 days PTO, paid sick leave, Philippine holidays...).





Ownership & Growth



Clear path to Team Lead / Head of PPC – we are growing, and senior hires are who we promote from.

Voice in strategy – you help shape how the agency operates.

Direct line to leadership – no middle management, no politics.

Conference & event budget – Amazon Unboxed, PPC events, industry conferences – we send you.

Annual learning budget – courses, certifications, books, coaches – you choose.



Time & Space to Do Great Work



Flexible hours – core overlap with German business hours (3-5 hours/day), the rest is yours.

Deep Work culture – no unnecessary meetings, no micromanagement.

Real team culture – weekly team calls, virtual coffee, and annual team events.



If you read the full text start your message with "HI WOLF"

title: Shopify Product Management Specialist
description:
Shopify Product Management Specialist (Full-Time | Work From Home | AU Hours)

About the Role



We’re looking for a Shopify Product Management Specialist to join our growing team.



This is a full-time, long-term role for someone based in the Philippines who is comfortable working Australian business hours (AEST).



You’ll take ownership of our Shopify store—making sure everything is accurate, organised, and ready to sell. Your work will directly support our sales team, helping them focus on closing deals instead of fixing product or stock issues.



If you’re someone who takes pride in clean, accurate work and enjoys managing the details behind a high-performing store, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



 Product Management

Ensure all listings include high-quality, web-ready images



Inventory Management

Monitor stock levels and product availability

Keep inventory updated and accurate

Proactively flag low or out-of-stock items

Help prevent stock issues before they affect sales



Store Organisation

Manage collections, tags, metafields, variants, and filters

Keep the store clean, consistent, and easy to navigate

Identify and fix inconsistencies or missing information



Team Support

Work closely with the sales team (phone &
)

Provide updates on product availability and changes

Ensure product information is always reliable and up-to-date



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have Skills

Strong experience with Shopify (admin-level confidence)

High attention to detail (product data, pricing, images, stock)

Ability to work independently and manage your own tasks

Clear communication in a remote team environment



Nice to Have

Experience with Google Sheets or Excel (inventory tracking)

Basic photo editing or image resizing for web



Why Join Us?

? Long-term, stable role

? Clear responsibilities and ownership

? Supportive and remote-friendly team

? Opportunity to grow with the business





How to Apply

Submit your CV via OnlineJobs.ph

Include a short note about your Shopify experience



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to:

title: Certified Public Accountant (CPA) – Full-Time (Exclusive Arrangement | Work from Home)
description:
We are looking for a Certified Public Accountant (CPA) to join our growing organisation on a full-time, long-term basis.



?? Important: This is a direct hire, exclusive position. We are not accepting freelancers, agencies, or part-time applicants.

________________________________________



Role Overview

You will be responsible for managing day-to-day accounting tasks, ensuring accurate financial records, and supporting compliance with UK accounting and tax requirements.

________________________________________



Key Responsibilities

• Record daily financial transactions and maintain accurate books 

• Perform bank reconciliations and resolve discrepancies 

• Maintain and reconcile ledgers (sales, purchases, general ledger) 

• Bring accounts to trial balance stage 

• Prepare and submit VAT returns and tax-related reports 

• Assist in the preparation of financial statements 

• Manage accounts payable and receivable 

• Process payroll and pension contributions 

• Generate reports and support management with financial data 

• Perform general administrative and bookkeeping tasks as required 

________________________________________



Requirements

• Qualified CPA (essential)

• Proven experience in bookkeeping or accounting 

• Solid understanding of basic accounting principles 

• Experience with Xero and/or QuickBooks (preferred, training available) 

• Strong Excel / spreadsheet skills 

• High attention to detail and accuracy 

• Good written and spoken English communication skills 

• Ability to handle confidential financial information 

________________________________________



Work Setup Requirements

• Quiet and professional home workspace 

• Reliable high-speed internet connection 

• Personal PC or laptop 

• Willing to work with screen sharing tools (due to sensitive financial data) 

________________________________________



Working Hours

• Monday to Friday 

• 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (UK / London time) 

• 8-hour shift with 1-hour unpaid break 

________________________________________



Compensation & Benefits

• Php 30,000/month (Probation) 

• Php 40,000/month upon regularisation 

• Php 50,000/month after 6-month performance review

       (Final offer may vary depending on experience and expertise)



• 13th month pay 

• 22 days paid leave (including Philippine regular holidays) 

• Work-from-home setup 

• Opportunity for career growth and promotion 

• Medical cover (upon regularisation) 

________________________________________



Application Instructions

To be considered, please include the following in your application:

1. Confirmation that you are available for the stated working hours 

2. Your earliest start date 

3. Your current employment status 

4. Updated resume (PDF format preferred) 

________________________________________



Optional (but helps you stand out)

• Experience working with UK clients or UK accounting standards 

• Familiarity with VAT and payroll processes 

________________________________________



If you are looking for a stable, long-term role with growth potential, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Senior AI Architect & Automation Strategist (Agents, Voice & Workflow Automation)
description:

You'll work directly with the agency founder to audit our current business and client delivery stack, identify high-impact AI implementation opportunities, and build or oversee the build of AI agents, voice systems, and automation workflows.

Building or directing the build of AI voice agents (e.g. Vapi, Retell, ElevenLabs integrations)

Building AI agents and multi-agent pipelines (e.g. LangChain, CrewAI, Claude API, OpenAI)

Designing and optimising automation workflows (
, Zapier, n8n)

Integrating AI into CRM, outreach, and operational systems

Documenting systems and creating SOPs for ongoing use



You must have experience with:



AI agent frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, or similar)

Workflow automation tools (
, Zapier, n8n)

Prior work in an AI agency setting

title: Full-Time Executive VA / Chief of Staff for DTC Retention Agency (Must Be AI-Fluent)
description:
ABOUT US



We're Boring Ecom, a retention agency for DTC subscription brands on Shopify.

We help our clients keep more of the customers they already paid to acquire 
,

SMS, cancel flows, subscription strategy on Skio / Stay AI / Recharge). The CEO

runs the agency and needs a right hand to take everything off his plate that

isn't strategy, sales, or client work.

This is not a "answer some
s for 4 hours a day" VA role. This is a

full-time, 40+ hour, heavy-lift Chief of Staff role. If you want easy, keep

scrolling. If you want to be the operational backbone of a fast-growing

agency and learn how a real DTC business runs, read on.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Agency Operations & Admin



- Pull weekly and monthly client reports following our SOPs (Skio, Stay AI,

  Recharge, Shopify Analytics, Klaviyo)

- Manage invoicing and accounts receivable through 
: send invoices,

  follow up with clients on overdue payments, maintain the invoice calendar

- Manage employee and client contracts, SOWs, and our internal file system

  (keep it clean, named consistently, easy to find)

- Manage the CEO's calendar: schedule client calls, internal meetings, block

  focus time, prevent double-bookings

- Triage the CEO's inbox: flag what needs his attention, reply to the rest

  using templates and your judgment



Client Operations

- Onboard new clients: request Shopify / Klaviyo / Skio / Stay AI / Recharge

  / GA4 access, send welcome packets, schedule kickoff calls

- Prep the CEO before every client call: pull the latest reports and have them

  ready so he walks in loaded

- Turn Fireflies / Granola meeting transcripts into action items, log them in

  ClickUp, send recap
s to clients

- Triage client Slack channels and
s: flag what needs the CEO, answer the

  rest with our templates

- Build the shell of monthly business reviews and QBRs (you do the data pull

  and slide structure, CEO fills in strategy)



Bookkeeping & Accounting

- Categorize transactions, reconcile accounts, capture receipts

- Prepare monthly P&L and cash flow snapshots for the CEO

- Coordinate with our external CPA at tax time

- Track contractor payments and 1099 documentation



LinkedIn Management (CEO's account)

- Schedule and post 4-5 LinkedIn posts per week (we have a content system and

  Claude skill that drafts them, you finalize and schedule)

- Reply to comments and DMs in the CEO's voice

- Engage daily with target accounts (founders, DTC operators)



Internal Team Ops

- Keep ClickUp clean: create tasks, set due dates, chase status updates,

  produce a weekly capacity report

- Onboard new contractors: NDAs, access, payment setup

- Update SOPs and our Claude skills library when processes change



Sales Support

- Format proposals and SOWs on-brand

- Follow up on open proposals and warm leads

- Pre-call research on prospects (their store, current subscription setup,

  retention stack) before every discovery call



CEO Leverage

- Light personal admin and travel booking

- Receipt and expense capture

- Weekly portfolio dashboard so the CEO sees all clients at a glance

WHAT WE NEED (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

- Heavy experience using AI (specifically Claude) to build processes,

  SOPs, and skills. You should be able to write a Claude skill from a

  Loom video of a workflow. This is the most important requirement.

- 3+ years as an executive VA, ops manager, or chief of staff for a

  US-based business

- Strong written English. You'll be writing on behalf of the CEO daily.

- Comfortable with 
, Shopify admin, Klaviyo, ClickUp, Slack,

  Google Workspace, Fireflies, LinkedIn

- Bookkeeping experience (QuickBooks or Xero)

- Available for 40+ hours per week with at least 4 hours of daily

  overlap with US Eastern Time

- Detail-obsessed. If a client has an overdue invoice, you notice

  before we do. If a contract is missing a signature, you catch it.

- High agency. You don't wait to be told what to do once you understand

  the system.



NICE TO HAVES

- Experience in a marketing agency or DTC ecommerce environment

- Familiarity with Skio, Stay AI, or Recharge

- Experience writing on LinkedIn



WHAT YOU GET

- Full-time, long-term role (we want you here for years, not months)

- Competitive Salary

- 13th month pay

- Paid Philippine holidays

- Direct mentorship from the CEO on AI, ops, and how a real agency runs.

  This role will turn you into one of the most operationally skilled VAs

  in the Philippines.

- Annual performance review with raises tied to results



HOW TO APPLY

Send a message with the subject line: "Boring Ops [Your First Name]"

In your message, include:

1. A 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself and walking through one

   process you've automated or improved using Claude or another AI tool

2. Your resume

3. One sentence on what you think the hardest part of this role will be

4. The phrase "I read the whole post" at the bottom so we know you did



Applications without a Loom and without that phrase will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Accounting Manager (CPA)
description:
ABOUT US

We're a fast paced California-based accounting and consulting firm serving US businesses from early-stage startups to established companies. Our clients trust us with their books so they can focus on running their business, and we're growing because we deliver.



We’re hiring a full-time Senior Accounting Manager to manage the close cycle for assigned US clients and serve as a senior point of contact for those engagements. You’ll work in a US-style reporting environment (US GAAP, accrual accounting, monthly close discipline, and audit readiness), partnering directly with US-based clients and firm leadership. You’ll also mentor junior staff on technical questions and help maintain strong, consistent close processes across the engagements you support. Familiarity with Philippine statutory reporting is a plus but not a day-to-day requirement, the work is US GAAP focused. You’ll become a trusted member of the firm, with room to grow into a Head of Accounting/Controller role as we expand. This is a long-term career role, not a contract or side gig.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

• Lead client-facing accounting for assigned engagements, drive conversations on close timing, technical questions, and the financial story behind the numbers

• Take ownership of client relationships and team deliverables, be the senior accounting voice clients trust, anticipate their needs, and turn the numbers into business insight

• Oversee and review peers’ work to ensure quality standards, uphold a high bar for accuracy, consistency, and professionalism across deliverables before they reach clients

• Manage the full close cycle for assigned clients, month-end, quarter-end, and year-end including journal entries, reconciliations, and financial reporting

• Manage month?end close aligned with US timelines (typically 5–7 day close).

• Prepare and review financial statements and management reports used by US leadership

• Support US GAAP reporting, revenue recognition, accruals, and consolidation schedules

• Coordinate with clients on budgets, forecasts, cash flow, and variance analysis

• Handle intercompany transactions, eliminations, and reconciliations

• Maintain audit?ready documentation for US external auditors

• Communicate regularly with US-based stakeholders and lead day-to-day conversations with clients

• Handle sensitive financial data for multiple clients with discretion and care

• Partner with the team to provide clients clear and proactive communication by
 and on Microsoft Teams and Zoom

• Pick up client-specific workflows quickly and bring ideas to improve them



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

• Licensed CPA required (this is a hard requirement, not a preference)

• Have a Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, or relevant field

• 7+ years of full-cycle accounting experience (close, GL ownership, and financial reporting)

• 5+ years hands-on with QuickBooks Online and Desktop (QuickBooks ProAdvisor certification is a strong plus)

• Advanced Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, and large data extracts are everyday tools)

• Excellent written and spoken English (C2 level), confident leading client conversations with US business owners

• Substantial experience supporting US based clients and working US hours

• 
 experience is a plus

• Dedicated home workspace, laptop/PC with webcam and mic, stable internet (20+ Mbps)



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Monthly salary

$1,800 – $2,300 USD

Annualized; 13th month pay included in monthly amount (no separate end-of-year payment). Final salary depends on experience and QuickBooks proficiency. This is a long-term career role, not a stopgap. 



Wellness & Retirement Stipend

$450/year, your choice

HMO, MP2 retirement, or qualified health expenses after 6 months. 

PTO & sick leave after 6 months 

Paid US federal holidays



WORK SETUP

Schedule: Monday – Friday, Between 7:00 am – 4:00 pm Pacific Time (modification to working hours can be considered). 

Note: This schedule corresponds to roughly 10 p.m. – 7 a.m. Manila time. Candidates should confirm they can sustain this schedule long-term.



Hours per week: 40 hours (full-time, exempt)

Communication: Microsoft Teams (daily)

Employment type: Full-time, exclusive commitment (no moonlighting)



HOW TO APPLY

Please follow every step. Incomplete applications won't be reviewed.

1. Send your current CV or resume

2. Include a brief cover letter with your relevant accounting experience and why you're a strong fit for this role

3. End your message with one sentence that includes the word “Spring”, this confirms you read the full post



Please do not apply if:

• You cannot commit to full-time Pacific Time hours or are representing an agency



*A background check will be required before any offer of employment.

title: Design Lead
description:
Job Overview:



As the Design Lead, you'll be guiding the design team to build custom websites and graphics for clients. You'll shape and improve design processes while working closely with the SEO and web development teams. You'll also manage client communications to get design approvals. This means talking with clients, understanding their feedback, and passing it on to the design team, or handling some design mockups/updates yourself. Since you'll be
ing clients daily, strong communication skills are required. 



Furthermore, we expect that you can:



- manage a design team 

- oversee and always be on top of the design projects (if you are not proactive, this is not for you!)

- identify and incorporate the best designs and processes into our system so that we can continuously improve output and quality

- developing and maintaining design libraries (not pretty designs, but instead serve a purpose for our SEO clients)

- communicate with clients and understand their needs

- collaborate with the SEO team to back up their campaigns

8. Exceptional communication skills with solid English proficiency, both written and verbal

10. With a keen eye for details and quality control



If you are confident that you possess the design wizardry and leadership skills we are looking for, we invite you to complete the form below to express your interest in joining our team.







Only those who follow instructions will be considered for screening. Thank you

title: Personal Assistant (Real Estate)
description:
Summary



Harcourts Hoverd & Co is looking for a driven, detail?oriented Personal Assistant (PA) based in the Philippines to support Nas, one of our high?performing sales agents in Auckland, New Zealand.



This role is ideal for someone who genuinely enjoys organisation, takes ownership of tasks, and finds purpose in helping others perform at their very best. You will be a key part of the agent’s daily operations, working behind the scenes to keep everything running smoothly while delivering exceptional service to clients.



This is not just an admin role. It is a trusted support position where your work directly contributes to results.



---------------------------------------



About Us



Harcourts Hoverd & Co is a premium real estate company known for strong systems, high standards, and a supportive, collaborative culture. We value initiative, accountability, and people who take pride in doing things properly.



You will be working closely with an experienced agent and a wider admin, design, and operations team who believe in structure, respect boundaries, and clear communication.



---------------------------------------



Working Hours



PH Time: 4:30 AM – 1:00 PM

Monday to Friday



Applicants must be comfortable working early PH hours to align with New Zealand business operations.



---------------------------------------



Your Role



Your primary goal is to enhance agent productivity, ensure transactions flow smoothly, and help maintain an excellent client experience at every stage of the sales process.



You will act as the agent’s right hand, managing admin, listings, marketing coordination, leads, and communication so the agent can stay focused on selling.



---------------------------------------



Key Responsibilities



Administrative Support

- Manage calendar, appointments, meetings, and open homes

- Monitor and manage the agent’s
 inbox 

- Flag urgent matters immediately and escalate when required

- Maintain organised digital folders and databases

- Prepare summaries and reports as requested



Listings & Marketing Support

- Assist with listing descriptions and listing covers

- Coordinate listing documents with internal teams

- Update listing statuses across platforms

- Support open home scheduling and preparation

- Coordinate marketing materials with the design team



Lead & Database Management

- Enter and track new leads accurately

- Ensure timely follow?ups and reminders

- Maintain clean, updated client and lead databases



Transaction Support

- Assist with document coordination and deadline tracking

- Support communication between clients, lawyers, and internal teams



Client Communication

- Send appointment confirmations and reminders

- Use approved templates to respond to common inquiries

- Collect and log feedback after meetings and open homes



---------------------------------------



Tools You’ll Use



Microsoft Outlook & Teams, Canva, Excel, real estate platforms, and messaging tools such as WeChat and Slack for urgent matters.



---------------------------------------



What We’re Looking For



- Strong organisational and communication skills

- High attention to detail

- Ability to work independently and follow systems

- Reliable, proactive, and professional

- Confident written and spoken English

- Prior VA or admin experience is an advantage

- Real estate experience is helpful but not required



---------------------------------------



Compensation



You are welcome to set the hourly rate you wish to receive.



Please ensure your OnlineJobs.ph profile rate is updated to reflect your current asking rate, as this is the rate we will base our offer on. 



---------------------------------------



How to Apply (Important)

To be considered, applications must include BOTH:



1. Your CV

2. A short 2?minute video introducing yourself and explaining why you want this role.



Please clearly mention “Harcourts Hoverd & Co” in your video.

Applications without a video will not be considered.



---------------------------------------



Why Join Us?



- Long-term, stable role with a respected real estate brand

- Clear systems and expectations

- Supportive professional team

- Meaningful work where your contribution truly matters



If you enjoy structure, responsibility, and being the person who keeps everything running smoothly, we would love to hear from you.
salary: the rate you set in onlinejobs.ph

title: Admin VA
description:
Join The Collaborative Co. - a fast-growing boutique Virtual Assistant agency supporting small businesses, solo entrepreneurs, and service providers across Australia.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Virtual Assistant to support a group of psychology and allied health clinics in Australia. The clinics range from boutique practices to a high-volume online psychology clinic with 42 psychologists. Our client's team includes onshore staff and offshore VAs, and the goal is to consolidate all clinic support under one trusted, dedicated VA through The Collaborative Co.



The business is in an active growth phase. SOPs, clinic manuals, and FAQs are documented and training will be provided by on-site Practice Managers.



A win in the first 30 days looks like this: no excuses, job just getting done, clients supported, inbox close to zero daily, and proactively asking to help when quiet.



You will be the primary point of contact for patients and referring clinicians across multiple clinics, managing a high volume of calls,
s, and appointment workflows. This is not a role where you are expected to make independent decisions. The right approach when unsure is always: "I'm not sure, let me find out and call you back."



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Reception & client support

·       Answer incoming phone calls across all clinics (10/day for smaller clinics; 50–70 every 2 days for the large online clinic)

·       Manage and action
s, maintaining inbox close to zero daily

·       Book, reschedule, and cancel appointments

·       Upload referrals and call referrals to offer available appointments

·       Provide warm, professional client support including to patients presenting with mental health concerns

·       Conduct general client check-ins as required



Policy & escalation

·       Enforce the 24-hour cancellation policy and communicate late cancellation fees via
 (no AI-generated correspondence)

·       Escalate issues to the relevant Practice Manager using clinic manuals and FAQs as a first reference

·       Proactively support other tea
mbers when capacity allows



TOOLS & SYSTEMS

Phone system:  WebEx 

Communication:   Voxer & Outlook 

Practice management:   Clinico, Galaxy, Zanda 

Productivity & access:   Google Workspace, Spreadsheets, LastPass, Australian VPN 



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

·       Calm under pressure, reliable, and consistently honest and transparent

·       Warm, empathetic, and kind in client interactions — including with people in emotional distress

·       Able to maintain professional boundaries with callers and redirect conversations appropriately

·       Knows when to problem-solve independently and when to escalate to a Practice Manager

·       Proactively communicates — over-communicates rather than under-communicates

·       Exceptional written English: professional, error-free, capable of drafting client-facing
s independently (5/5)

·       Exceptional spoken English: confident and professional on calls (5/5)

·       Strong customer service background in any industry

·       Comfortable and emotionally mature working in a mental health environment

Healthcare or allied health experience is not required. Personality, maturity, and communication quality matter most.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

·       High-speed internet connection (non-negotiable)

·       Laptop or computer with headset for WebEx phone system

·       Australian VPN for all phone-based tasks



WORKING ARRANGEMENT

Mon - Fri, Full-Time Remote

9am - 6pm Philippine Time

Total hours: 160 hours per month

Term: Minimum 3 months 



FUTURE GROWTH POTENTIAL

This role has strong growth potential for the right person. Over time, there is opportunity to move into more proactive responsibilities including identifying process gaps and suggesting improvements. The ideal long-term candidate is someone who can grow with the business.



HOW TO APPLY

If you believe you are the right fit for this role, we would love to hear from you. Please complete our application form at the link below:

title: Experienced Web Designer – Figma, Elementor & AI Workflows
description:
Milkyway Is Hiring



Are you the creative and performance-driven Web Designer we’re looking for?



Are you a designer who doesn’t just make things look good—but understands how design drives user experience, conversions, and business results?



Do you enjoy turning ideas into polished, high-performing websites using both strong design fundamentals and modern AI tools to work smarter?



If you bring creativity, speed, structure, and strategic thinking into your work, this could be your next role.



About Milkyway



Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and digital marketing.



We partner with founders, small business owners, and established brands to elevate how they show up online—with design that is both beautiful and functional.



We’re growing quickly and are looking for a Web Designer who can deliver high-quality creative work while contributing to a strong, efficient delivery team.



ABOUT YOU



The ideal person wants to grow with us, take ownership of design quality, and contribute to a high-performing creative team.



You are:

• Highly creative with a strong eye for modern, conversion-focused design.  

• Confident using Figma for web layouts, wireframing, and UI/UX design.  

• Experienced in WordPress and Elementor, capable of building and updating high-quality websites.  

• Strong in Adobe Photoshop (Illustrator is a plus) and comfortable using Canva for fast execution.  

• Able to take a brief and turn it into clean, well-structured, high-performing designs.  

• Proactive—bringing ideas, not just execution.  

• Organised, detail-oriented, and reliable with deadlines.  

• A problem solver who can think through UX, layout, and usability challenges.  

• A clear communicator who works well with designers, developers, and marketers.  

• Committed to continuous improvement in both design and systems.  



Experience Requirements:  

• Minimum 2 years experience working in a digital agency environment (required).  

• Proven experience working across multiple client projects and industries.  



 AI + DESIGN CAPABILITY (IMPORTANT)



We’re looking for a designer who understands both traditional design fundamentals and AI-assisted workflows.



You should:

• Have strong design skills without relying on AI tools.  

• Be experienced in using AI (e.g. ChatGPT or similar tools) in a professional setting to support ideation, copy structuring, wireframing support, and workflow efficiency.  

• Know how to refine and improve AI-generated outputs to meet high design standards.  

• Understand when to use AI—and when manual design thinking is required.  



If you rely entirely on AI to produce your work without understanding design principles, this role is not a fit.



 ABOUT THE ROLE



This role reports directly to the founder and works closely with the delivery and operations team.



You will:

• Design website layouts, UI elements, and digital assets using Figma.  

• Build and execute high-quality websites in WordPress (Elementor).  

• Create supporting assets such as
 creatives, banners, and social media graphics.  

• Support branding projects and assist in developing visual identities.  

• Handle WordPress updates, content changes, and visual improvements.  

• Maintain clean and organised design systems across Figma, Adobe, and Canva.  

• Contribute ideas in team discussions and project planning.  

• Ensure all design output is accurate, on-brand, and delivered on time.  



 WORK SETUP



This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone who can work within or close to Australian (Brisbane) business hours.



We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a growing agency and contribute meaningfully to client success—not just complete tasks.



It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET



A supportive, growth-focused environment where your creativity and ideas genuinely matter.



• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear systems and expectations to support high-quality work  

• Training and onboarding to help you succeed in the role  

• Opportunities to grow your skills in design, UX/UI, and digital strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of industries and creative projects  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  



We believe great design drives real business results—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY



If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



• Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application  

• Attach your portfolio and resume  

• Include at least 3 professional references in your resume  



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.



We look forward to meeting the Web Designer who will help elevate our clients’ brands and digital presence.

 outreach

s. We are looking for someone who understands how to reach the right audience, create the right message, and build a complete outreach strategy.

title: Project Manager – Shopify Agency (Philippines-Based, Remote) Part-Time to Full-Time | Competitive Pay |LongTerm Role
description:
Who We Are

We're a small but fast-growing Shopify agency. In just the last 4 months we've brought on 43 clients — and that number is climbing. Right now it's a lean team: me (the founder) and 2–3 talented freelancers. We build and optimize Shopify stores, manage client relationships, and move fast.

The honest truth? I've been running project management myself, and we've outgrown that. I need someone who can take real ownership of how projects flow — from the 
nt a client signs to the 
nt we deliver — and who can help me build better systems as we scale.

title: Python Data Engineer – Build Data Validation Tool (CSV Comparison + AI Summary)
description:
Python Data Engineer – Build Data Validation Tool (CSV Comparison + AI Summary)



Description:



I’m looking for a strong Python data engineer to build a simple MVP tool that compares two datasets and identifies data mismatches.



This is NOT a chatbot or marketing automation project.

This is a structured data validation and comparison tool.



What the tool should do:



* Accept 2 datasets (CSV/Excel): Source and Target

* Allow simple field mapping (e.g., source.emp_id ? target.worker_id)

* Compare data and identify:



  * Missing records

  * Extra records

  * Duplicate records

  * Field mismatches

  * Null / blank values

* Output a clean error report

* Provide summary metrics (% match, total errors, etc.)

* Generate a short AI summary of findings (using OpenAI API)



Tech Requirements:



* Python (Pandas) – REQUIRED

* Experience with data comparison, ETL, or reconciliation

* Ability to build a simple UI (Streamlit preferred)

* Experience integrating APIs (OpenAI is a plus)



What I am NOT looking for:



* Chatbot developers

* Marketing automation specialists (Zapier-only)

* Prompt engineers without data experience



Deliverable:



A working MVP that:



* Runs end-to-end

* Produces accurate validation results

* Has a simple interface for demo purposes



Timeline:



7–10 days for MVP



Budget:



Open to fixed price based on experience



To Apply:



Please include:



1. How you would approach comparing two datasets with different field names and formats

2. Example of similar work (data validation, ETL, reconciliation)

3. The word “validation” in your response (to confirm you read this)



Bonus:



Experience working with HR, payroll, or enterprise datasets is a plus



---



This is a focused MVP build with potential for ongoing work if this goes well.

title: TikTok Video Editor — @theoppenheimboys · ASCEND
description:
TikTok Video Editor 
 / Ascend Athlete



WHO WE ARE

We are Kai and Miko — two brothers who both play Division 1 college soccer. We built Ascend (
) a 6-pillar performance system for youth soccer athletes. 10 athletes committed D1 this year using our program. Our TikTok has produced multiple videos over 100K and 200K views organically with zero paid promotion.

We are not building from scratch. We are scaling something that is already working and we need an editor who can take it to millions.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

Most editing jobs hand you footage and a vague direction. This one gives you a professionally written Content Bible — a detailed brief for every video specifying the hook, the exact text overlays with timestamps and font sizes, the footage brief, the color grade, the algorithm goal, and the caption. Every strategic decision is already made.

Your job is to bring that brief to life at the highest possible level. We want precision AND creative excellence. The brief tells you what the video needs to do. How you make it cinematic, emotional, and impossible to scroll past is entirely yours.

The editors who thrive here follow a detailed system and still find ways to make the result better than the brief alone would produce.



WHAT MAKES THESE VIDEOS HARD TO EDIT WELL

Every video is built around a three-layer hook system. Layer one is the first visual frame — it must create a question before any text appears. Layer two is the text hook — 4 to 8 words that open a loop the viewer must resolve by staying. Layer three is the audio — natural sounds from the footage that engage before conscious attention does. All three must work together in the first 1.5 seconds or the video fails regardless of what comes after.

TikTok's algorithm now requires approximately 70% completion rate for a video to receive second-batch distribution. Every edit decision — the opening frame, the cut timing, the text rhythm, the slow-motion placement — must serve that completion rate. This is not casual editing. This is precision craft.



THE 6 VIDEO TYPES YOU WILL EDIT

Skill breakdowns — no text for the first 4 seconds, footage is the entire hook. 3-step breakdown with gold-labeled steps. Slow-motion replay of the exact same hero clip at 0.3x speed at the end. The slow-mo replay drives rewatches — viewers see everything they missed the first time. Built entirely for saves.

D1 Decoded education videos — text-overlay driven content teaching recruiting, training science, and tactical concepts. 45-55 seconds. "Reality 1:", "Reality 2:", "Reality 3:" labels in GOLD #C9A84C. Fast pacing but every point must land. Comment-driver question at the end is the most important text in the video algorithmically.

Origin and story videos — three-act emotional arc: crisis, comeback, resolution. Warm color grade. Pure visual windows of 10-14 seconds with zero text. Ken Burns slow zoom on still photos. The most creatively open format — the brief gives the structure, how you create the emotion is yours.

ASMR videos — zero music tracks, zero. Natural sounds raised to
% volume with frame-accurate audio-visual sync. 18-26 seconds maximum. The first sound in the first 2 seconds is the entire hook. These are the most technically demanding videos in the calendar.

Proof and sell videos — athlete testimonial quotes at 72pt, the largest text in the video. Real D1 commit names stacked vertically. Direct call-to-action sequence. These drive direct revenue for Ascend. Premium and confident — no compromise on quality.

Two Brothers lifestyle — both brothers visible in frame for the majority of the video. Warmer color grade than all other formats. Genuine not produced. The authenticity between two brothers is the content — if it feels staged it does not work.



THE TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

CapCut is the primary tool. The entire Content Bible is written for CapCut specifically. You must execute all of the following at expert level without instruction:

Apply the saved color grade preset — Oslo filter 35%, Brightness ?5, Contrast +12, Saturation +5, Warmth +5, Sharpness +10 — consistently to every clip before any editing begins. Sync audio to visuals using the CapCut waveform panel with frame-accurate precision. Add text overlays at exact timestamps: Montserrat Bold, 72pt primary, 60pt secondary, 52pt CTAs, white #FFFFFF with 2px black stroke, positioned in the upper 15-20% of the screen only. Use GOLD #C9A84C on all labels, step numbers, URLs, and "Save this" text. Apply slow-motion using Speed ? Curve ? Hero preset at 0.3x on the peak 
nt of each video. Score every clip A, B, or C before building the timeline and reject C-grade clips. Use hard cuts between every clip — transitions must earn their place or they do not exist. Export at 1080×1920, 30fps, H.264, High quality with correct file naming.

Every finished video must be export-ready for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
 Reels simultaneously — clean file, no watermarks, correct format.

You must recommend the best possible sound from the TikTok audio library for each video — matching tone, energy, and exact length. We make the final music decision but we expect a specific, reasoned recommendation with every delivery.

You must have proven experience creating and integrating AI-generated images and video into short-form content. This is a hard requirement. Applications without evidence of this will not move forward.



THE WORKFLOW

We send you the briefs and upload raw footage to Google Drive. You edit all 7 videos to the highest possible standard following each brief. When all 7 are complete you upload them and message us. We review and send specific feedback on anything that needs to be redone. You revise and confirm. We add music and post. Done for the week.



PAY

Each video takes approximately one hour to edit. At 7 videos per week that is roughly 7 hours of work.

Second round trial: $4 flat per completed brief. Paid to every applicant who finishes it regardless of outcome. Paid the same day we make our decision.

Ongoing if hired: $6 per video to start, increasing to $7.50 per video based on quality and consistency. 7 videos per week. Paid every Friday via Wise or PayPal. Long-term role — the right editor earns more over time.



HOW TO APPLY

We read every application. Send the following — missing items mean your application is not reviewed.

Your portfolio. Links to 3-5 short-form videos you personally edited for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts. We are looking for pacing instinct, text placement precision, color work, audio sync quality, and the ability to hold attention past the 10-second mark. If any video exceeded 50K or 100K views tell us. If you have edited sports, athlete, or soccer content specifically, lead with that.

Your AI work. Concrete examples of AI-generated images or video you have created and integrated into short-form content. Links, screenshots, or portfolio pieces. No examples means no second round.

Your best edit explained. One video you edited that genuinely performed well or that you are proud of. Tell us the specific creative decisions you made — the opening frame, a cut, a sound choice, a text timing call — that elevated it beyond the brief you were given.

Your technical setup. Your CapCut skill level — beginner, intermediate, or advanced. Any other software you use. Be honest. The trial will show us immediately.

Your turnaround time. How long does a finished 60-second edit take you from the 
nt you receive raw footage.

Your payment details. Your PayPal or Wise
 so we can pay you for the trial immediately upon completion.

The phrase "Oppenheim Knox Bros" written somewhere in your application. Applications without this exact phrase are not reviewed. This confirms you read the full post.



SECOND ROUND

From all applications received we will select a shortlist of the strongest candidates. If you are chosen for the second round you will receive one video brief, raw footage, and exact step-by-step instructions. Complete the edit and upload it within 48 hours. We score every submission against the same criteria, pay every participant $4 flat upon completion, and respond to every applicant within 72 hours with our decision.

We run this with multiple editors simultaneously. The best edit gets the ongoing role.



WHO GETS HIRED

You have made videos that actually reached people. You understand why the first frame matters as much as the hook text. You know what a 70% completion rate requires at the editing level. You follow a brief precisely and make the result better than the brief alone. You are reliable — deadlines are not suggestions. You want to be part of something growing, not a one-off gig.



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR

If you have never produced a video that performed well this is not the right role. If you have no experience with AI image or video generation this is not the right role. If CapCut is not a tool you use at a high level this is not the right role yet.



We have proof this content reaches hundreds of thousands of people. We need the editor who makes it reach 
 ·

title: Social Media VA – Instagram Content Strategist & Analyst
description:
Are you the type of person who opens Instagram before your eyes are fully open in the morning?



Do you find yourself analyzing why a reel went viral while everyone else is just mindlessly scrolling?



Do you get genuinely excited when you discover a trending sound before it blows up?



Do you triple-check captions, post times, and visual elements because "good enough" makes your eye twitch?



If you're nodding yes, keep reading.



Who We Are -- 

Impact Coach Academy (IFCA) helps fitness coaches and personal trainers scale beyond the "session trap" and build businesses that generate $10,000+ monthly. Our content strategy is critical to attracting the right coaches to our programs, and we need someone who treats our Instagram accounts like their own child—obsessively analyzing, optimizing, and perfecting every single post.



What You'll Be Doing --

You'll be managing 3 Instagram accounts that post 2-3 times daily, and you'll be responsible for:



Posting & Scheduling: Managing daily content across all accounts with military precision



Trial Reels Analysis: Watching our trial reels with a forensic eye—what hooked people? Where did they drop off? Why did that one perform 3x better than the others?



Creating B-Roll Reels: Sourcing, editing, and producing scroll-stopping B-roll content that supports our messaging



Content Performance Analysis: Diving deep into analytics to answer the questions: "Why did this work? Why did this flop? What patterns are we seeing?"



Trend Monitoring: Staying ahead of Instagram trends, trending sounds, new features (like trial reels), and viral content formats



Hook & Script Analysis: Obsessing over hooks—did viewers understand what this was about in the first 3 seconds? Did the hook match the payoff?



Quality Control: Being the final gatekeeper who ensures every piece of content is on-brand, on-message, and actually makes sense to our audience



Who You Are

You're not just "good at social media." You're the person who:



Lives and breathes Instagram – You know the algorithm, you understand retention metrics, and you can spot a viral hook structure from a mile away



Obsesses over details – You're the person who checks, double-checks, and triple-checks everything before it goes live because mistakes make you physically uncomfortable



Analyzes content instinctively – When you see a viral post, your brain automatically reverse-engineers why it worked



Stays ahead of trends – You're already experimenting with new features before most people know they exist



Thinks like the audience – Your constant question is: "Does this make sense in the first 3 seconds? Will our audience actually care about this?"



Brings receipts – You don't make content decisions based on gut feelings; you base them on data, patterns, and proven performance



What We're NOT Looking For



Someone who needs hand-holding or extensive training

Someone who thinks "posting consistently" is the same as "strategic content creation"

Someone who's just looking for a social media job but isn't genuinely obsessed with the craft



The Details



Start: Part-time, hourly basis

Growth: Strong potential to move into full-time as you prove your strategic impact

Onboarding: Minimal. We're throwing you into the fire on day one because we need someone who already knows exactly what they're doing

Work Style: Remote, but you need to be plugged into Instagram trends daily and checking analytics religiously



How This Works

You'll start managing the accounts immediately. You'll audit what's working, what's not, and you'll start implementing your insights. We're not micromanagers—we're looking for someone who takes ownership and comes to us with data-driven recommendations, not someone waiting for us to tell them what to post.

If you read this and thought "Finally, a role that gets it"—you're probably our person.

To Apply

Send us:



Your Instagram handle (we want to see how YOU show up on social)

A 2-3 minute Loom video analyzing one of our recent posts or a competitor's viral reel—tell us why it worked (or didn't) and what you'd do differently

A brief note about why you're obsessed with Instagram content strategy



No resumes filled with fluff. Just show us you understand the game.

description:
Media Buyer 
 Ads) — E-commerce/Dropshipping



Remote • Part-time to Full-time Path



About Us

We’re a fast-growing e-commerce group operating multiple dropshipping brands. We combine rapid testing, sharp creative, and rigorous analytics to launch products that delight customers. You’ll join a lean, ambitious team where your work directly impacts revenue—and where high performers grow quickly.



The Role



As a Media Buyer, you’ll own the end-to-end execution of
 (Meta) acquisition campaigns across several storefronts. You’ll launch and scale daily tests, safeguard account health, and collaborate closely with our CEO, creative, and operations teams to hit revenue and efficiency targets.



What You’ll Do

- Plan, build, and launch campaigns in
 Ads Manager daily (audiences, budgets, placements, tracking).

- Manage and pace budgets against KPIs; reallocate spend toward winners in real time.

- QA all assets and flows pre-launch (ad copy/creatives, URLs, pixels, events, landing pages, checkout).

- Monitor account health, policy compliance, and limits; escalate risks early.

- Maintain clear performance reporting in Google Sheets; summarize insights and next steps.

- Partner with the CEO, video editor, and EA; attend a weekly stand-up with concise updates.

- Proactively propose tests (creatives, angles, audiences, funnels) and process improvements.

- Stable account health and policy compliance.



What You Bring

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- 2+ years hands-on media buying for E-commerce on
/Meta (dropshipping experience is a plus).

- Strong performance marketing mindset: comfortable with hypotheses, rapid testing, and data-driven decisions.

- Advanced Ads Manager skills; working knowledge of Events Manager, pixels/API, ad account, audiences, and attribution.

- High attention to detail; excellent written English; organized and deadline-reliable.

- Ownership mentality—able to work independently, surface risks, and take initiative without micromanagement.

- Comfortable with Google Sheets (lookups, pivots, basic charting) and structured reporting.

- Note on assessments: We value analytical thinking. Short skills/aptitude tasks may be part of our selection process.



How We Work (and What You’ll Get)

- Part-time with flexible hours, results-oriented culture; path to full-time for top performers.

- Compensation: $5//7hour to start (depending on your experience) + performance bonuses.

- Approved expense reimbursement.

- Merit-based raises as your impact grows.

- Access to proven SOP's, fast feedback loops, and direct collaboration with leadership.

- Real growth opportunities: broaden into creative strategy  or team management as we scale.



How to Apply

- Put your favorite animal in the subject line/title—this helps us spot detail-oriented applicants.

Please include:

- Your CV/Resume.

- Links or screenshots of recent e-commerce campaigns you’ve managed (redact sensitive data).

- A short paragraph on why you’re the best fit, including your typical testing framework (budget per test, iteration cadence, success/fail criteria).

- Your availability (hours per week) 

- Your IQ in your account (you can do this for free on onlinejobs)



No AI-generated applications—we read closely and can tell.



We’re excited to meet driven marketers who want to grow with us and take real ownership. If that sounds like you, let’s talk.

title: Sales quality assurance analyst
description:
The Sales Quality Assurance Analyst monitors and evaluates sales interactions—including phone calls,
s, and text communications—to ensure adherence to company standards, regulatory requirements, and best practices. This role supports sales performance by identifying areas for improvement, providing actionable feedback, and helping maintain a high-quality customer experience.

Key responsibilities:

Active listening

Critical thinking and analysis

Communication and coaching

Time management

Attention to detail

Data interpretation

title: AI Film Creator (Project-Based)
description:
AM Eyewear, Australia’s longest-running independent fashion eyewear brand (est. 2003), is looking for a highly creative AI Film Creator to collaborate with us on a project basis.

We’d like to produce a series of short, high-impact AI films to showcase our sunglasses across digital platforms. This is a creative role for someone who understands both luxury aesthetics and emerging AI tools, and can translate that into visually striking, fashion-forward content.

If you live and breathe visual storytelling, understand premium branding, and know how to push tools like Runway, Sora, and Pika to their limits, this is a unique opportunity to work with an established global brand.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Create short-form AI-generated films showcasing AM Eyewear sunglasses

• Develop concepts, scenes, and visual narratives aligned with a luxury fashion aesthetic

• Use AI tools to generate, edit, and refine cinematic-quality video content

• Interpret briefs and bring creative direction to life with minimal oversight

• Deliver content optimised for social media, ads, and digital campaigns

• Continuously experiment with new AI techniques, styles, and workflows



Project Structure:

• Paid per project (scope to be defined per campaign)

• Strong working knowledge of Runway, Sora, Pika (or similar tools)

About the Brand:

AM Eyewear is stocked in over 1,000 high-end optical stores globally and is known for:

• Handcrafted frames using Italian bio-based acetate and Japanese titanium

• Sunglasses fitted with Nylon lenses with gold AR coating

What You’ll Love:

title: Social Media Growth Strategist (Real Estate | Auckland-Focused | Remote)
description:
This is not a content role.

This is not a “post and hope” role.

This is a growth role.



We are Harcourts Hoverd & Co, a high-performance real estate business in Auckland, New Zealand, and we are looking for a proven Social Media Strategist who knows how to turn attention into opportunities, leads, and growth.



We operate across two core divisions:

• Residential Sales

• Property Management



Your job is to help us grow both aggressively and intelligently through social media.



-------------------------



The Opportunity



You will be responsible for building and executing a clear, strategic social media growth plan that drives:

• Appraisal bookings

• Property management enquiries

• Brand authority in our local market

• Recruitment of high-performing salespeople



You won’t be judged on how many posts you make.

You will be judged on results.



-------------------------



What We’re Looking For



We are NOT looking for a junior marketer or content scheduler.



We are looking for someone who:

• Thinks like a strategist first, executor second

• Understands how to build audience, trust, and conversion pipelines

• Knows how to turn content into real business outcomes

• Is data-driven, constantly testing, refining, and improving

• Has the confidence to bring ideas, direction, and leadership to the role



You should already know what good looks like and be able to take ownership from day one.



-------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities

• Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with business growth targets



• Create and oversee content that builds authority, trust, and engagement across:

-

- Instagram

- LinkedIn

- TikTok



• Design campaigns that generate:

- Seller enquiries

- Landlord leads



- Recruitment conversations

• Manage and optimise paid campaigns for ROI and conversion

• Analyse performance and continuously refine strategy based on data

• Work alongside our internal team (design, sales, admin) to bring campaigns to life

• Identify opportunities to differentiate and dominate in the Auckland real estate space



-------------------------



What Success Looks Like (KPIs)

• Consistent growth in qualified enquiries (not just followers)

• Increased appraisal bookings and listing opportunities

• Growth in property management leads

• Strong engagement and local audience penetration

• Measurable contribution to agent recruitment

• Clear reporting and strategic insights



-------------------------



Your Background

• Proven experience as a Social Media Strategist (real estate preferred, but not essential if results are strong)

• Demonstrated success in driving growth, leads, or revenue through social media

• Deep understanding of:

o Meta 
/Instagram)

o LinkedIn

o TikTok

• Strong grasp of paid advertising and conversion strategy

• Excellent storytelling, positioning, and content direction skills



-------------------------



Why This Role is Different

• You will have real influence on business growth

• Your ideas will be implemented, not ignored

• You will work with a high-performance, results-driven team

• You will be measured on impact, not activity

• There is long-term opportunity for the right person



-------------------------



Role Details

• Full-time remote role

• NZ-aligned hours (9:30 AM – 6:00 PM NZT)

• Stable, established company with 25+ years in the market



-------------------------



How to Apply



Send us:

1. Your CV (with links to accounts you’ve managed)

2. Examples of campaigns or content that delivered real results

3. A short video explaining:

- How you approach social media strategy

- What results you’ve achieved

- Why you’re the right fit for this role



Please mention Harcourts Hoverd & Co in your video.

title: LinkedIn Outreach Assistant — 24-Day Project, ~5 Min/Day
description:
WHAT'S THE WORK?



We're hiring 40+ part-time assistants for a 24-day LinkedIn outreach campaign starting late April 2026. The work is 100% copy-paste: open a candidate's LinkedIn profile, paste a pre-written InMail message, send, mark complete in a tracking sheet.



- ~5 minutes per day

- ~3.5 hours total over 24 days

- 100% scripted — no message writing, no replies, no decisions

- Pre-prepared queue delivered to you daily

- You will NOT respond to candidate replies — you forward them to our internal team

- Skip days are fine. Weekends, family stuff, sick days — your queue rolls forward, just keep up roughly with the daily pace overall





WHAT YOU EARN



$0.35 per message verified. About 75 messages over the campaign = $26.25 total.



Choose how you get paid:



- WEEKLY PAYMENTS via USDT (Solana network), bank transfer, or mobile top-up — paid every Friday

- OR SINGLE PAYMENT at the end of the campaign + $5 completion bonus = $31.25 total



Top performers also get first invitation to Phase 2 and Phase 3 of this campaign over the following 60 days (additional ~$30-50 each, not guaranteed).





WHAT YOU NEED



1. A LINKEDIN PROFILE IN ONE OF THESE FIELDS: recruiting, talent acquisition, HR, executive search, executive/personal assistant, or virtual assistant. Profiles in unrelated fields (graphic design, marketing, sales/SDR, lead generation, software development, healthcare, customer service, etc.) will not be considered — even if your past work history includes some recruiting experience. Your current LinkedIn headline matters most.



2. A LinkedIn account at least 1 year old, with a professional photo and (ideally) 50+ connections.



3. YOU HAVE NOT USED A LINKEDIN SALES NAVIGATOR FREE TRIAL IN THE PAST 12 MONTHS (we'll verify with a 2-minute screenshot check before hiring).



4. ~5 minutes most days for ~24 days.





ABOUT US



We're Obsidian Global, a business group running this campaign for three companies. Our coordinator Piumantha is your main point of contact.



We pay every freelancer who completes the work, on time, in full, via your chosen method. Weekly payments option exists specifically for freelancers who prefer regular payouts.





HOW TO APPLY



Reply with:



1. A SCREENSHOT OF YOUR LINKEDIN PROFILE (showing photo, headline, current role, connection count)



2. Confirmation: "I have NOT used a Sales Navigator trial in the past 12 months"



3. ONE SENTENCE ANSWERING THIS: What is our policy on responding to candidate replies?



Piumantha responds to qualified applicants within 24 hours during weekdays.

title: Cold Caller / Sales Development Rep — AI Agency (Simpli AI)
description:
I am looking for a confident and experienced outbound cold caller to join Simpli AI, a growing AI agency helping HVAC and plumbing contractors in Texas never miss a customer call again using AI technology.

Your role is simple. You call business owners, spark their interest, and book a 5 minute call with our manager. You do not sell. You just book the call. Our manager handles all closing.

This is a high volume outbound role. If you are not comfortable making 200 calls per day and being held accountable to daily targets this role is not for you.

We are specifically looking for someone who has:



Fluent English with a neutral accent — this is non negotiable. You will be calling US business owners every day

Hands on experience using GoHighLevel CRM for logging calls and managing pipelines

Knowledge of AI tools and technology — you understand what we sell and can speak confidently about it

A proven track record of high volume outbound cold calling — 150 to 200 calls per day minimum in a previous role

Experience calling US businesses specifically



We are looking for someone hungry, consistent, and ready to start immediately. If you have GoHighLevel experience, fluent English, and a background in AI or tech sales you will move to the top of our list.

title: [VIRAL ENGINEER] Short-Form Specialist | 10x Videos/Mo | 2,500 NOK + Bonuses
description:
[VIRAL ENGINEER] 10x Elite Videos | 2,500 NOK Base + High-Performance Bonuses



QUICK SUMMARY (The Bottom Line)



Role: Viral Engineer / Short-Form Video Specialist.



Work Model: Output-based (Deliverable-driven). I value high-retention results over hours on a clock.



Guaranteed Base: 2,500 NOK (approx. 16,275 PHP) for 10 elite videos per month.



Total Monthly Potential: 4,000 NOK+ (approx. 26,000 PHP+) via performance and viral hits.



Growth Track: Potential path into our AI Content Agency (Runway/Sora/Luma skills a plus) with a trajectory toward Head of Content leadership roles.



THE MISSION



I am looking for a partner to help scale a premium Kitchen brand. I don’t need a standard "cutter"; I need a Viral Engineer who understands that retention is a science, not a coi
. If you can engineer "un-swipeable" 1.5-second hooks and 70% retention rates, this role is for you.



Note: Proficiency in Runway, Sora, or Luma is a major plus and offers a potential growth path into our AI Content Agency for top performers.



YOUR ROLE



Full-Cycle Production: You source "High-Aura" stock footage, draft AI-assisted scripts, generate ElevenLabs voiceovers, and handle precision editing.



Marketing Pack Deliverables: For every video, you provide the SEO caption, hook-driven title, and metadata tags for TikTok, YT Shorts, and Snapchat.



Viral Physics Analysis (The Monday Audit): Every Monday before 12:00 PM CET, you review the "Viewed vs. Swiped Away" (VvS) metrics and retention data.



Dynamic Workflow Evolution: Our strategy is agile. You must be prepared to adjust hooks and pacing in real-time based on what the data tells us.



TECHNICAL AND ELITE REQUIREMENTS



To qualify for our performance incentives, you must master the "Big Three" workflow:



PRECISION EDITING: Expert use of speed ramps and keyframing to eliminate "dead air."



DYNAMIC AURA CAPTIONS: Synced motion text with color-pops that follow the rhythm of the voiceover.



ASMR SOUND LAYERING: Mandatory "Brain-Tingle" sound design (crisp kitchen clicks, sizzles, and tactile audio).



THE PAY: Base + Performance Upside



Rates as of April 2026. Paid via Wise. (1 NOK approx. 6.51 PHP)



GUARANTEED BASE RETAINER



2,500 NOK (approx. 16,275 PHP) per month for 10 elite assets.



THE PERFORMANCE UPSIDE (Potential to Double your Pay)



Retention Bonus: +50 NOK (approx. 325 PHP) per video that hits 70% Average View Duration at the 10-second mark.



VIRAL TIER BONUSES (Combined Platform Views)

Calculated based on combined TikTok, YT Shorts, and Snapchat views within 30 days.



Tier 1 (100,000+ Views): +200 NOK (approx. 1,302 PHP)



Tier 2 (500,000+ Views): +500 NOK (approx. 3,256 PHP)



Tier 3 (1,500,000+ Views): +1,000 NOK (approx. 6,512 PHP)



THE QUALITY STANDARD (Health Check):

To ensure we are building a high-authority brand, Viral Bonuses are triggered when a video hits the view milestone AND maintains healthy engagement (e.g., a strong ratio of Saves or Link Clicks).



3. LONG-TERM STABILITY AND CAREER PATH



3-Month Profit Bonus: A one-time 1,000 NOK (approx. 6,510 PHP) cash reward.



Salary Growth: A permanent 10% raise on your base retainer after 90 days of consistent, profitable performance.



Future Leadership: A potential path into our AI Content Agency for top performers.



PROFESSIONAL DISCLAIMER



All performance incentives and the Agency-Track expansion are discretionary rewards, not part of the base salary. They are non-contractual and adjusted based on video performance and business health.



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send long-form resumes.



Send a link to your PORTFOLIO OR exactly 3 videos you have edited that prove you understand "un-swipeable" 1.5-second hooks.



Include the word AURA at the top of your application so I know you have read the standards.



Briefly mention if you have experience with Runway, Sora, or Luma (Not required, but a plus).

title: Etsy Digital Products Manager (Info Products + Templates)

title: Claude AI Automation Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Claude AI Automation Engineer who can design and deploy advanced AI automation systems using the Claude ecosystem, including Claude agents, Claude Co-Work, MCPs, Claude Skills, and custom API integrations.



This role is ideal for someone who deeply understands the Claude AI ecosystem and can leverage it for automation, programming, AI agents, and intelligent workflow orchestration to turn our company agentic.



Please apply here or
 



Role Overview:

The Claude AI Automation Engineer will architect and implement AI-driven automation systems using Claude AI and related technologies. This individual will help transform manual workflows into intelligent systems that can reason, execute tasks, and continuously improve operations.



You will work closely with leadership, engineering, and operations teams to build scalable AI infrastructure that supports automation across departments.



Key Responsibilities

• Design and implement AI-powered automation workflows using Claude AI

• Develop AI agents capable of reasoning, decision-making, and task execution

• Build automation systems that connect internal tools, APIs, and databases

• Implement Claude Co-Work environments to enhance team productivity

• Develop scripts and applications that integrate Claude with internal systems

• Build agentic workflows that can monitor, analyze, and execute operational tasks

• Optimize Claude prompts, reasoning chains, and memory structures

• Integrate Claude with automation platforms and orchestration tools

• Create internal AI tools that assist with documentation, analysis, and operations

• Identify opportunities across the company where AI can eliminate manual work

• Build scalable frameworks for AI-driven operations

• Maintain security and governance standards when deploying AI systems



Required Skills & Qualifications:

• Deep experience working with Claude AI and the Anthropic ecosystem

• Strong understanding of AI agent architectures and autonomous workflows

• Experience building AI automation pipelines



Proficiency in programming languages such as:

• Python

• JavaScript / Node.js

• Experience with API integrations and automation platforms

• Knowledge of prompt engineering, reasoning chains, and agent memory models

• Experience building or deploying multi-agent AI systems

• Strong problem-solving and system architecture skills



Preferred Experience:

• Experience with AI workflow automation tools

• Familiarity with n8n, Zapier, Make, or custom automation frameworks

• Experience building AI copilots or AI operational assistants



Knowledge of cloud environments such as:

• Microsoft Azure

• AWS

• Google Cloud

• Experience integrating AI into business operations and internal systems

title: Claude AI Integration Engineer
description:
We are seeking an experienced AI Integration Engineer to lead the implementation, integration, and operationalization of Claude (Anthropic) and ClawdBot across our business operations.



This role is not experimental. It is execution-driven.



You will design, deploy, and optimize enterprise-grade AI workflows that integrate Claude and ClawdBot into real business systems, including CRM, ticketing, cybersecurity operations, marketing automation, compliance documentation, reporting, and internal knowledge management.



The objective is measurable business impact, not surface-level automation.



Key Responsibilities:

• Architect and deploy Claude-based AI workflows across departments

• Integrate ClawdBot into internal systems and external client-facing workflows

• Build secure API integrations between Claude and our CRM, PSA, ERP, and BI systems

• Develop prompt engineering frameworks aligned with compliance and governance requirements

• Implement AI guardrails, logging, and role-based access controls

• Design automation workflows using tools such as n8n, Zapier, Power Automate, or custom scripts

• Create executive dashboards for AI utilization and ROI measurement

• Ensure all AI deployments align with cybersecurity and regulatory standards



Required Experience:

• Hands-on experience integrating Claude (Anthropic API) in production environments

• Experience deploying chatbot frameworks such as ClawdBot or similar LLM-based agents

• Strong API integration experience (REST, JSON, webhooks)

• Experience with workflow automation platforms

• Familiarity with prompt engineering methodologies

• Knowledge of AI governance, model limitations, and risk controls

• Experience working with enterprise data systems



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience integrating AI into cybersecurity or compliance-driven environments

• Experience with Microsoft ecosystem tools (Power BI, Power Apps, Copilot)

• Knowledge of zero trust architecture principles

• Experience deploying AI in regulated industries (healthcare, finance, government)

• Python, Node.js, or similar scripting capability





Compensation:

• Competitive base salary

• Performance-based bonus tied to measurable AI impact

• Flexible engagement options (full-time, contract, hybrid)



Apply here and send resume to:
