title: Client Success Manager
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking

Client Success Manager

(1 full-time, remote position available)



Do you love helping people win?



If yes — we want to hear from you.



Who We AreYou are a highly driven, proactive, and detail-oriented team player who thrives on helping others succeed. You take ownership of client results, love systems and checklists, and are confident in communicating with people from all walks of life. You’re resourceful, solution-oriented, and constantly looking for ways to improve processes, client outcomes, and team performance.

We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency that specialises in helping speakers, coaches and service-based businesses build and scale million dollar offers through paid ads, funnels, and high-level mentorship.

We are seeking a Success Manager to support and manage our software clients (Funnel Creation Kit), mentorship students, and high-touch private clients — ensuring they receive world-class support, get results fast, and stay engaged throughout their journey with us.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



CLIENT SUCCESS & STRATEGY

Onboard new software users, mentees, and private clients with clarity and care

Track key client metrics, milestones, and progress

Proactively follow up with clients to prevent drop-off and unblock bottlenecks

Host check-in calls, onboarding sessions, or group accountability calls

Support coaching calls (e.g. note-taking, follow-up summaries, reminders)

Create and update success playbooks, SOPs, and client templates

Analyze client data and suggest improvements to boost retention and results

Track KPIs across all programs to ensure consistent client success





EVENT SOURCING & MANAGEMENT

Source venues and vendors for both local and overseas events

Negotiate event deals and manage budgets

Handle logistics, registration, and client communication pre- and post-event

Liaise with internal teams to ensure events are smooth, strategic, and impactful

Attend events when required to support clients and internal teams onsite





RELATIONSHIPS & COMMUNITY

Build strong relationships with clients—be their go-to person and biggest cheerleader

Engage clients inside our online communities and programs

Encourage accountability, progress sharing, and peer support





REQUIREMENTS:

Strong English speaking is a must, and English writing is preferred

Proven experience in success management, client support, or event coordination

Experience running or coordinating virtual and in-person events is a huge bonus

Comfortable managing multiple tasks and clients across different programs

Passionate about personal growth and working with a driven, motivated team

Excellent communication, follow-up, and organizational skills

Ability to think on your feet, solve problems, and lead with empathy

Familiarity with tools like GoHighLevel, Google Sheets, or Asana is a plus

Bonus: Experience working in the digital marketing, coaching, or SaaS space





If you are keen to work with our driven, collaborative and value-creating team, please complete the form below for consideration, and you will be notified once your application has been processed



https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdwTqRIWhSiywzg2-koglVy-dY8OqXrq8ELXq6_OI5l8q-tuA/viewform?usp=header

title: Website/Landing Page/Funnel Graphic Designer
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking

Website/Graphic Designer

(1 full-time, remote position available)



We are Singapore’s fastest-growing performance marketing agency helping speakers, coaches, and service-based businesses build and scale million-dollar offers through paid ads and sales systems.



We are looking for a high-performance Website / Funnel Graphic Designer who understands conversion-driven design, mobile-first layouts, and AI-powered design workflows.



This is not a typical graphic design role.



You will be responsible for creating designs that directly impact revenue, including landing pages, ad creatives, webinar slides, and funnel assets.



You will work closely with our media buyers, copywriters, and funnel builders to produce high-converting marketing assets.



?



Who This Role Is For



You are someone who:

 • Designs clean, modern, conversion-focused layouts

 • Understands how design affects marketing performance

 • Is obsessed with spacing, alignment, and visual hierarchy

 • Thinks mobile-first

 • Uses AI tools to speed up and improve design workflows

 • Can execute quickly without sacrificing quality



If you only design pretty graphics but do not understand marketing, this role will not be a good fit.



?



What You Will Be Designing



You will create graphics and layouts for:



•?  ?Landing pages and funnels

•?  ?Static ad creatives for paid ads

•?  ?Webinar and training slides

•?  ?Membership site assets

•?  ?Marketing posters and event materials

•?  ?Funnel sections and conversion elements



Your designs must be clean, persuasive, and optimized for conversion.



?



Core Responsibilities



Design high-converting landing page layouts using strong visual hierarchy.



Create high-performing ad creatives for paid advertising campaigns.



Design webinar and training slides that improve speaker credibility and student engagement.



Collaborate with copywriters and media buyers to translate messaging into visual layouts.



Ensure all landing pages are modern, clean, and mobile responsive.



Support A/B testing of visual elements to improve performance.



Apply UX and conversion best practices in all marketing designs.



Organize and maintain structured design systems and reusable templates.



Document repeatable processes into internal design SOPs.



Stay updated with design trends, AI tools, and marketing creative strategies.



?



Required Skills (Must Have)



Modern Conversion Design



You must understand:

 • Visual hierarchy

 • Conversion-focused layouts

 • CTA placement

 • Color psychology

 • Typography systems



Mobile-Responsive Design (Mandatory)



All designs must be mobile optimized.



You must understand:

 • Mobile spacing

 • Readable font sizes

 • Button tap areas

 • Layout stacking

 • Mobile-first UX



If you do not design mobile-first, this role will not be suitable.



?



AI Design Tools (Mandatory)



You must have experience using AI tools to accelerate design workflows, including tools such as:

 • Lovable

 • Nano Banana

 • Gemini

 • AI design assistants or generators



We expect designers to use AI as leverage, not replacement.



?



Tools



You must be comfortable working with:



•?  ?Figma

•?  ?Canva

•?  ?GoHighLevel (GHL)

•?  ?Photoshop or similar design tools



?



Experience Required



You must have experience designing for:



•?  ?Landing pages

•?  ?Marketing funnels

•?  ?Paid ads

•?  ?Webinar slides

•?  ?Marketing campaigns



Experience in performance marketing or funnel design is highly preferred.



?



Personal Traits



We are looking for someone who is:



•?  ?Highly detail-oriented

•?  ?Able to execute fast under deadlines

•?  ?Comfortable working remotely and independently

•?  ?Able to handle multiple projects simultaneously

•?  ?Always learning new tools, especially AI tools



?



This Role Is NOT For You If



•?  ?You only design social media graphics

•?  ?You don’t understand marketing funnels

•?  ?You struggle with mobile design

•?  ?You cannot work independently

•?  ?You avoid learning new tools



?



Application Process



To be considered for this role, applicants will go through:



1?? Portfolio review

2?? Timed design assignments

3?? Final interview



Only candidates who demonstrate speed, accuracy, and attention to detail will proceed.



?



Why Join Us



You will work alongside a high-performance marketing team building scalable businesses for experts and entrepreneurs.



You will gain exposure to:



•?  ?High-level funnel strategy

•?  ?Conversion optimization

•?  ?Paid advertising creative strategy

•?  ?AI-powered marketing workflows



If you are keen to work with our driven, collaborative and value-creating team, please complete the form below for consideration, and you will be notified once your application has been processed.

title: Media Buyer (Facebook/Meta, YouTube/Google Ads)
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking



Media Buyer (Direct Response | Performance-Focused)

Full-Time | Remote



About TRES



TRES is a Singapore-based performance marketing agency working with coaches, speakers, consultants, and education businesses across Asia. We specialise in direct-response campaigns — webinars, challenges, application funnels, and high-ticket offers — where real money is spent daily and performance matters.



We’re also part of a broader group that operates:

Play Bigger Mentoring (our education & mentoring brand)

Intellia (our proprietary GoHighLevel-based CRM & funnel platform)



All brands are owned and operated by the same team. This role sits fully within the TRES performance team.





Why This Role Is Different



This is not a branding or “boost post” role.



You’ll be working on:

- Real conversion campaigns

- Meaningful daily ad spend

- Funnels where decisions have real impact



You’ll follow proven SOPs — and you’ll also be trusted to make judgment calls when performance requires it.



If you want to grow fast by working close to real data, real money, and real decisions, this role will stretch you in the right way.





What You’ll Do



- Run and optimise conversion-focused paid ad campaigns (Meta primarily & YouTube next)

- Monitor campaign performance and flag issues early

- Own campaign health, not just execution

- Follow SOPs by default and make informed adjustments when needed

- Escalate performance issues and opportunities to the Ops Manager

- Participate in scheduled weekend monitoring for selected high-spend campaigns

- Join structured ad setup / implementation sessions for mentoring and Intellia launches (scheduled, SOP-led, execution-focused)



You’ll mainly receive all priorities and inputs from a single Ops Manager — no creative or stakeholder chaos.





What You Will NOT Be Responsible For

- Writing ad copy or designing creatives

- Redesigning funnels, offers, or pricing

- Handling client communication or account management

- Juggling multiple stakeholders or unclear priorities



Your focus is campaign performance and health, with clear boundaries and structure.





Who This Role Is For

This role is a good fit if you:

- Have hands-on experience running conversion ads (leads or sales)

- Are comfortable in performance-driven environments

- Stay calm, analytical, and accountable when things move fast

- Respect structure but don’t freeze when conditions change

- Communicate clearly and take ownership seriously



Who This Role Is NOT For

- “Set-and-forget” ad managers

- Freelancers juggling multiple clients

- People looking for a low-pressure, purely 9–5 role

- Anyone uncomfortable with responsibility tied to real spend





Compensation & Growth



At TRES, compensation is more than a monthly paycheck.



You’ll be operating in an ecosystem where:

- 6-figures are spent on paid ads monthly

- Multiple six figures are invested yearly into business, operations, education, health, and performance

- Decisions are made using real data, real risk, and real outcomes



What This Means for You

- Exposure to high-spend, direct-response campaigns

- Learn world-class media buying and direct response practices

- Grow beyond ads — into business thinking, systems, and personal performance

- Performance bonuses for strong execution and decision-making

- Opportunities to join yearly team retreats and overseas events held a few times a year



If you’re looking for comfort, this isn’t it.



If you’re looking to level up fast and grow properly, you’ll thrive here.



The questions are designed to understand how you think, not just what tools you’ve used.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Final Note

We’re not looking for button-pushers.

We’re looking for media buyers who:

Respect structure

Protect campaign performance

Take ownership seriously

If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.



How to Apply

Please complete the application form carefully.



Apply here:

title: Digital Marketing & Paid Ads Specialist - Australian Music Retailer
description:
About Us:

We're an established independent music retailer based in Melbourne, Australia, specializing in musical instruments, equipment, and accessories. With over 20,000 product listings and almost a hundred partner brands, we're entering a phase of significant e-commerce growth and looking for a talented marketing specialist to join our team and help us become Australia's leading independent music retailer online.



Important Note: This is an hourly-based role with a time tracking software for accountability and transparency - if you are not comfortable using time tracking software, please do not apply. Thank you.



The Role:

We're seeking an experienced Digital Marketing & Paid Ads Specialist to manage and scale our Google Ads, Meta campaigns, and overall digital marketing strategy. This is a critical role in our 2026 growth plan as we ramp up our e-commerce operations and expand our online presence.



Required Qualifications:

- 3+ years of proven experience managing paid advertising and media buying

- Strong track record with Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

- Experience with Google Merchant Center and product feed management

- Deep understanding of the Australian market

- Campaign setup, optimization, and performance tracking

- Data-driven approach with strong analytical skills

- Proactive, self-starter with strong initiative

- Excellent reporting and communication skills



Highly Valued Skills:

- Web development experience (especially Shopify) - BIG PLUS

- Graphic design capabilities

- TikTok Ads experience

- Music background or passion for musical instruments

- Experience with e-commerce platforms and conversion optimization

- SEO and content marketing knowledge



Role Details:

- Position Type: Full-time, Remote

- Working Hours: 8 hours/day, starting around 7:00 AM PHT (aligned with Australian business hours)

- Rate is negotiable depending on experience

- Start Date: ASAP



What We're Looking For:

Someone who takes ownership, thinks strategically, and can work independently to drive results. Given our large catalog and diverse brand portfolio, we need someone who can proactively suggest what marketing strategies to implement, what campaigns to scale, and what to start or stop doing. You'll be working closely with our e-commerce team to create campaigns that generate revenue, optimize our marketing funnel, and help us scale aggressively in 2026.



To Apply:

Please attach your CV link, portfolio link, and examples of campaigns you've managed (including results/metrics).



No agencies please - individual applicants only.

title: Part-Time Bookkeeper for US Small Business (QuickBooks Online)
description:
Hi, I'm Charlie. I own a custom closet and storage manufacturing company in Washington state. We do about $
K in annual revenue, S-Corp, 1-3 employees.



I'm looking for a part-time bookkeeper to take over my existing books and keep them running. This is not a cleanup or restoration project. My books are already clean and current in QBO. You'd be picking up where my previous bookkeeper left off.



This is not an entry-level position. I need someone who already knows what they're doing and can work independently from day one.



-What you'd be doing each month:



Bank reconciliation (6 accounts)

Transaction recording and categorization in QuickBooks Online

WA Department of Revenue excise tax filing (monthly sales tax + B&O)

Payroll coordination through Gusto (bi-weekly, 1-3 employees)

1099 filing and W9 management (7-10 vendors, annual)

Vendor invoice coding to correct expense categories

Receipt matching and attachment to QBO transactions

Loan and lease balance tracking

Monthly P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow statement

One 60-minute monthly call to walk me through the numbers



-What I already have set up:



QuickBooks Online (cash basis, fully reconciled)

Gusto for payroll

JobTread for project management and invoicing

Stripe for payment processing

Google Workspace for communication



What I'm looking for in a person:



Direct experience with QuickBooks Online for US-based businesses

Familiar with US state tax filings (Washington state DOR is a plus but not required)

Can explain financial reports in plain language, not just produce them

Responsive. I need someone who gets back to me within one business day

Self-directed. I don't want to manage you. I want you to manage the books and tell me what I need to know

No agencies. I'm hiring you directly.

Experience with construction, trades, or manufacturing businesses is a big plus but not required.



-What you're getting from this role:



Long-term, consistent work. I'm not looking for project work. I need someone for the long haul.

A growing company. As revenue grows, so does the scope and hours.

Direct relationship with the owner. No layers, no middlemen. You talk to me.

Clear expectations. I've documented everything you'd need to get started.

I won't micromanage you. I want you to own the books and tell me what I need to know.

Room to grow. There's an opportunity for this role to expand as the business scales.



-How to apply:



Do NOT use the built-in apply button. Instead, fill out this short form:





Start your form response with the word "CLOSET" so I know you actually read this posting. Applications without it won't be reviewed.



Thanks for reading the whole thing. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Sales Consultant (FT Remote)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.







----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Are you a driven sales professional who thrives on turning conversations into lasting client relationships and real business results?



At itGenius, we need a Sales Consultant who acts as the growth engine of our mission to "Help small businesses play a bigger game." Reporting to the Head of Sales, you are a trusted advisor who uncovers real business needs, crafts ingenious solutions, and builds the kind of trust that makes itGenius an essential part of every client's success.

itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 60+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.



Join our team of A-players—if you're one too, apply now!



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

? Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here's what you’ll get:



???? Competitive Compensation & Bonuses

December Bonus

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Reports To: Head of Sales



Job Overview:

As a Sales Consultant at itGenius, you'll be at the forefront of our mission to "Help small business play a bigger game," directly contributing to our vision of "facilitating happy, healthy, productive teams fuelling important global purpose-work." You embody the spirit of being the "Amazon Prime" of IT – highly responsive and providing solutions that are more convenient than Google or AI.

You'll operate like a member of a "high-performing sports team," demonstrating 10x thinking to achieve ambitious goals. As a "useful Geek," you'll leverage your love for technology to provide smart, human-centric solutions. This role is crucial in expanding our reach within the SMB market, acquiring new clients, and nurturing relationships that drive our growth towards becoming the global leader in remote-delivered IT services. You will be directly responsible for identifying opportunities, presenting our ingenious and seamless solutions, and ensuring our customers trust us to be an essential part of their success.





Core Accountabilities

The Sales Consultant will be held accountable for the following measurable objectives:

Individual Gross Profit Target Achievement: Consistently meet or exceed assigned quarterly and annual sales gross profit targets for new and existing clients

Sales Pipeline Health & Progression: Proactively manage and maintain a robust sales pipeline, ensuring a consistent flow of qualified leads and efficient progression of opportunities through all stages of the sales funnel.

Client Satisfaction & Smooth Onboarding: Ensure high levels of prospective client satisfaction throughout the sales process, culminating in a seamless and positive handover experience to the delivery and account management teams.





Key Responsibilities:

The day-to-day activities and duties of the Sales Consultant include:



Prospecting & Lead Qualification: Proactively identify, research, and qualify new sales opportunities within the small to medium business (SMB) market through various channels, including outbound prospecting, inbound lead follow-up, networking, and referrals.



Needs Assessment & Solution Design: Conduct in-depth needs assessments with prospective clients to thoroughly understand their business challenges, technology requirements, and strategic objectives.



Solution Presentation & Value Articulation: Develop and deliver compelling presentations and demonstrations of itGenius's tailored IT solutions and services, clearly articulating their value proposition, benefits, and return on investment.



Proposal Development & Negotiation: Prepare comprehensive and accurate sales proposals, quotes, and contracts. Lead negotiations to secure mutually beneficial agreements and close sales.



CRM Management & Reporting: Maintain accurate, up-to-date, and detailed records of all sales activities, client interactions, pipeline status, and forecasts within the Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system. Provide regular sales performance reports to the Head of Sales.



Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate closely with the technical, operations, and delivery teams to ensure proposed solutions are feasible, client expectations are managed effectively, and client onboarding is seamless.

Market & Product Knowledge: Continuously stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, emerging technologies, and itGenius's evolving product and service offerings to effectively position our solutions.



Post-Sales Handoff: Facilitate smooth and comprehensive handovers of new clients to the dedicated account management and service delivery teams, ensuring continuity and client satisfaction.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Required Qualifications:

- Experience: 2-3+ years B2B sales experience (ideally IT services or SaaS)

- Track record of meeting/exceeding GP targets

- Experience with CRM tools (Pipedrive, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

- Strong written and verbal communication

- Familiarity with Google Workspace / cloud IT would be a plus





Skills:

- Consultative/solution selling (needs assessment, value articulation)

- CRM pipeline management

- Proposal writing and negotiation

- Presentation and demo delivery

- SMB market awareness

- Basic IT/cloud technology literacy (enough to be a "useful Geek")

- Cross-functional collaboration



It would be nice if you have:

- Proven track record in Managed Service Provider (MSP) sales.

title: Associate Project Manager (Remote - Night shift)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.







----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Are you a process-driven IT graduate who takes pride in making complex tech transitions feel effortless for clients?



At itGenius, we need an Associate Project Manager who acts as the engine room behind our promise to deliver “Tech Done” seamlessly, every time. Reporting to the Head of Projects, you’ll manage end-to-end Google Workspace migrations, keep clients informed at every step, and build the kind of delivery experience that makes itGenius the most reliable partner a small business can have.



itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 40+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here's what you’ll get:



Competitive Compensation & Bonuses:

December Bonus

Performance Incentive Bonus

Regular Annual Salary Increases as you grow with us



Time Off That Matters:

Paid Leaves after regularization

Paid National/Local Holidays



Work & Life Experiences You’ll Remember:

Annual Team Conferences & Events – Travel, food and accommodations on us!



Investing in Your Growth:

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways



Support to Help You Thrive:

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Job Overview:

As an Associate Project Manager, you are the engine room of our “Tech Done” promise. You aren’t just managing tasks you’re building the pipes that allow our customers to scale. You’ll bridge the gap between complex technical migrations and the human experience, embodying our goal to be the “Amazon Prime of IT”: highly responsive and more convenient than anyone else in the market.



This is an entry-level role designed for a process-oriented IT graduate who loves order and efficiency. Reporting to the Head of Projects, you will manage end-to-end Google Workspace migrations and technical setups making every client transition seamless, frictionless, and world-class.





Core Accountabilities:

The Associate Project Manager is held accountable for the following objectives:



1. On-Time Delivery: Ensure all assigned projects (Migrations, DNS fixes, Blueprints) are completed within the agreed-upon SLA.

2. Data Integrity: Maintain 100% accuracy of project data within our CRM and PM tools, ensuring the “lake” of fish is correctly cataloged.

3. Process Adherence: Strictly follow itGenius SOPs to ensure every delivery is repeatable and scalable, minimizing custom “rain cloud” work.

4. Communication Excellence: Proactively manage customer expectations so they feel “Trusted” and supported throughout their journey.



Key Responsibilities:



Project Coordination and Delivery

- Daily Coordination: Execute scheduling, prerequisite chasing, milestone tracking, and closure logistics.

- Record Maintenance: Keep tasks, due dates, statuses, and time logs in Asana current and reliable at all times.

- Senior Support: Assist Senior PMs on complex projects by owning specific workstreams or administrative functions.

- Project Kickoffs: Run structured kickoffs for smaller projects following the established itGenius SOP.

- Risk Management: Track progress against scope and flag blockers immediately with a proposed path forward.



Client Communication

- Primary Contact: Act as the face of itGenius for clients on all assigned projects from kickoff to closure.

- Regular Updates: Send proactive status updates every one to two days to ensure clients never have to ask for status.

- Expectation Setting: Clearly define timelines, deliverables, and communication cadence at kickoff.

- Issue Triage: Handle basic concerns directly and escalate complex issues with full context to your supervising PM.



Documentation and Systems

- Knowledge Base: Update internal knowledge base articles and SOPs, particularly for AI-assisted workflows.

- Time Tracking: Log all billable hours accurately every day to inform project profitability metrics.

- Runbook Development: Document repeatable tasks to ensure knowledge is reusable and not reliant on individuals.

- Health Monitoring: Use the Asana dashboard to flag project risks to the team and supervising PM.



Technical Support and Triage

- Technical Troubleshooting: Leverage your background to troubleshoot basic Google Workspace issues before escalating.

- GWS Coordination: Own backend tasks like DNS checks, user provisioning verification, and migration readiness assessments.

- Feasibility Reviews: Conduct basic DNS and domain checks using tools like MX Toolbox as part of pre-kickoff reviews.



Required Qualifications:

Education & Experience

- Education: Bachelor’s degree in IT or Business preferred, or equivalent technical/communication experience.

- Experience: Minimum two years in IT support or technical customer service in a client-facing environment.



Skills & Bonus

- Core Skills: Professional communication, deep process orientation, and basic understanding of DNS and SaaS platforms.

- Bonus (preferred but not required): Experience with Google Workspace Admin, Asana, or managed services scoping.

Attitude

Hungry, proactive, and driven to make complex things feel simple for clients. You take feedback well and ask “how do we do this better?”.





Work Schedule

8-hour shift

Night shift

Monday to Friday

Weekends off

Observance of Philippine holiday

Permanent Work Form Home





You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Inner Life Awakening Pty Ltd (trading as Inna Segal | Visionary Intuitive Healing) Work from Home | Full Time
description:
About the Business



Inner Life Awakening Pty Ltd is the company behind internationally recognised healer, bestselling author, and speaker Inna Segal. Operating under the trading name Inna Segal | Visionary Intuitive Healing, the business delivers healing education programmes to students across Australia, the UK, Europe, and beyond.



Flagship programmes include the 10 Day Awaken The Healer Within Live Workshop, the 8 Week Heal Yourself Challenge, and a growing suite of self-paced online courses and live events. The business operates primarily in AUD but also transacts in GBP, EUR, and USD.



The Role



We are looking for an experienced, self-sufficient bookkeeper to take ownership of the day to day financial administration for the business. You will work closely with our Operations Manager and report directly to him. This is a fully remote, full time role based on Philippine business hours.



The right person takes pride in clean, accurate records, communicates clearly and promptly, and does not wait to be told when something looks wrong.



Key Responsibilities



Day to day data entry across our Notion-based relational finance system, including recording sales, payments, and credits accurately and to the correct standards.



Bank reconciliation across multiple accounts (Westpac and NAB).



Payment gateway reconciliation across Stripe, eWay, and PayPal.



Instalment and payment plan tracking, ensuring each individual payment transaction is recorded correctly against the relevant sale.



Contractor commission tracking and payment processing.



Loan repayment recording and reconciliation.



Preparation and lodgement of Australian Business Activity Statements (BAS) in compliance with ATO requirements.



GST reporting and general Australian tax compliance support.



International payments processing via Wise.



Accounts query support, including looking up customer records, sales histories, and payment records when requested.



Preparation of financial summaries and reports as directed.



Data integrity checks and validation, flagging discrepancies before they cause downstream problems.



What We Are Looking For



Essential requirements:



Proven bookkeeping experience, ideally in an Australian business context. Hands-on experience with Xero, including reconciliation, accounts management, and reporting. Experience preparing and lodging Australian BAS returns and a solid understanding of GST. Experience using Wise for international payments. Proficiency in Notion, or the ability to learn our specific Notion-based finance system quickly. Strong Excel skills. Clear, professional written and verbal communication in English. Ability to work independently and manage your own workload without close supervision. High attention to detail and a methodical approach to data entry. Reliable internet connection and your own equipment suitable for remote work.



Highly regarded:



Experience working with businesses that operate payment plans or instalment-based revenue. Familiarity with multi-currency transactions (AUD, GBP, EUR, USD). Experience with Stripe, eWay, or PayPal reconciliation.

Working Arrangements



Fully remote, work from home. Full time, 40 hours per week. Hours: 8am to 5pm Philippine time, Monday to Friday, with a 1 hour unpaid lunch break. You must provide your own equipment.



How to Apply



Please send your CV and a brief cover note. In your cover note, please outline your bookkeeping experience, the Xero and BAS work you have done, and confirm you are available to work the hours listed above.

title: Head of Business Development – US Healthcare Recruiting / Direct Hire
description:
We are hiring a Head of Business Development to build and lead client acquisition for our US recruiting firm.



This is a high-ownership leadership role for someone with strong direct hire / permanent placement sales experience in US healthcare recruiting. You will be responsible for building outbound strategy, running discovery calls, closing new client agreements, and managing a small business development team.



About Us



Talent Staffing & Recruiting (TSR) is a US-based direct placement recruiting agency specializing in healthcare clinical leadership, behavioral health, allied health, and specialty imaging.



We work on a 25% direct hire fee model with a 60-day guarantee and operate as an AI-first recruiting company using tools such as Apollo, Clay, Instantly, Manatal, and Claude



What You’ll Do



- Build outbound campaigns targeting US hospitals, behavioral health groups, and healthcare networks

- Run discovery calls with healthcare executives including VPs of HR, COOs, CMOs, and CHROs

- Negotiate and close direct hire fee agreements

- Hire, manage, and develop your BD support team

- Own pipeline performance, team execution, and monthly reporting to the CEO

- Help build an AI-augmented business development engine that scales



What We’re Looking For



- 6 to 10 years of experience in US healthcare BD, executive search, or direct placement sales

- Proven track record of personally closing permanent placement / direct hire agreements

- Experience generating and closing recruiting fee revenue you built yourself

- Strong discovery call and negotiation skills with US healthcare buyers

- 2+ years of team management experience

- Hands-on familiarity with Apollo, Clay, Instantly, Manatal, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Claude, or ChatGPT

- Excellent business English, written and spoken

- Comfortable working permanent night shift



To Apply



Please include:



- Your experience in US healthcare recruiting BD or permanent placement sales

- The types of fee agreements you have personally closed

- Your biggest business development wins

- Your people management experience

- Why you are a strong fit for this role

title: Service Delivery Manager (Remote)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.







----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



We’re looking for a Service Delivery Manager to lead our growing service delivery team.





If you’re great at managing people, keeping projects on track, and making sure customers get an amazing experience this role is for you.



We’re seeking a visionary Service Delivery Manager to join our Executive Team and own the end-to-end delivery of IT services for our customers.



itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 40+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.





Join our team of A-players—if you’re one too, apply now!



? Why You’ll Love Working With Us



We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here’s what you’ll get:



???? Competitive Compensation & Bonuses

December Bonus 

Performance Incentive Bonus

????? Time Off That Matters

Paid Leaves after regularization

???? Work & Life Experiences You’ll Remember

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways



???? Support to Help You Thrive

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Job Overview:



The Service Delivery Manager is the senior operational leader accountable for the end-to-end Service Delivery System – delivery, quality, and profitability – of itGenius’s client facing Managed Services IT. 



The role owns service excellence across all aspects of customer service delivery including helpdesk, technical delivery, project management and any other team that delivers customer facing value. 



It requires an executive who demonstrates extreme ownership, resourcefulness, initiative and proactivity – spotting service gaps, risks and system improvements then taking action on them within delegated authority.  





Core Accountabilities:

The Service Delivery Manager is held accountable for the following specific, measurable accountabilities, delegated from the CEO’s Exceptional Customer Value and Organizational Effectiveness accountabilities:



- Exceptional Service Delivery and Customer Satisfaction: Ensure the consistent delivery of high-quality, responsive IT services that result in outstanding customer value, satisfaction, loyalty, and advocacy.



- Operational Efficiency and Scalability of Service: Optimize service delivery processes, systems, and team structures to achieve maximum operational efficiency and enable scalable growth across all service offerings.



- Service Innovation and AI Integration: Drive the strategic integration of AI and automation into service delivery workflows to enhance productivity, reduce errors, and improve the customer experience.



- Service Team Performance and Development: Build, lead, and develop a high-performing global service delivery team that consistently meets performance targets and embodies the company’s values.





Key Responsibilities:



1. Ownership of Service Delivery

Hold end-to-end accountability for the performance of service delivery across all functions: Service Desk, Escalations, MSP, and Projects.

Continuously improve, drive initiatives and self-source tasks from customer data, tickets, trends, and team behaviour. Do not operate as a task-taker – you are a task maker.

Take extreme ownership. It’s its customer facing, its your problem. Own the outcome and coordinate the fix.

Be the senior point of escalation for any service issue that risks client churn, SLA breach, or reputation damage, and close the loop personally.

Attend and actively contribute to the leaders standups, retrospectives and executive meetings. Present findings & insights, not status updates.

Own a quarterly systems improvement programme to constantly drive service excellence.



2. QA, Proactive Risk Management and Client Retention

Own the relationship between CSAT, NPS, FCR, SLA adherence, and client retention.

Run an independent quality assurance function across all aspects of customer service. Right people, right process, right tools, clear reporting.

Proactively address customer churn risk through regular spot checks, ‘walking the floor’ and searching for ‘smoke’ – finding risks before them become issues – harnessing our advanced tech platforms and AI tools to give you a deep level of insight while connecting with the humans to get the real story.

Take personal accountability for top accounts. Build relationships and keep your eye on them.

Build a direct, unmediated sense of the customer journey so you can pin point where problem might occur and work to solve them.

Prioritise customer relationships but never loose sight of the data. Stay in constant touch with shifts in customer satisfaction, sentiment, ticket volumes and team capacity.

Conduct and document monthly service reviews & executive level reporting.



3. Escalations and Critical I
 Management

Own the Escalations system end to end. No escalation left behind, stale checks run weekly, and responses coordinated across Service Desk, Projects, and MSP.

Own critical i
, such as major customer complaints or churn events. See them through to conclusion, ensuring the learnings, performance notes & systems level improvements are discovered and actioned.

Ensure every escalation is reviewed after resolution for systemic improvement, not just closed.

Ensure clean, completed data on customer complaints for analysis. Data driven decision making to identify systems gaps & improvements.



4. System Fluency and Operational Discipline

Fervently adopt, own & promote use of our technology stack, including use of AI, operational system of record & ticketing platforms.

Hold the team accountable to tool use & excellent data integrity.

Keep your queues clean – inbox zero policy.

Establish automation (workflow and AI) where there’s a demonstrable ROI. Don’t exclude humans from the loop. We are AI first, but humans have the final say.

Own continuous improvement of internal process documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base entries.





5. Team Leadership and Collaboration

Lead, mentor, and develop Team Leaders across Service Desk, Escalations, and MSP. Build above-the-line behaviour, clear agreements, and collaborative problem-solving.

Cover the full span of service functions. Do not over-index on any single team.

Work with the Head of People, Culture and Operations to run structured performance conversations, including private feedback where required.

Partner with the Head of Growth to ensure seamless onboarding, service activation, and ongoing customer lifecycle value.

Partner with Finance to ensure service profitability and accurate billing tied to service delivery data.

Partner with the Head of People, Culture and Operations on staffing stability, role clarity, and team development.

Surface strategic insights, customer feedback themes, and service trend data to the Executive team with recommendations, not just observations.



Required Qualifications:

Executive Leadership and Operations

- 5+ years in a senior service delivery, operations, or Managed Services leadership role with direct accountability for client retention and service KPIs.

- Minimum 3+ years in Managed Services Provider (MSP) leadership or service delivery management, preferably with a recognised service framework such as ITIL.

- Proven track record of owning end-to-end service delivery at executive level, including multi-pod or multi-function oversight.

- Demonstrated experience designing and scaling service delivery processes in a remote-first or globally distributed team.

- Experience running quality assurance and spot-check programs, not just reporting dashboards.

- Hands-on system fluency with work management platform, ticketing systems such and documentation tools.

- Experience integrating AI and automation into support workflows is strongly preferred.

- Experience supporting small business clients (1 to 30 employees) preferred.

- Project Management: Demonstrated success managing multiple IT projects and service improvement initiatives. PMP certification preferred.



Technical Expertise

- Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field.

- 10+ years in IT service delivery or technical support.

- Advanced certifications highly regarded: Microsoft Certified Azure Administrator or Engineer, Google Workspace Administrator, CCNP, or CompTIA Security+.

- Solid understanding of compliance frameworks, IT security practices, and i
 response processes.

- Demonstrated success in resolving complex, escalated technical issues across diverse environments with minimal supervision.

- Strong diagnostic, root cause analysis, and performance tuning skills to ensure reliability and scalability of IT systems.

- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms and services (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS), including migrations, hybrid integrations, and identity management are nice to have but not required.



Delegated Authority to Spend

- Annually budgeted spend for service delivery tools, training, and team incentives.

- All other expenses require CEO approval.

 



Work Schedule

Full-time, 8-hour shift, Monday to Friday, weekends off.

Shift timing aligned to Australian business hours where client coverage requires.

Public holiday observance per the candidate’s country of engagement (Philippines, South Africa, or Malaysia)





You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Job Overview:



The Service Delivery Manager is the senior operational leader accountable for the end-to-end Service Delivery System – delivery, quality, and profitability – of itGenius’s client facing Managed Services IT. 



The role owns service excellence across all aspects of customer service delivery including helpdesk, technical delivery, project management and any other team that delivers customer facing value. 



It requires an executive who demonstrates extreme ownership, resourcefulness, initiative and proactivity – spotting service gaps, risks and system improvements then taking action on them within delegated authority.  





Core Accountabilities:

The Service Delivery Manager is held accountable for the following specific, measurable accountabilities, delegated from the CEO’s Exceptional Customer Value and Organizational Effectiveness accountabilities:



- Exceptional Service Delivery and Customer Satisfaction: Ensure the consistent delivery of high-quality, responsive IT services that result in outstanding customer value, satisfaction, loyalty, and advocacy.



- Operational Efficiency and Scalability of Service: Optimize service delivery processes, systems, and team structures to achieve maximum operational efficiency and enable scalable growth across all service offerings.



- Service Innovation and AI Integration: Drive the strategic integration of AI and automation into service delivery workflows to enhance productivity, reduce errors, and improve the customer experience.



- Service Team Performance and Development: Build, lead, and develop a high-performing global service delivery team that consistently meets performance targets and embodies the company’s values.





Key Responsibilities:



1. Ownership of Service Delivery

Hold end-to-end accountability for the performance of service delivery across all functions: Service Desk, Escalations, MSP, and Projects.

Continuously improve, drive initiatives and self-source tasks from customer data, tickets, trends, and team behaviour. Do not operate as a task-taker – you are a task maker.

Take extreme ownership. It’s its customer facing, its your problem. Own the outcome and coordinate the fix.

Be the senior point of escalation for any service issue that risks client churn, SLA breach, or reputation damage, and close the loop personally.

Attend and actively contribute to the leaders standups, retrospectives and executive meetings. Present findings & insights, not status updates.

Own a quarterly systems improvement programme to constantly drive service excellence.



2. QA, Proactive Risk Management and Client Retention

Own the relationship between CSAT, NPS, FCR, SLA adherence, and client retention.

Run an independent quality assurance function across all aspects of customer service. Right people, right process, right tools, clear reporting.

Proactively address customer churn risk through regular spot checks, ‘walking the floor’ and searching for ‘smoke’ – finding risks before them become issues – harnessing our advanced tech platforms and AI tools to give you a deep level of insight while connecting with the humans to get the real story.

Take personal accountability for top accounts. Build relationships and keep your eye on them.

Build a direct, unmediated sense of the customer journey so you can pin point where problem might occur and work to solve them.

Prioritise customer relationships but never loose sight of the data. Stay in constant touch with shifts in customer satisfaction, sentiment, ticket volumes and team capacity.

Conduct and document monthly service reviews & executive level reporting.



3. Escalations and Critical I
 Management

Own the Escalations system end to end. No escalation left behind, stale checks run weekly, and responses coordinated across Service Desk, Projects, and MSP.

Own critical i
, such as major customer complaints or churn events. See them through to conclusion, ensuring the learnings, performance notes & systems level improvements are discovered and actioned.

Ensure every escalation is reviewed after resolution for systemic improvement, not just closed.

Ensure clean, completed data on customer complaints for analysis. Data driven decision making to identify systems gaps & improvements.



4. System Fluency and Operational Discipline

Fervently adopt, own & promote use of our technology stack, including use of AI, operational system of record & ticketing platforms.

Hold the team accountable to tool use & excellent data integrity.

Keep your queues clean – inbox zero policy.

Establish automation (workflow and AI) where there’s a demonstrable ROI. Don’t exclude humans from the loop. We are AI first, but humans have the final say.

Own continuous improvement of internal process documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base entries.





5. Team Leadership and Collaboration

Lead, mentor, and develop Team Leaders across Service Desk, Escalations, and MSP. Build above-the-line behaviour, clear agreements, and collaborative problem-solving.

Cover the full span of service functions. Do not over-index on any single team.

Work with the Head of People, Culture and Operations to run structured performance conversations, including private feedback where required.

Partner with the Head of Growth to ensure seamless onboarding, service activation, and ongoing customer lifecycle value.

Partner with Finance to ensure service profitability and accurate billing tied to service delivery data.

Partner with the Head of People, Culture and Operations on staffing stability, role clarity, and team development.

Surface strategic insights, customer feedback themes, and service trend data to the Executive team with recommendations, not just observations.



Required Qualifications:

Executive Leadership and Operations

- 5+ years in a senior service delivery, operations, or Managed Services leadership role with direct accountability for client retention and service KPIs.

- Minimum 3+ years in Managed Services Provider (MSP) leadership or service delivery management, preferably with a recognised service framework such as ITIL.

- Proven track record of owning end-to-end service delivery at executive level, including multi-pod or multi-function oversight.

- Demonstrated experience designing and scaling service delivery processes in a remote-first or globally distributed team.

- Experience running quality assurance and spot-check programs, not just reporting dashboards.

- Hands-on system fluency with work management platform, ticketing systems such and documentation tools.

- Experience integrating AI and automation into support workflows is strongly preferred.

- Experience supporting small business clients (1 to 30 employees) preferred.

- Project Management: Demonstrated success managing multiple IT projects and service improvement initiatives. PMP certification preferred.



Technical Expertise

- Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field.

- 10+ years in IT service delivery or technical support.

- Advanced certifications highly regarded: Microsoft Certified Azure Administrator or Engineer, Google Workspace Administrator, CCNP, or CompTIA Security+.

- Solid understanding of compliance frameworks, IT security practices, and i
 response processes.

- Demonstrated success in resolving complex, escalated technical issues across diverse environments with minimal supervision.

- Strong diagnostic, root cause analysis, and performance tuning skills to ensure reliability and scalability of IT systems.

- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms and services (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS), including migrations, hybrid integrations, and identity management are nice to have but not required.



Delegated Authority to Spend

- Annually budgeted spend for service delivery tools, training, and team incentives.

- All other expenses require CEO approval.

 



Work Schedule

Full-time, 8-hour shift, Monday to Friday, weekends off.

Shift timing aligned to Australian business hours where client coverage requires.

Public holiday observance per the candidate’s country of engagement (Philippines, South Africa, or Malaysia)





You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Space Planner / Designer (CET-Focused)

title: Experienced GHL Specialist – Build Scalable Systems & Automations
description:
Milkyway Is Hiring



Are you the systems-driven GHL Specialist we’re looking for?



Are you highly organised, technically confident in GoHighLevel, and obsessed with building systems that actually work—not just look good on the surface?



Do you enjoy designing clean automations, optimising customer journeys, and turning messy processes into scalable systems?

If you’re someone who can combine structured thinking, technical execution, and smart use of AI to improve performance—not just speed—this could be the role for you.



About Milkyway

Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and performance marketing.

Behind every high-performing campaign is a well-built system—and that’s where you come in.

We’re growing quickly and are now looking for a dedicated GHL (GoHighLevel) Specialist to join our team.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal person takes ownership of systems, thinks beyond tasks, and builds automation that supports real business outcomes—not just technical completion.



You are:

• Highly experienced with GoHighLevel (GHL). (Do not apply if you are a beginner.)  

• Confident building workflows, automations, funnels, campaigns, and dashboards end-to-end.  

• Strong in mapping and improving customer journeys across marketing and sales pipelines.  

• Exceptionally organised and detail-oriented.  

• Comfortable troubleshooting system, automation, and data issues independently.  

• Process-driven with strong logical thinking.  

• Proactive in identifying inefficiencies and improving systems before issues arise.  

• Calm under pressure and solutions-focused.  

• A clear communicator who can explain systems in simple, practical terms.  

• Accountable, reliable, and consistent in execution.  

• A fast learner who stays up to date with GHL updates and best practices.  

• At least 2 years of experience working in an agency environment.



AI + SYSTEMS CAPABILITY

We’re looking for someone who understands both traditional system building and modern AI-powered workflows.

You should:

• Be able to design and build systems without relying on AI.  

• Know how to use AI tools inside and outside GHL to enhance workflows, speed, and insights.  

• Have experience working with GHL AI features (including AI agents and voice agents).  

• Be able to refine, structure, and validate AI outputs—not just deploy them.  

• Understand where AI improves efficiency—and where manual logic and control are still required.  

If you rely on AI without understanding the underlying system logic, this role is not a fit.



ABOUT THE ROLE

The GHL Specialist reports directly to the CEO and works closely with the wider team across marketing, sales, and client delivery. You will:

• Build, manage, and optimise CRM systems inside GoHighLevel.  

• Create and maintain workflows, triggers, and automations.  

• Build and manage SMS and
 campaigns.  

• Create and optimise funnels and landing pages within GHL.  

• Manage integrations between GHL and third-party tools.  

• Monitor system performance and proactively troubleshoot issues.  

• Maintain clean pipelines, accurate contact data, and reporting dashboards.  

• Build and optimise GHL AI agents and voice agents.  

• Support onboarding of new clients into structured GHL systems.  

• Document processes and ensure systems are scalable and repeatable.  

• Create and maintain snapshots based on validated systems and workflows.  



WORK SETUP

This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone working within or close to Australian business hours.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be an integral part of a growing agency—not just complete tasks, but help build the systems behind our growth.

It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET

A supportive, growth-focused environment where your systems expertise makes a real impact.



• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear ownership over systems and automation  

• Structured onboarding and training aligned with our standards  

• Opportunities to deepen your expertise in automation and CRM strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of client accounts and use cases  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  

We believe strong systems are the foundation of sustainable growth—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



Send an
 to apply and Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application so we know you’ve read this in full.  

Add a link to your portfolio and resume. Make sure to include 3 professional references in your resume. 



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.

We look forward to meeting the GHL Specialist who will help power the systems behind our growth.

title: Content Specialist -Help Scale Brands Through High-Impact Content
description:

Are you a strong writer who can turn ideas into clear, compelling content that actually performs and not just reads well? Do you enjoy blending strategy, data, and creativity to drive real business results?



If you take pride in your craft, think beyond just writing, and know how to use both traditional content skills and modern AI tools to produce better outcomes, this could be the role for you.



About Milkyway

Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and digital marketing. We work closely with our clients to bring clarity to their messaging and consistency to how they show up online.



We’re growing quickly and are now looking for a Content Specialist to join our team.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal person wants to grow with us, take ownership of content quality, and elevate how our clients communicate.

You are:

• A confident writer with strong attention to detail and structure.  

• Comfortable creating content across websites, social media,
 marketing, SEO, and ads.  

• Strategic—you understand that content exists to drive outcomes, not just fill space.  

• Organised and able to manage content calendars and deadlines independently.

AI + Content Capability

• Knows how to use AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT or similar on a professional set-up) to enhance speed, research, ideation, and optimisation—not replace thinking.

If you rely entirely on AI to write for you, this role is not a fit. If you know how to leverage AI as a tool while maintaining quality and originality, you’ll thrive here.



ABOUT THE ROLE

The Content Specialist reports directly to the CEO and works closely with the wider team to support marketing and growth initiatives you will:

• Collaborate with designers, web developers, and marketing specialists.  



WORK SETUP

This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone who can work within or close to Australian business hours.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a growing agency and contribute meaningfully to client success. It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET

A supportive, growth-focused environment where your writing and ideas genuinely matter.

• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear systems and processes to support high-quality work  

• Training and onboarding to help you succeed in the role  

• Opportunities to develop your skills across content, SEO, and strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of industries and content types  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  

We believe great content drives great outcomes—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application so we know you’ve read this in full.  

Add a link to your portfolio and resume. Make sure to include 3 professional references in your resume. 



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.

We look forward to meeting the Content Specialist who will help take our clients’ messaging and performance to the next level.

title: Real Estate Acquisitions VA – Inbound Leads
description:
About Us

Executive Business Ventures LLC is a nationwide real estate wholesaling and acquisitions company based in Southern California. We work with motivated sellers across the United States to provide fast, hassle-free cash offers on residential properties. We use a combination of wholesale and novation strategies to close deals and are rapidly growing our acquisitions pipeline.

We are looking for a driven, experienced, and professional real estate cold caller to join our team and help us lock up more deals every month.



The Role

Your primary job is simple: call inbound leads, qualify sellers, build rapport, and lock up deals by getting purchase agreements signed. You will be working with warm inbound leads — these are sellers who have already expressed interest in a cash offer for their property. This is NOT cold calling from scratch. The leads come to us every month and your job is to convert them.

You will follow a proven acquisitions script and process that has been developed and tested by successful wholesalers. Full training will be provided.



Daily Responsibilities

• Call and follow up with inbound motivated seller leads daily during US business hours

• Qualify sellers using our proven acquisitions script

• Build genuine rapport and uncover seller motivation, timeline, and pricing expectations

• Handle seller objections confidently and professionally

• Log all call activity, notes, and lead status updates in (GoHighLevel)

• Send and walk sellers through purchase agreements via PandaDoc

• Conduct basic property research using Zillow, Redfin, and other comp tools

• Communicate updates and deal status to team leadership daily

• Follow up with leads multiple times across a 21-30 day nurture cycle

• Meet daily KPIs for dials, talk time, and pipeline movement



Requirements

Non-Negotiable:

• Minimum 1 year of real estate cold calling or acquisitions experience (US market)

• Must be available to work 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM Pacific Time, Monday–Friday

• Fluent English — clear, confident, and natural on the phone

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and quiet work environment

• Own computer/laptop and headset

• Strong objection handling skills

• Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision



Preferred (Bonus Points):

• Prior experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) or related CRM

• Familiarity with wholesale and/or novation real estate strategies

• Experience using Zillow, Redfin, or PropStream for comp research

• Experience walking sellers through contracts over the phone

• Prior experience with NEPQ or similar consultative selling frameworks



What We Provide

• Warm inbound leads every month — no cold list dialing required

• Proven acquisitions scripts (multiple versions to choose from and personalize)

• All legal contracts and documents needed to lock up deals

• Full onboarding and script training

• Access to CRM (GoHighLevel) for lead management and call logging

• 1-on-1 weekly check-in calls with leadership

• Performance bonuses for every deal locked up

• A real opportunity to grow with a fast-moving acquisitions business



Daily KPIs & Expectations

Minimum Dials 50–80 per day

Talk Time 2–3 hours per day

Lead Logging 100% of calls logged in CRM with notes

Follow-Up 6–8 touches per lead over 21–30 days

Response Time New leads called within 5 minutes of assignment

Reporting Daily summary message to team lead at end of shift



Compensation

Base Pay: $400–$500 USD/month (based on experience)



Performance Bonus: Additional bonus paid for every deal locked up and successfully closed. Details discussed during interview.



Pay Schedule: Bi-weekly via Wise, PayPal, or your preferred payment method.



Salary reviews available after 60 days based on performance.



How to Apply

To be considered for this position, you MUST complete all of the following steps. Applications missing any step will not be reviewed.



1. Send your application to our team with the subject line: "Real Estate Cold Caller VA – [Your Name]"

2. Include a brief introduction about yourself and your real estate cold calling experience

3. Attach or link a voice recording (60–90 seconds) introducing yourself and explaining why you are the right fit for this role. This is required — no exceptions.

4. Confirm in your application that you are available 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM Pacific Time, Monday–Friday

5. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a live role play call where you will be asked to run through our acquisitions script with us as the seller. This is how we evaluate communication skills and phone presence.

title: Appointment Setter - Real Estate
description:
NOW HIRING: APPOINTMENT SETTER

Remote / Virtual

Full-Time

GoHighLevel Required   |   English Fluency Required   |   EST Hours Preferred



WHO WE ARE

The company is an AI consulting and business growth firm dedicated to helping real estate professionals, entrepreneurs, and small business owners harness the power of artificial intelligence to attract more clients, convert more leads, and operate at a higher level.

We work with clients across real estate, mortgage, coaching, and professional services, delivering done-with-you consulting, AI tool integration, automation workflows, and training programs through our proprietary three-system framework: Attract. Convert. Operate.



THE ROLE



As our Appointment Setter, you will be the first voice — or first message — that a prospect encounters. Your primary mission is to convert inbound and follow-up leads into qualified discovery calls and deals.

This is a fully remote position designed for a communicative, tech-savvy professional who takes pride in follow-through and thrives in a structured, fast-paced environment.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

Lead Outreach & Communication

• Follow up with all inbound leads via phone, text, and
 — targeting a 5-minute response time during business hours.

• Conduct outbound follow-up calls to warm prospects who have expressed interest in our services.

• Send personalized, professional follow-up
s and texts using approved templates.

• Maintain consistent multi-touch follow-up sequences for leads that don’t respond on first contact.



Appointment Setting & Scheduling

• Book qualified lead for discovery calls/appointment.

• Confirm appointments 24 hours in advance via text and/or
.

• Re-engage and reschedule any cancelled or no-show appointments promptly.

• Track all appointments and outcomes accurately in the CRM and report every lead during huddles.



CRM & GoHighLevel (GHL) Management

• Log all lead interactions, notes, and status updates in GoHighLevel (GHL) in real time.

• Move leads through the correct pipeline stages in GHL based on current activity and status.

• Trigger and manage automated follow-up workflows within GHL as directed.

• Tag and segment leads accurately to ensure clean reporting and team visibility.

• Use GHL’s two-way SMS,
, and call features as your primary communication hub.



Reporting & Team Communication

• Submit daily or weekly activity reports covering calls made,
s sent, and appointments booked.

• Share lead feedback and objections with the team lead to sharpen messaging and follow-up strategies.

• Attend team check-ins and training sessions as scheduled.



Required

• Fluent English speaker with excellent verbal and written communication skills.

• Strong professional
 writing ability — able to craft clear, warm, and compelling messages independently.

• Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM — pipelines, automation workflows, and communication tools.

• Comfortable making outbound calls and handling objections professionally and confidently.

• Highly organized with strong time management and consistent follow-through habits.

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home office setup.

• Available during core business hours (EST preferred).



Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Prior experience in appointment setting, real estate, or a related industry.

• Experience in an ISA (Inside Sales Agent) or SDR (Sales Development Representative) role.

• Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs/Sheets).

• Quick to adapt to new tools, scripts, and evolving processes.



WHAT WE OFFER

• Fully remote

• Competitive pay structure: base pay + possible incentives based on deals closed.

• Access to proven scripts, AI-powered tools, training resources, and ongoing team support.

• A mission-driven culture led by a veteran with a strong commitment to excellence and growth.



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please submit the following:

• Your updated resume highlighting relevant experience.

• A brief cover letter and voice recording describing why you’re the right fit for this role.



Qualified candidates will be contacted to schedule a brief screening call.

title: Virtual Receptionist - Permanent Role!
description:
**First - Why Join Mi PA?**

At Mi PA, our Virtual Receptionists are a core part of our company, not just external support. Most of our virtual team have been with us for years, and we invest in long-term relationships because we know that when you grow, we grow!

• The same holidays and length-of-service benefits as our UK team.

• Annual pay reviews as a minimum - your hard work will always be recognised.

• Opportunities for career development within a growing company.

• A dynamic, fast-paced role working with a variety of global clients.

• A friendly, supportive team that values and respects its Virtual Receptionists.



**About Mi PA**

Mi PA is a leading UK-based virtual personal assistant and call answering service. Our Mi Call team ensures our clients never miss an important call, delivering seamless customer support. We’re looking for a Virtual Receptionists to join our dynamic team, supporting our clients with content creation, social media management, and general administrative tasks.



**What You’ll Be Doing**

This is a fast-paced, customer-focused role. You’ll be the first point of contact for our clients’ callers and a trusted part of our Mi Call team. Tasks include:

• Answering Calls: Handle incoming calls from various clients with professionalism, courtesy, and a friendly demeanour.

• Message Management: Log and document call messages accurately and promptly, ensuring attention to detail and clarity.

• Customer Service Queries: Manage customer service queries, following processes and resolving issues where possible.

• Wow Customer Experience: Go the extra mile to exceed client expectations with every interaction.

• Process Adherence: Follow established processes for escalations and information handling.



This is a fast-paced role. If you are organised, detail-oriented, and love the process of getting things done, you’ll thrive here.



**What We’re Looking For**

• Excellent spoken English

• Excellent written English

• Great phone manner and customer service

• Detail-oriented – you double-check your work, especially if its sensitive information

• Flexible to work 40 hours per week over 5 days, scheduled within UK working hours (7am–9pm)

• Open to weekend shifts as part of a flexible working schedule.

• Reliable, high-speed internet is a must!

• Candidates should have access to a computer with Microsoft Windows installed!



**Your First Test Starts Now – Here’s How to Apply**

We don’t want an AI-only generated cover letter. If your application reads like you simply asked ChatGPT to “sound professional,” you won’t make it through the first filter. Instead, please apply with the following 3 things:



1) A link to a piece of work you’re proud of (can be related to customer service, admin, or communication).

2) A Loom video (2 minutes max) explaining what makes you a great Virtual Receptionist.

3) Answer this: “What’s the most tedious admin or customer service task you’ve had to do — and how did you make it easier or faster?”



If you use ChatGPT or other tools intelligently to save time and improve your workflow, that’s great — tell us how!



If you’re ready to be the friendly, professional voice our clients trust, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today and let’s see if we’re a great fit :)

Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT

Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.

WHO YOU ARE

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines
