MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: Copywriter & Creative Strategist
description:
Overview

We are seeking a "pioneer"—a proactive, high-energy Copywriter & Creative Strategist to join an experimental, high-conviction project for 2026. This is not a traditional retainer-based role; it is a pure commission-based affiliate model designed to empower our creators and scale our brands through organic social lift. 

In this role, you will act as the "owner" of your own AI-driven Instagram presence, providing the creative vision and briefs while our elite internal production studio handles the AI generation for you—free of charge.



Work Structure & Compensation

Type: Part-time / Commission-based (Affiliate).

Compensation: 10%–50% commission per sale (e.g., a 50% commission is $50 on a $100 product).

Transparency: Commission rates are tiered and will change over time as the project scales.

Growth Opportunity: The highest-performing candidates will be fast-tracked into full-time retainer roles with the company.

Work Requirement: You may have a concurrent full-time job; however, all candidates must sign an NDA



Key Responsibilities

Creative Briefing: Develop winning formats such as AI-driven podcasts, TED talks, or street interviews to sell products to a health-conscious 45+ demographic.

Production Partnership: Brief our internal AI production studio to create high-fidelity, realistic B-roll and AI-influencer content.

Account Management: Run and grow your own Instagram accounts dedicated to promoting the brand.

Performance Testing: Experiment with different formats and AI personas to find the highest-converting proof of concept.

Scaling Strategy: Identify "winner" content and whitelist these assets with our paid ads to "put gasoline on the fire" and scale results.

Strategic Iteration: Use organic performance data to refine hooks, calls-to-action (CTAs), and storytelling strategies. 



Required Skills & Experience

Direct Response Copywriting: Proven ability to write clear, compelling, and high-converting scripts and briefs focused on driving immediate action.

Strategic Thinking: Deep understanding of marketing fundamentals and consumer psychology (e.g., Eugene Schwartz’s Breakthrough Advertising) to create "thumb-stopping" social media content.

AI Awareness: Comfortable working within AI-driven workflows; if not currently comfortable, you must be highly willing to learn and adapt quickly.

Market Knowledge: Understanding of the "TikTok Shop" model and how to apply it to
 and Instagram.

Mindset: A true team player who is communicative, proactive, and maintains a "team-first" attitude while operating with a pioneer spirit.



Why Join Us?

Resource Support: We will work to provide as many resources as possible to ensure your success, including free access to our world-class production studio.

Faceless Commission: A unique, faceless way to earn significant commissions by running your own AI influencer pages.

Direct Impact: We operate on a "real relationship" basis—we don’t make money unless you make money.



To Apply

Please submit your portfolio or examples of previous creative strategies. Include a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are the right person to pioneer this AI-affiliate model.

title: Video Editor for Roofing Ads — CapCut, ElevenLabs & Submagic (Long-Term Role)
description:
**About Us:**

We're Bookbase, a marketing agency that creates short-form video ads for roofing companies across the US. We have a proven, step-by-step system that produces winning ads in 15–20 minutes each. We're looking for a reliable video editor to join our team long-term and help us scale.



**What You'll Do:**

You'll create 7 video ads per client following our exact process. We provide everything you need: scripts, B-roll footage, ad examples, and a full walkthrough document. Your daily workflow will be:



1. Take our pre-written scripts and generate voiceovers using ElevenLabs (we'll show you which voice settings to use)

2. Pull B-roll from our Google Drive (or source new clips from TikTok using SnapTik when needed) and match the footage to the client's location

3. Edit in CapCut — remove silent gaps in the voiceover, sync B-roll cuts (max 4 seconds per clip), set 9:16 aspect ratio, and export at 1080p / 30fps

4. Run the video through Submagic to add captions and AI auto-zooms

5. Add upbeat, positive background music at ~20% volume

6. Export the final video and deliver it to us



**Who We're Looking For:**

- Fluent English (written and spoken) — clear communication is essential

- Hands-on experience with CapCut, ElevenLabs, and Submagic

- Strong attention to detail — you actually follow steps instead of skipping them

- Reliable communicator who responds promptly during work hours

- Hard-working and consistent — we need someone we can count on every day

- Experience editing short-form ads (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts) is a big plus



**What We Offer:**

- Long-term, stable position with consistent weekly volume

- Clear process — no guesswork, just follow our walkthrough

- All tools and resources provided (scripts, B-roll library, ad examples)

- Direct communication with the owner

- Room to grow as we scale our agency



**To Apply, Please Include:**

1. Start your message with the word "ROOFING" so I know you read the full post

2. 2–3 examples of short-form video ads you've edited (links to portfolio or samples)

3. Confirm you have experience with CapCut, ElevenLabs, and Submagic

4. Your hourly rate or per-video rate

5. Your weekly availability (hours and time zone)

6. A short note on why you'd be a good fit



**Hours:** Flexible, but consistent availability needed

**Pay:** Negotiable based on experience

**Type:** Long-term, ongoing work



Looking forward to building a long-term partnership with the right editor. Apply today!

title: Creative Marketing Architect
description:
About Us

The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission: helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role

We are seeking a high-level Creative Marketing Architect to own the visual and written soul of our brand. You are responsible for total brand dominance. This role goes beyond social media management; you will architect our front-end aesthetic, manage our backend systems, and create original, scroll-stopping content that establishes Lisa Barry as the preeminent voice in the industry.



Key Responsibilities

1. Short-Form Content & Audience Growth

Original Production: Create high-impact Reels, TikToks, and Shorts from scratch. Research trends, develop unique hooks, and execute flawless transitions.

Viral Exposure: Execute the strategy to reach 50,000 – 100,000 followers through elite short-form content and engagement.

Community Connection: Engage daily to build deep relationships using Lisa’s authentic voice.



2. Systems, Funnels & Operations

GHL Mastery: Build, manage, and optimize landing pages and sales funnels within GoHighLevel. Ensure every funnel is visually stunning, premium, and functional.

Workflow Operations: Maintain and update our ClickUp workspace. You are responsible for keeping projects on track, managing task statuses, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Asset Design: Create high-converting lead magnets, PDF guides, and pitch decks that look like 7-figure products.



3. High-Authority Copywriting & Creative Direction

The Written Voice: Ghostwrite the weekly Substack, the "Wednesday Drop" Newsletter, and all social captions. Capture Lisa’s voice perfectly to inspire action.

Innovation: Stay ahead of marketing trends to keep the brand fun, innovative, and visually elite.



4. AI Collaboration (The Claude Requirement)

Claude Power User: You must use Claude as your primary co-working partner for writing, strategy, coding assistance for GHL, and metrics analysis.

Co-Pilot Mentality: You aren't just copy-pasting; you are coaching the AI to "Lisa-fy" every piece of content to ensure it is never generic.



Who You Are

An Owner: You don’t wait for a task list. You see gaps and fill them with brilliance.

System-Oriented: You enjoy the "backend" tech (GHL/ClickUp) as much as the "front end" creative.

Design-Obsessed: If it isn’t world-class, it doesn’t get published.

High-Performance: You thrive in fast-paced environments and take pride in hitting growth targets.



Qualifications & Skills

Technical Stack: Deep proficiency in GoHighLevel (GHL) and ClickUp.

AI Mastery: Expert-level ability to use Claude for high-speed, high-quality output.

Design/Video: Expert in Short-Form Video Editing (CapCut) and Visual Design (Canva/Photoshop).

Experience: 2–3+ years working for high-ticket coaches or agencies.

Communication: Flawless English with a talent for voice matching.



How to Apply

To ensure you are a high-level collaborator and not just "copy-pasting" with AI, we require:

Your Portfolio: Links to original Short-Form Video (Reels/TikTok) and marketing designs.

The "Loom" Intro: A 2-minute video introducing yourself. Tell us about one time you used Claude to solve a complex problem or speed up a project.

DISC Profile: Please include your DISC assessment results (PDF or screenshot).

Subject Line: Please use the subject line: "[Your Name] | Creative Marketing Architect"



Note: Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid trial.



Work Arrangement & Compensation

Location: Remote (Based in the Philippines)



Hours: 9am – 5pm AEDT (Full-Time)



Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month + performance-based growth opportunities.

Monitor account health and ensure compliance with eBay policies

Price monitoring and repricing using AutoDS tools

Manage returns, cancellations, and customer messages

Identify scaling opportunities and improve profit margins

Monitor competitors and marketplace trends

Resolve issues related to defects, late shipments, or supplier errors



Requirements

Proven experience managing an eBay dropshipping store

Strong hands-on experience with AutoDS (required)

Solid understanding of eBay policies and performance metrics

Experience with product research tools and sourcing products

Ability to manage multiple listings and SKUs efficiently

Strong attention to detail and problem?solving skills

Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently



Preferred (Nice to Have)

description:

[Role Overview]

Apply basic color correction and audio balancing

Optimize videos for high retention and engagement



[Graphic Design]

Design visuals aligned with brand identity

Support content team with simple visual assets when needed



[What We’re Looking For]

English Expert

Experience in video editing for social media (portfolio required)

Understanding of viral-style / high-retention content

Ability to add engaging captions and visual elements

Basic graphic design skills (Canva / Photoshop or similar)

Fast turnaround (48hrs or less) and ability to meet deadlines

Have high interest in startup business related topics

Strong attention to detail



[Bonus (Good to Have)]

Experience editing for ads (performance marketing)

Familiarity with platforms like CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or After Effects

Understanding of investing / finance niche

Ability to suggest creative improvements (not just execute)

Competent in leveraging AI



[How to Apply]

Please include:

Portfolio of past work (especially short-form videos)

Examples of content you’ve edited (Reels/TikTok preferred)



We are looking for someone who doesn’t just edit, but understands what makes content perform. If you enjoy testing ideas and improving content performance, we’d love to hear from you. If you have read the entire job description and want to apply, please start your application with the word UNICORN, so that I know you have read the entire application post.

title: Ecom AI Performance Video Editor
description:
We are 7 Figure is looking for a D2C Supplement Brand Video Editor looking to join our team! As our video editing specialist, you will be responsible for editing high-converting UGC ads, direct response video creatives,VSL’s and psychology-based video content to be used across paid marketing channels (primarily Meta).



We are looking to hire someone with 1.5+ years of ecommerce work experience. The ideal candidate has prior experience editing paid advertisements specifically for Meta Platforms, UGC content,VSL’s direct response marketing & bonus points if experience with supplement/health brands.



Key Objectives:



-Edit 1-15 high-converting video ads per week from raw UGC footage and stock content

-Transform raw creator footage into polished, direct response ads optimized for Meta platforms

-Drive measurable improvements in core advertising metrics (CTR, Hook Rate, Hold Rate) through superior editing

-Create multiple variations and iterations of winning ad concepts quickly

-Use data from creative performance on Meta to analyze what editing techniques, hooks, and structures are driving results

-Work with our creative strategist to bring scripts and concepts to life through compelling editing

-Maintain organized asset libraries and editing workflows for maximum efficiency

-Provide quick turnaround times on revisions and new edits to support rapid testing cycles



Requirements:



-Fully remote

-Fluent in English

-Direct Response Editing Expertise: 1.5+ Years experience editing performance creative for DTC brands or working at a creative agency is a must

-Software Proficiency: Expert-level skills in Adobe Premiere Pro or After Effects or CapCut, Heygen, Veo 3, Higgfield is a must and familiarity with DaVinci Resolve. Mobile editing experience (CapCut mobile) is a plus

-UGC Editing: Extensive experience editing raw UGC footage into high-converting paid ads with native platform aesthetics

-Fast & Efficient: Ability to produce high-quality edits quickly without sacrificing performance. Speed is critical

-Creative & Data-Driven: Understanding of what makes ads perform (hooks, pacing, captions, sound design, effects) and ability to analyze performance data to inform editing decisions

-Portfolio Required: Must provide portfolio showcasing DTC video ads (preferably supplements, health, or e-commerce)

-No issue working overtime or on the weekends if needed. You wouldn't know what to do with your free time if you were working less. You are passionate about your work

-Excellent cultural fit as per our values above

-Are excited to play a big role in scaling the company and work closely with the founders

-Understanding of direct response principles and how editing impacts conversion

-Include word "banana" in your application to prove your legit



Accountabilities:



-Edit 10-20 video ads per week from provided scripts, raw footage, and assets

-Create multiple variations of winning ads (different hooks, text overlays, pacing)

-Add compelling captions, text overlays, sound effects, and visual effects that enhance performance

-Maintain consistent turnaround times (24-48 hours for standard edits, same-day for urgent)

-Organize and manage all video assets, footage libraries, and project files

-Collaborate with creative strategist to understand video concepts and execute the vision

Source and integrate b-roll, stock footage, and motion graphics as needed

-Adapt editing style to emerging trends and platform best practices

-Review performance data on edited ads and identify patterns in what's working

-Iterate quickly on underperforming ads and create new versions based on data insights

-Create editing templates and systems to increase output efficiency

-Maintain brand consistency across all video content while optimizing for performance



How Our Hiring Works & How We Operate:



When hiring, we'll work with you to define the KPIs you'll be responsible for and set targets. This removes ambiguity around wondering if you're doing a good job after you start.



Initial soft interview, then a technical interview + test project (edit 2-3 ads from provided footage), and a final interview to ensure culture fit. We plan to hire within ~8 - 10 days of conducting these interviews. We pride ourselves on timely responses and updates for applicants.



For this specific role, we will walk you through the long-term vision and opportunities that have us excited about this business - and how you fit in. We will show you our current structure and where we are headed!

title: Data Analyst, Returns and Credits
description:
We are looking for a highly technical and analytical Data Analyst to own the data integrity of our returns and credits department. Your primary goal is ensuring that our refunds and credits are reported accurately, formatted correctly, and tracked meticulously. 

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Data Integrity & Auditing: Monitor the full lifecycle of refunds and credits to ensure all data is updated, formatted correctly, and reported without errors. 

• SLA Tracking & Analysis: Build and maintain tracking systems for vendor performance to identify which refunds, credits, and returns are on time versus pending. 

• Reporting & Insights: Generate daily reports that identify backlogs and discrepancies for the operational teams to address. 

• Scripting & Automation: Utilize scripts (Python, VBA, or AI-generated code) to clean messy data, run complex audits, and automate manual reporting processes. 

• Financial Reconciliation: Work with accounting values to ensure that internal system data matches the financial reality of bank and credit memos. 

________________________________________

The Ideal Candidate

• Analytical & Technical: You spend 95% of your time in the data and are an expert in Excel. 

• Detail-Obsessed: You spot formatting errors and missing values immediately. 

• Resourceful: You know how to use tools, including AI, to write the scripts or formulas needed to get the job done efficiently. 

• Comfortable with Large Datasets: You are proficient in using scripts to manipulate and clean significant volumes of information. 

________________________________________

Requirements

• Excel Proficiency: High-level mastery of complex formulas, PivotTables, and VBA/Macros. 

• Scripting/Automation: Experience using Python, SQL, or similar tools to process data. 

• AI Literacy: While you do not need to be a developer, you must be comfortable using AI to create scripts and understand how to run them. 

• Financial Data Background: Experience working with accounting values, financial data, or inventory reconciliation. 

• Organization: Proven ability to organize data workflows and track Service Level Agreements (SLAs). 

________________________________________

***IMPORTANT***

Please send in your CV or a link to a shared file with the necessary access granted. Note: Applications submitted without a CV will be ignored.

title: Outbound Sales Representative (Work From Home)
description:
About Us



We’re a high-energy team driven by big goals and real results. We’re looking for motivated individuals who are ready to take ownership of their careers, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and turn effort into measurable success. If you’re ambitious, driven, and enjoy seeing your hard work pay off, this could be the right opportunity for you.



About the Role



As an Outbound Sales Representative, you will engage potential customers through outbound cold calls, introducing them to our premium products and services. Your role is to understand each customer’s needs, explain how our solutions can add value, and guide them toward the right fit.



This position is about real conversations, active listening, and building trust—whether you’re connecting with a new prospect or following up with an existing lead.



What You’ll Be Doing



Learning and mastering our premium products and services



Conducting outbound cold calls and follow-ups with confidence and professionalism



Creating positive, lasting impressions with every interaction



Representing the company as a reliable and trustworthy brand ambassador



Building genuine relationships with customers



Consistently meeting and exceeding sales targets with the support of our training and team



What We’re Looking For



Strong Communication Skills: Clear, confident, and persuasive



Positive Attitude & Professionalism: Friendly, approachable, and polished



People-Oriented: Naturally builds rapport and trust



Quick Thinker: Able to adapt, problem-solve, and stay calm under pressure



Organized & Goal-Driven: Excellent time management and self-discipline



Results-Motivated: You are driven by performance-based earnings and career growth



Requirements:



Personal PC or laptop



Professional headset



Stable, reliable internet connection



Why Join Us?



Work From Home: Fully remote position—save time and commuting costs while working comfortably from home



Career Growth: We promote from within and are looking for future leaders and team managers



Attractive Compensation: Uncapped commissions, performance bonuses, and incentives for top performers



Training & Mentorship: Ongoing support to help you succeed and grow



Positive Team Culture: Supportive environment that celebrates wins and values collaboration



To Be Considered for an Interview



Please submit a voice recording introducing yourself and answering the following:



Why should you be considered for this position?



What experience do you have with cold calling or outbound sales?



Do you have any background in the telecommunications industry?



If you’re ready to challenge yourself, grow quickly, and be part of an exciting, results-driven team, we’d love to hear from you.

Apply now and our HR team will be in touch shortly.

title: Medical Intake Closer (Warm Leads) - US Market
description:
We are hiring a confident and professional Medical Intake Closer to speak with warm inbound leads from the United States. These are not cold leads. Prospects have already contacted us or requested information.

Your primary responsibility is to convert qualified leads into paying clients through phone, SMS, and follow-up communication. You must be comfortable discussing medical histories, treatment timelines, records, and case details at a high level while building trust and guiding prospects to the next step.

This role is ideal for someone with a background in nursing, healthcare, medical administration, patient intake, insurance, or phone sales.



Core Responsibilities

Call new warm leads quickly after inquiry

Build trust and professionally guide prospects through the intake process

Ask qualifying questions regarding conditions, records, service history, timelines, and goals

Explain our service clearly and confidently

Handle common objections and concerns

Close qualified leads into payment or booked consultations

Follow up consistently by phone, text, and

Update CRM with detailed notes and next actions

Coordinate document collection when needed

Meet weekly targets for closes and conversions



Requirements

Strong spoken and written English

Confident phone presence with clear communication

Proven closing, intake, sales, or appointment-setting experience

Comfortable asking for payment and closing deals

Organized, responsive, and reliable

Stable internet and quiet work environment

Comfortable working US Eastern Time hours

Strongly Preferred

Nurse, medical assistant, healthcare admin, insurance, legal intake, or case management background

Experience speaking with US customers

Experience handling sensitive or emotional conversations

CRM experience



Compensation

Base hourly pay

Performance bonuses for closes, booked calls, and revenue generated

Long-term growth opportunity for top performers



To Apply, Send: 

Resume

Voice recording introducing yourself

Summary of your phone sales or intake experience

Internet speed screenshot

Why you would succeed in a closing role

title: Executive Assistant
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a highly organized and dependable Executive Assistant to support leadership with daily coordination, scheduling, documentation, and operations support.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, takes ownership of their work, and wants long-term stability and growth. You’ll play a key role in keeping communication clear, tasks on track, and processes efficient.



What You’ll Be Doing



Managing calendars, meetings, inboxes, and follow-ups

Creating and maintaining SOPs, checklists, and workflows

Supporting HR and onboarding tasks (new hire setup, forms, documentation)

Preparing basic presentations, reports, and documents using Google Workspace

Coordinating with different tea
mbers to track tasks and deadlines

Identifying inefficiencies and proactively suggesting improvements



Requirements (Important)



Please apply only if you meet most of the following:



Excellent written and spoken English

Strong attention to detail and time management

Able to work independently with minimal supervision

Comfortable using Google Workspace and Microsoft Office Suite

Experience with ClickUp, Notion, or similar tools

Able to write clear internal instructions, SOPs, or training guides

Nice to Have (Not Required):

Canva (basic designs or presentations)

Light bookkeeping experience (tracking expenses, simple reports)



Who This Role Is For



You are:

Reliable, proactive, and organized

Comfortable following up and keeping tasks accountable

Calm under pressure and able to manage multiple priorities

Looking for a long-term role, not a short-term or side gig

You have a “see it–fix it” mindset and enjoy helping teams run smoothly.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary

Consistent work hours and long-term stability

Supportive, growth-focused environment

Performance bonuses for initiative and leadership



Before You Apply



Please complete this application form before proceeding:


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd6EP7-Cp_93vKnvVUdMIX-mYA_oSZWhXAKbihPAo71sGh_pQ/viewform?usp=header



Once you have submitted the form, please send a confirmation message here on OnlineJobs.ph.

Only applicants who complete both steps will be considered.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US



- About Young Publisher: 



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Client Success Coach (Coaching and Feedback) – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.

- Proactively follow up with clients to keep them on track and help them take action



Important Note: This role requires regular proactive follow-up with clients. If you're not comfortable with this, please consider carefully before applying - it's a core part of the position.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Lead Manager/ Appointment Setter
description:
Lead Manager/ Appointment Setter



---



Compensation:



Commission Earnings (Uncapped):

-Average 150,000 Pesos (Average) – 500,000+ Pesos per month (Not Uncommon)

-Average deal frequency 2-3x a month

-NO CAP ON COMMISSIONS; earnings are entirely performance-driven and Million Peso Commissions are highly possible

-These are opener commissions (not closing commissions)



Base Salary:

-35,000 Pesos – 60,000 Pesos per month (Based on experience)



All new hires begin at 35,000 Pesos for a 30-day trial period. After the first month, those who demonstrate strong work ethic and proficiency are typically increased to 40,000–60,000 Pesos, where they remain indefinitely.



This is not a difficult threshold that only the top 1% can obtain. Tea
mbers who stay consistent, maintain solid talk time, and generate regular transfers routinely reach the higher end of this range. The role rewards effort and consistency, not perfection.



This structure is designed to fairly align pay with performance. It is not used to withhold compensation, and Filipino tea
mbers are not taken advantage of under this system.



Commission structures remain unchanged.



Commission Structure:

1% commission on qualified transfers that close



Payout Schedule:

Base salary and commissions are paid bi-weekly



---



Role Overview:

The Outreach Team / Junior Executive is responsible for engaging with inbound leads who have already expressed interest in learning about the company’s services



This is not a closing role. However, candidates with closing experience are strongly considered and often perform well in this position



Primary responsibilities include

- Qualifying the lead

- Building rapport

- Guiding the prospect toward a conversation with a Senior Executive



The focus is on facilitating the transfer, not selling the product



---



Workflow:

- Reach out to inbound leads who have opted in

- Qualify interest and basic eligibility

- Build trust and maintain engagement

- Transfer the call to a Senior Executive

- If a live transfer is not possible, the minimum requirement is to schedule an appointment

- Document clear, concise, condensed but meaningful notes

- Properly disposition the lead within the CRM system



---



Performance Metrics:

Work until either

- Completion of the scheduled shift of 11:00 PM – 8:00 AM Manila Time or

- Accumulation of 5 and a half hours of total talk time whichever occurs first



Systems are in place to ensure that talk time tracking cannot be manipulated



Talk time includes

- Your direct conversation time with the lead

- Plus the Senior Executive’s talk time after transfer



Example

You speak with a lead for 5 minutes

You transfer the lead to a Senior Executive

The Senior Executive speaks with that lead for 1 hour

Equals total credited talk time = 1 hour and 5 minutes



This means your efficiency in qualifying and transferring strong conversations directly impacts how quickly you reach your daily requirement



Performance evaluation prioritizes results over strict metric adherence



---



Location:

Remote (may transition to hybrid in the future)



---



Schedule:

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time USA or 11:00 PM – 8:00 AM Manila Time

Monday through Friday Pacific Time USA or Tuesday to Saturday Manila Time



---



Company Overview:

AYOS Industries is a proven, established and long-term partner with an American based gold company that assists individuals in diversifying their retirement accounts into secure physical assets



It is not the responsibility of the Junior Executive to sell the service in any capacity. The role is strictly focused on qualifying leads and transferring qualified prospects to a Senior Executive



The company is led by an American-Filipino owner, and the operational standard is simple performance determines value not location



For overseas Filipino professionals, a common concern is being deprioritized, underpaid, or treated as expendable compared to US-based employees. That is not how this company operates. Filipino tea
mbers are held to the same standards and compensated based on performance, not geography



Based on internal benchmarking and market research across US-based remote sales roles in the Philippines, this position is structured to outperform typical compensation and treatment standards of Filipino workers in the current market. The expectation is high performance and in return, compensation, opportunity, and working conditions are designed to exceed what most candidates are currently experiencing



---



Requirements:

- Fluent English accent must be close to indistinguishable from an American accent

- Proven history in high-performance sales environments closing opening or sales leadership

- Strong command of American communication style and culture

- Demonstrated ability to control conversations build trust and drive outcomes

- No college education required performance-based experience is the priority



---



Candidate Profile:

- Experienced closers sales managers or highly seasoned openers

- Track record of being a top performer or operating in high-accountability sales teams

- Comfortable operating at a high level and maintaining performance standards

- Strong ability to guide conversations toward a clear next step transfer or appointment



---



Training:

Structured onboarding program provided

Includes video tutorials guided materials and a reference training document for ongoing use

Structured all-encompassing Compliance Guide

Estimated completion time 2 to 2.5 hours plus additional personal research as role progresses



---



Additional Information:

The job is extremely straightforward but requires consistency hard work ethic and discipline

Client demographics vary with a significant portion consisting of senior citizens

Success is dependent on communication precision and efficiency in lead handling



---



Summary:

This position is structured for experienced sales professionals seeking a performance-based role with substantial earning potential. The responsibilities are focused on qualification and transfer supported by a clear system and defined workflow

```

title: Meta Ads Assistant Part-time
description:
Facebook Ads Assistant (Part-time, Remote)



About Us

We're a small, fully remote team that values flexibility, ownership, and doing good work. There are no fixed hours — you d
 when and how to get things done. What matters is results, accountability, and being a reliable teammate.



The Role

We're looking for a part-time
 Ads Assistant to support our campaigns. You don't need to be an expert — just reliable, curious, and genuinely eager to learn. This is a task-based role: we'll agree on deliverables together, and you'll handle them in your own way and time.



What You'll Do

- Set up and monitor
 Ads campaigns in Ads Manager

- Research competitor ads using Meta Ads Library and share useful insights

- Prepare and maintain reports in Google Sheets (CTR, CPC, ROAS, conversions)

- Collect and organize ad creatives, headlines, and copy ideas

What We're Looking For

- Good written and spoken English

- Comfortable with
 Ads Manager (or a fast learner)

- Proficient in Google Sheets / Excel

- Reliable, accountable, and detail-oriented

- VA or marketing experience is a plus, but not required



Culture & Perks

- Fully remote — work from anywhere

- No fixed hours — deliver on your own schedule

- Fridays are dedicated to learning and growth time

- Unlimited time off (just give us advance notice)

- Choose your pay schedule — weekly or monthly

Compensation

$200/month fixed, based on tasks and deliverables — not hours worked. Opportunity to grow into more responsibility and higher pay over time.



How to Apply

Shortlisted candidates will be sent a short task (30–45 min) before any interview. To apply, send us:

- A brief intro about yourself and your background

- Any experience with
 Ads, VA work, or digital marketing

title: Medical Billing & Coding Virtual Assistant (Nephrology)
description:
Position Overview:

I own a nephrology practice in the US. We are seeking a detail-oriented Remote Medical Billing and Coding Virtual Assistant to support a U.S.-based outpatient nephrology practice. The role assists with medical coding, claims submission, payment posting, and denial follow-up while maintaining compliance with Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act regulations.



Key Responsibilities:

    •    Assign appropriate ICD-10-CM, **Current Procedural Terminology (CPT), and **Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) codes

    •    Submit and track insurance claims

    •    Post payments and review Explanation of Benefits or electronic remittances

    •    Follow up on denied or unpaid claims

    •    Review documentation for billing accuracy

    •    Support billing for outpatient nephrology and dialysis services



Qualifications:

    •    Experience with U.S. medical billing and coding

    •    Knowledge of Medicare and commercial insurance billing

    •    Familiarity with EHR and practice management systems

    •    Understanding of HIPAA compliance



Work Setup:

    •    Fully remote position

    •    Reliable internet and secure workspace required

    •    Ability to work during U.S. business hours or partial overlap

title: Build Traffic. Drive Sales. Scale Brands.  Experienced Growth Marketing Manager Needed
description:
About Us

Prodigy Media is a multi-brand eCommerce company established in 2013, operating primarily on Amazon with a growing push into owned traffic and direct-to-consumer channels.

We manage multiple brands across beauty, personal care, and lifestyle categories. Our focus is simple: build products that convert, scale them aggressively, and turn them into real brands — not just listings.

After more than a decade in the game, we’re now at a turning point.

Amazon remains a core channel, but we’re actively building systems to drive external traffic, own customer relationships, and reduce platform dependency.

This role is critical to that shift.



Overview

We’re not looking for someone who’s “interested” in marketing.

We’re looking for someone who has already done it — and can do it again at scale.

This role owns one thing: building external traffic engines that convert into real revenue — both on Shopify and Amazon.

You will be responsible for driving qualified traffic, converting it through landing pages, and building owned audiences 
, SMS, communities) that we can leverage long-term.

If you’ve never built a system that consistently generates traffic ? converts ? and feeds Amazon ranking/reviews — this isn’t for you.



What You’ll Own

1. External Traffic Engine (Core Priority)

Build and scale traffic systems outside of Amazon

Drive traffic through:

TikTok (organic + creator content)

Instagram


Influencer networks

Convert traffic through high-performing landing pages (Shopify or custom funnels)

Feed qualified buyers into Amazon to improve ranking, velocity, and reviews

2. Influencer & Community Ecosystem

Build and manage a network of influencers and creators

Turn creators into long-term brand partners, not one-off posts

Develop a loyal user base / community that actively engages with and promotes our products

Launch and manage UGC systems at scale

3. Paid Traffic & Performance Marketing

Own and scale
/Instagram Ads (Meta PPC)

Understand full funnel:

Cold traffic ? landing page ? conversion ? retargeting ?
/SMS

Continuously test and optimize creatives, audiences, and funnels

Track CAC, ROAS, LTV — and make decisions based on data

4. Funnel Building & Conversion Optimization

Build and optimize landing pages (Shopify or funnel builders)

Improve conversion rates through:

Offer positioning

Page structure

Copy

Visual flow

Work closely with design + copy teams to execute high-converting assets

5.
, SMS & Automation

Build and manage
 marketing systems

Create automated flows (welcome, abandon cart, post-purchase, retention)

Use tools like ManyChat for messenger automation and engagement

Turn traffic into owned audiences we can repeatedly monetize

6. Cross-Department Execution

Work directly with:

Brand Managers

Designers

Operations

Align campaigns with product launches and brand strategy

Execute fast and iterate constantly

What You Must Bring (Non-Negotiable)

Proven track record of building traffic systems that convert

(We will ask for results. Not theory.)



Deep understanding of:

Amazon ecosystem (ranking, reviews, velocity)

External traffic ? Amazon strategy

Strong experience with:

TikTok, Instagram,
 (organic + paid)

Influencer marketing at scale

Meta Ads expertise (years of hands-on experience)

Shopify experience (building pages, managing stores, funnels)

 marketing & automation (Klaviyo, ManyChat, etc.)

Strong copywriting skills (this is not optional)

Ability to build and maintain engaged audiences, not just run ads

Stays current with trends, tools, and strategies — and actually implements them



What This Role Is (and Isn’t)

This is a high-pressure, high-output role

You will be expected to test fast, execute faster, and deliver results

You will have freedom to build and innovate, but accountability is non-negotiable

This is not for someone learning the space — this is for someone who already wins in it



Why This Role Matters

We are actively building systems to reduce reliance on Amazon while still using it as a conversion engine.

This role is critical to:

Building owned traffic channels

Creating repeatable revenue systems

Turning our brands into real, scalable assets



Bottom Line

If you made it this far and If you’ve built traffic, converted it, and scaled it — we want to talk.

If not — this isn’t the role.

title: Meta Ads (with GHL tracking) Expert
description:
I'm looking for a very part-time Meta Ads Manager with extensive, hands-on experience who can support both ad setup/testing and accurate data tracking through Go High Level (GHL).



Please only apply if you have the experience I'm asking for. Thank you!



This role is not just about launching ads — it’s about understanding the numbers deeply and using them to guide decisions.



WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR

Minimum 3+ years full-time experience managing Meta Platforms Ads

Strong understanding of:

Campaign structure

Testing strategy

Scaling based on data (not guessing)

Experience working inside Go High Level (GHL) for:

Tracking leads

Attribution

Understanding funnel performance

THE WORK WE’LL DO TOGETHER



This is a collaborative role — I have 2 years of experience running my own ads, and I’m looking for someone with more depth who can support, refine, and guide the process.



This includes:



Ad Setup + Testing

-Creating and testing different ad sets and creatives

-Supporting campaign structure and iteration

-Making data-informed adjustments (not reactive changes)



Tracking + Data

-Accurately tracking performance across Meta Ads Manager & GHL

-Updating a shared tracking spreadsheet daily

-Monitoring key metrics (CPL, conversion rates, etc.)

-Helping identify what’s working vs what needs to shift



I’m specifically looking for someone who understands how to:

-Connect ad performance to actual funnel results

T-rack beyond just “leads” — and look at quality + conversion



ALIGNMENT + TRAINING

I will ask that you:

-Be open to going through some of my business coach’s ads training

-Align with how I track and make decisions

This is important so we’re working from the same framework.



ABOUT ME + MY WORK

I’m a therapist, and I run an international program focused on healing shame and coming out of survival mode, using nervous system work and Parts Work.



This work is very meaningful to me — and I’m looking for someone who:

Cares about the impact of what they’re supporting

Enjoys working collaboratively

Is detail-oriented and reliable with tracking



ROLE DETAILS

Very part-time (to start)

Ongoing support with room to grow

Focus on quality over volume



PLEASE APPLY IF:

You have 3+ years of full-time Meta Ads experience

You have direct experience tracking ads through GHL

You are comfortable working collaboratively (not just executing)

You value data accuracy and consistency

RAG systems (AI that reads and uses company data)

End-to-end AI systems used by real teams and users



Tech Stack (Must Be Comfortable With)

Python and/or Node.js

OpenAI / LLM APIs

REST APIs & backend systems

n8n / Make automation tools

PostgreSQL / MongoDB

Basic system design & architecture thinking



You Are NOT a Fit If You

Only build tutorials, demos, or prototypes

title: Virtual Assistant - CRM & Customer Communications
description:
ABOUT US



MyJourney Auto Rentals is a growing vehicle rental company serving rideshare and delivery drivers. We're building a streamlined, tech-forward operation and looking for a sharp, reliable Virtual Assistant to own our lead and renter communications as we scale.



SCHEDULE



Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern

Thursday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM Eastern

Total: ~36 hours/week



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Manage all inbound lead communications across platforms (FB Marketplace and others) using ConnectPro (GHL)

- Guide leads through the rental process from first inquiry to signed contract

- Send contracts and follow-up reminders via GHL workflows or manually as needed

- Handle ongoing renter communication — check-ins, payment reminders, return coordination, and general questions

- Coordinate pickup and drop-off details with our Fleet Manager to ensure smooth transitions

- Maintain accurate records and pipeline updates inside GHL

- Escalate only when a situation requires owner-level decision making — everything else is yours to handle



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- GoHighLevel proficiency is a must — you should be comfortable navigating pipelines, conversations, workflows, and contact records without hand-holding

- Excellent written English — your messages represent our brand and must be professional, clear, and warm

- Prior experience communicating with leads or customers in a service-based business

- Highly organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple conversations simultaneously

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

- A self-starter who follows SOPs closely and flags issues early



COMPENSATION

- Starting pay: $3.50/hour

- This is a ground-floor opportunity with a growing company — compensation increases significantly as MyJourney scales and your role expands

- We invest in people who show up, perform, and grow with us



TO APPLY



- Send your application with the subject line or opening word "JOURNEY" — applications that do not include this will not be reviewed.

- Please include:

   - A brief introduction telling us about your VA experience

   - Confirmation of your GoHighLevel experience and how you've used it

   - Your answer to this scenario: A lead messages us on
 Marketplace saying, "Hey is the car still available?" — write the exact response you would send on behalf of MyJourney Auto Rentals

   - Two references from prior clients or employers





We're looking for someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and wants to grow with a company that rewards performance. If that's you, we'd love to hear from you!

title: Quickbooks Bookkeeper
description:
QuickBooks Bookkeeper



Position Summary



We are looking for a detail-oriented QuickBooks Bookkeeper to manage day-to-day financial records, keep accounts organized, and ensure accurate reporting. This role is responsible for maintaining clean books, reconciling accounts, processing transactions, supporting invoicing and bill payments, and providing financial reports that help leadership make informed business decisions.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, accurate, trustworthy, and experienced with QuickBooks Online.



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Financial Recordkeeping

Maintain accurate financial records in QuickBooks Online.

Record and categorize income, expenses, transfers, payments, deposits, and journal entries.

Ensure transactions are properly coded to the correct accounts, classes, departments, clients, or projects.

Keep the chart of accounts organized and up to date.

Bank & Credit Card Reconciliation

Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, loans, and merchant/payment accounts monthly.

Identify and resolve discrepancies quickly.

Monitor uncleared transactions and unusual account activity.

Accounts Receivable

Create and send invoices as needed.

Track customer payments and outstanding balances.

Follow up on overdue invoices when requested.

Apply payments correctly in QuickBooks.

Accounts Payable

Enter vendor bills and expenses.

Track due dates and assist with bill payment preparation.

Maintain vendor records and W-9 information.

Help prepare 1099 information at year-end.

Payroll & Contractor Support

Coordinate payroll information with the payroll provider or internal payroll system.

Track contractor payments and payroll-related expenses.

Ensure payroll entries are accurately reflected in QuickBooks.

Reporting

Prepare monthly financial reports, including:

Profit & Loss Statement

Balance Sheet

Cash Flow Report

Accounts Receivable Aging

Accounts Payable Aging

Budget vs. Actual, if applicable

Provide leadership with clear summaries of financial trends, concerns, and action items.

Month-End Close

Complete monthly close tasks on schedule.

Reconcile all accounts and review financial statements for accuracy.

Ensure books are current and ready for CPA review.

Assist with year-end cleanup and tax preparation.

Administrative & Compliance Support

Maintain organized digital records of receipts, invoices, bills, statements, and financial documents.

Work with CPA or tax professional as needed.

Support audits, tax filings, and financial documentation requests.

Maintain confidentiality of all company financial information.

Required Qualifications

Proven bookkeeping experience.

Strong experience using QuickBooks Online.

Understanding of basic accounting principles.

Experience with bank and credit card reconciliations.

Ability to read and prepare basic financial reports.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy.

Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

Ability to meet deadlines and maintain consistent bookkeeping schedules.

High level of discretion and confidentiality.

Preferred Qualifications

QuickBooks ProAdvisor certification.

Experience with small business bookkeeping.

Experience with service-based businesses, agencies, contractors, or recurring billing businesses.

Familiarity with payroll systems, merchant processors, bill pay platforms, or expense management tools.

Experience preparing books for CPA review and year-end tax filing.

Skills Needed

QuickBooks Online

Bank reconciliation

Accounts receivable

Accounts payable

Expense categorization

Financial reporting

Month-end close

Vendor and customer record management

Spreadsheet skills

Communication and follow-through

title: APS Consulting Recruitment Notice
description:
APS Consulting is a Sydney-based advisory firm providing comprehensive strategic consulting services to clients worldwide. As we continue to expand our global footprint, we are seeking experienced Overseas Consultants with strong expertise in government relations, and a deep understanding of political affairs, economics, law, and public policy.



Scope of Work and Responsibilities  

Consultants in this role primarily support research, policy analysis, and advisory work related to overseas political, regulatory, and governance developments. Typical tasks include:



Conducting background research and policy monitoring



Stakeholder mapping and engagement analysis



Drafting analytical briefs and memos



Supporting scenario planning and risk assessments for client decision-making



Types of Clients and Projects  

Our clients generally include private enterprises, professional institutions, and organizations with cross-border interests that require an informed understanding of overseas political, regulatory, or public-sector environments. Projects are research- and analysis-driven, and may relate to:



Public policy trends



Government processes



Geopolitical risk assessments



Work Structure (approximately 20 hours per week)  

This is a flexible, part-time consultancy arrangement. Work is typically project-based, with weekly hours varying depending on deliverables and timelines. Coordination is conducted remotely, and schedules are discussed in advance to align with both project requirements and consultant availability.

Government or public administration

title: Video Editor - Meta Ad Creatives (DTC, High-Output)
description:
We're a fast-growing DTC subscription brand redefining facial hygiene with premium 100% cotton single-use facial towels. We scale primarily through Meta and TikTok, and we're investing aggressively in paid creative to fuel the next stage of growth.



The Role



We're looking for a high-performance video editor who lives and breathes DTC ad creative. You'll be cutting Meta ads daily — VSLs, UGC, founder content, lo-fi hooks, scientific/educational ads — and iterating fast based on performance data. This isn't a "make it look pretty" role. You understand that an ad's job is to stop the scroll, hook the viewer in the first 3 seconds, and sell.



What You'll Do



Edit 5-10+ Meta ad variants per week across multiple formats (founder VSLs, UGC FaceTime-style, bystander hooks, whiteboard educational, quick-cut hook tests). Take raw founder/creator footage and shape it into ads that convert. Iterate on winning concepts — new hooks, new angles, new CTAs — to scale what's working. Cut hook variants in bulk for testing. Sync with our creative direction to maintain brand consistency.



What We're Looking For



Strong portfolio of DTC ad work, ideally with proof of performance (ROAS, spend scaled, etc.).

Deep understanding of ad storytelling structures.

Fluency in Meta ad conventions: native-feeling pacing, captions, hook variants, fast cuts, etc.

Speed without sacrificing quality — you can turn around a polished ad in 24 hours.

You watch top DTC brands obsessively and can reverse-engineer why ads work.

Ability to source b-roll, SFX, and music that elevates without distracting.

Patient Communications, Insurance & Scheduling Specialist — Premium California Eye Care Practice

We are a respected optometry practice in Santa Monica, California, and we are growing fast. Over the next few years we are expanding significantly, and we need someone exceptional to grow with us from the start.

This is not a generic VA role. It is a long-term career opportunity for someone who takes real pride in their work, communicates beautifully in English, and wants to be part of a team that holds itself to a genuinely high standard.



About the role:

You will be the first voice our patients hear and the person who keeps our schedule full and our patients well taken care of. You will handle inbound and outbound calls, respond to patient texts and
s, schedule and confirm appointments, fill cancellations proactively, process insurance verifications, handle billing reconciliation, and follow up with patients for recalls and outstanding needs. You will work with a team of VAs, as well as our in-office team. We expect you to be on Zoom and available to communicate with our team throughout the workday.



More importantly, you will think. When you see something that could be done better, you will say so and help us fix it. When a phone shopper calls unsure whether to book, you will make them feel so welcome and confident in us that they do. When a patient has a confusing insurance question, you will walk them through it with patience and clarity.

We want someone who takes ownership of their work the way a small business owner does.



What we are looking for:

You speak and write English fluently with a neutral accent. Patients on the phone should feel immediately at ease with you. You have outstanding attention to detail, especially when it comes to patient records, insurance processing, and scheduling accuracy. You are warm but efficient. You follow through on everything. You do not need to be reminded twice.

Experience in healthcare, medical or dental offices, optometry, or insurance is a strong advantage. If you have worked in a patient-facing scheduling or billing role before, tell us about it. Prior VA or remote work experience is preferred.

We are specifically looking for someone who is growth-minded. The person who excels in this role will take on more responsibility over time, help train others, and become a key part of how this practice operates. We reward people who perform.



Compensation and schedule:

Starting pay is $5.00 USD per hour. Full-time hours required. You must be available during California business hours, Tuesdays to Saturdays. Performance bonuses are available for top performers. This is a stable, long-term role with an employer who genuinely invests in their team.



How to apply: Please send to 
 send all four of the following or your application will not be reviewed:

1. your resume.

2. a voice recording of 60 to 90 seconds introducing yourself in English. This is how we evaluate communication quality. Please do not skip this.

3. a short paragraph describing a time you improved a system or process at a previous job. What was the problem, what did you do, and what changed?

4. a screenshot of your internet speed test from speedtest.net and a brief description of your computer setup.

We review every application personally. If you are sharp, dependable, warm with patients, and ready to be part of something that is genuinely growing, we would love to hear from you.

title: Mid-Level Machine Learning Specialist (LLMs)
description:
Mid-Level Machine Learning Specialist (LLMs)

Location: Philippines 

Application Link: 



We’re looking for a Machine Learning Specialist with hands-on experience in Large Language Models (LLMs) to join our growing Data Science team. In this role, you’ll help build cutting-edge AI solutions used by global clients in the retail and restaurant industries—turning complex data (including images and text) into actionable intelligence.

If you enjoy solving real-world problems, working with modern AI stacks, and seeing your models deployed at scale, this role is for you.  



Learn more about DTiQ at 
 or 

________________________________________

What You’ll Do

• Design, develop, and deploy applications powered by LLMs and Vision-Language Models (VLMs)

• Build and optimize ML pipelines to improve performance, scalability, and accuracy

• Take ownership of models in production—monitoring, validating, and continuously improving outputs

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business needs into AI-driven solutions

• Contribute to the evolution of our MLOps and AI engineering practices

________________________________________

What We’re Looking For

Core Qualifications

• Ability to work a European hours with a remote team based in Poland

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field

• 2+ years of hands-on experience delivering machine learning solutions in production environments

• 1+ year of experience working with LLM-based systems (e.g., OpenAI, Google AI, Ollama, or similar)

Technical Skills

• Strong Python skills with libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Pydantic

• Experience with modern LLM frameworks like LangChain and/or LangGraph

• Familiarity with MLOps practices (model deployment, monitoring, versioning)

• Experience working with SQL/NoSQL databases

• Exposure to tools such as Snowflake (Cortex), Langfuse, or similar is a plus

• Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS preferred)

• Comfortable using GitHub, Jira, and Confluence in an agile environment

Soft Skills

• Strong problem-solving mindset with a high level of curiosity

• Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a distributed team

• Good English communication skills (written and spoken)

________________________________________

Why Join Us?

• Work on real-world AI applications used by international clients

• Be part of a fast-evolving AI team working with the latest LLM technologies

• Opportunity to own end-to-end ML solutions, from experimentation to production

• Collaborative, global work environment with strong knowledge-sharing culture

________________________________________

Nice to Have

• Experience with image analysis or computer vision models

• Exposure to retail or restaurant industry data use cases

• Background in prompt engineering, fine-tuning, or RAG systems

________________________________________



How to Apply



Application Link: 



As part of our standard recruitment procedure, we kindly ask that you complete your application through Rippling, our global Human Resources Information System (HRIS). This platform is used globally at DTiQ to ensure a consistent and secure way of managing candidate information.



What to expect:

We understand that this process may be different from traditional application methods commonly used in the Philippines, such as submitting resumes via
 or by job postings. Our HRIS system will require you to:

• Create a profile with a username and password for you to access throughout the recruiting process and if hired, it will be used for timekeeping and payroll.

• Re-enter details already included in your resume (this helps us standardize globally). We recognize this may seem repetitive but it ensures your profile is properly integrated into our global system which is necessary to schedule interviews and onboard.

• Upload supporting documents such as your CV.



Once your profile is complete in Rippling, we’ll begin to schedule interviews with qualified candidates. The interview will last up to an hour and may include 1-2 people (the direct hiring manager and potentially a department lead).



Hired candidates will be engaged through an Employment of Record (EOR) at the start of employment. This is a widely used approach by international companies to hire talent in countries where we do not yet have a legal entity and allows us to comply with legal regulations. This means that Rippling, our EOR provider in the Philippines will officially employ you on behalf of DTiQ Technologies while you will work day-to-day with our team. Under this arrangement salary, government contributions and taxes are processed in compliance with Philippine regulations. DTiQ will manage your daily work, performance and career development. If you have further questions about this arrangement, please let me know and I’d be happy to address it with you.



Is my data secure?

Yes, the system complies with international data privacy standards and your information will only be accessed by authorized personnel.



What if I experience technical issues?

If you have any trouble in the Rippling system, please reply to this message so we can assist you properly.



We truly appreciate your time and effort in completing these next steps. If you have any questions or concerns, please reach out – I’m here to help.



At DTiQ, we value dedication, teamwork, and continuous improvement. If you are looking for a stable job with opportunities to grow and develop your skills, we encourage you to apply and be part of our global team.
