title: Founding Operator
description:
Founding Operator, AI Lab

A separately operated AI lab building the operating system for an AI-native company, with a CPG parent brand as our first proving ground.

We're building a new kind of operating company — one that runs on a continuous loop of AI agents executing work, with humans on the edges supervising, refining, and graduating proven workflows into the businesses we serve. Our first customer is a national wellness tea brand. Our long-term thesis is that the methodology we develop here is itself the product.

We're looking for a Founding Operator to be the rigorous, hands-on engine of the lab. You'll be the second hire and the operating partner to the Lab Lead. If the Lab Lead is the evangelist and visionary, you're the person who makes sure the work actually ships, the metrics actually move, and only proven workflows graduate into our customers' operations.

This is not a research role. We ship AI agents into production environments where real money, real customers, and real reputations are on the line. You'll feel that weight every week.

What You'll Own



AI Workflow Engineering



Design, build, and maintain the agentic workflows the lab produces — using Claude, GPT, Manus, n8n/Make, custom integrations, and whatever the right tool is for the job.

Write the prompts, wire the tools, architect the multi-agent systems, fix what breaks.

Stay current on what's possible at the frontier and translate it into shippable workflows.



Measurement & Experimentation Discipline



Define the success metric for every workflow before it ships — not after.

Build the dashboards and instrumentation that prove (or disprove) whether a workflow is actually working.

Be the designated skeptic in graduation reviews. If a workflow isn't ready, you're the person who says so.



Production Reliability



Once workflows go live, you keep them alive — monitoring, versioning, debugging, improving.

Establish the operating standards that make our agents trustworthy enough for customers to rely on.



Graduation Gate



Own the process by which experiments move from pilot to validated to graduated.

Define and enforce the stage criteria. Run the gate reviews with the Lab Lead and executive sponsor.



Methodology Capture



As workflows graduate, document the underlying methodology so the lab itself becomes a driven asset.

Build the playbooks, training materials, and conductor SOPs that let new tea
mbers onboard in under a week.



What Success Looks Like (First 6–12 Months)



Two to four AI workflows running reliably in production at [Art of Tea], each with a clear metric and a working dashboard.

At least one workflow has graduated through the full gate and is owned by an [Art of Tea] tea
mber, not the lab.

Production failures are rare; when they happen, they're caught fast and resolved without customer impact.

The methodology is documented well enough that we could onboard a third operator and a fourth conductor without losing velocity.

The lab has a real, defensible operating model — not just a portfolio of demos.



What We're Looking For



5+ years in roles where you shipped technical systems into production — software engineering, AI/ML engineering, technical operations, or workflow automation. You don't need a CS degree; you need the muscle.

Deep, current fluency with AI tools — you've built real things with Claude, GPT, agent frameworks (Manus, LangGraph, AutoGen, etc.), and automation platforms (n8n, Make, Zapier).

Strong measurement instinct — you reach for the metric before the build, and you know the difference between "it works in a demo" and "it works in production."

Operational discipline — you can hold a process, run a stage gate, and say no when the evidence isn't there.

Comfort being the rigorous voice next to a charismatic founder-type. No ego friction. You take the win when the lab wins.

Bonus: experience in early-stage startups, R&D labs, innovation teams, or as a founding engineer.

Bonus: interest in wellness, tea, or mission-driven brands.



Why This Role



You get to build the operating model for AI-native companies from scratch, with a real customer and real stakes from week one.

You'll work directly with the Lab Lead and the executive sponso. Small team, full visibility, real authority over your domain.

A clear path to broader leadership as the lab takes on additional customers.

Competitive comp + the chance to build something that, if it works, becomes a category.

title: Experienced Bilingual Customer Service & Scheduling VA | Cleaning Company | $5/hr
description:
**Full Job Description**



**About Us:**  

We are a fast-growing residential and commercial cleaning company based in Florida, USA. We provide professional cleaning services to homes, apartments, and short-term rentals. We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Customer Service & Scheduling Virtual Assistant to help manage customer communication and daily scheduling.



This is a long-term position with growth opportunities for the right candidate.



**Position Overview**  

We are looking for a Virtual Assistant with strong English communication skills who can handle customer service, appointment scheduling, and administrative tasks. You will be responsible for communicating with customers, managing bookings, sending reminders, and maintaining an organized schedule.



Experience in customer service, scheduling, dispatching, or appointment setting is highly preferred.



**Main Responsibilities**



**Customer Service**  

- Answer customer messages via SMS,
, and phone calls  

- Respond to customer inquiries professionally  

- Handle rescheduling and cancellations  

- Confirm appointments with customers  

- Follow up after services  

- Assist with customer concerns or complaints  



**Scheduling & Dispatching**  

- Manage daily cleaning schedules  

- Assign jobs to cleaning teams  

- Update customer records  

- Send appointment reminders  

- Track job progress  

- Ensure smooth daily operations  



**Administrative Tasks**  

- Update booking notes  

- Maintain customer records  

- Send invoices when needed  

- Request customer reviews  

- Perform general administrative support  



**Required Skills**  

- Excellent spoken and written English  

- Strong customer service experience  

- Organized and detail-oriented  

- Ability to multitask and prioritize  

- Reliable and responsible  

- Comfortable working independently  

- Fast learner  

- Professional communication skills  



**Preferred Experience**  

Experience in any of the following is a plus:  

- Customer Service Representative  

- Appointment Setter  

- Dispatcher  

- Call Center Support  

- Scheduling Assistant  

- Virtual Assistant  



**Software Experience (Preferred):**  

- Scheduling software (BookingKoala, Jobber, Housecall Pro, or similar)  

- Google Calendar  

- Gmail  

- CRM systems  

- Microsoft Office or Google Workspace  



**Work Schedule**  

- Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time  

- Full-time availability required  

- Weekend availability is a plus  

Typical hours may include rotating shifts from 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST.



**Pay & Benefits**  

- Starting Pay: $5 per hour  

- Weekly Pay  

- Long-term stable position  

- Performance-based raises available  

- Opportunity to grow into leadership roles  



**Ideal Candidate**  

We are looking for someone who is:  

- Dependable and punctual  

- Communicates clearly and professionally  

- Enjoys helping customers  

- Able to remain calm under pressure  

- Detail-oriented  

- Seeking long-term employment  



**Required Application Instructions (VERY IMPORTANT)**  

To apply, please follow these instructions carefully:  

1. Record a 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself in English.  

2. Discuss your customer service experience.  

3. Mention your internet speed.  

4. Provide your computer specifications.  

5. Include the phrase "CLEAN SUCCESS" in your application subject line.  



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



**Technical Requirements**  

- Reliable high-speed internet (backup internet preferred)  

- Quiet working environment  

- Laptop or desktop computer  

- Headset with a microphone  



**Bonus Skills (Highly Preferred)**  

- Spanish-speaking  

- Experience working with U.S. customers  

- Experience in cleaning, home services, or scheduling businesses  

- Experience handling phone calls  

- Experience using SMS platforms  

- Experience managing busy schedules

Website: 
/



About the Company:

Join Achieve Integrative Health, Austin, TX's premier acupuncture clinic, and be part of a transformative healthcare journey. For over 18 years, we've championed health restoration, empowering thousands to reclaim their energy, vitality, and joy. Our success stems from a unique blend of Traditional Chinese Medicine and advanced technologies.



At Achieve Integrative Health, we're not just about healthcare; we're about life-changing care. Join us to deliver unparalleled service and results, reshaping healthcare one patient at a time. Let's make lives great again, together!



Let's build the future together! Your skills, combined with our vision and aligned with our values, will pave the path for a brighter tomorrow.



Why Join Us?

• Transform Lives: We're not just another company. At Achieve Integrative Health, WE MAKE a real difference by bringing joy and health back into lives with every interaction.

• Unbounded Growth: There is no limit to your growth with our company. We're on a mission to grow, with plans to expand our healing touch in Austin, Texas and its surrounding areas.

• Empowerment Team Culture: We are known for our team culture because we make it our mission to help our tea
mbers achieve their professional, financial, and personal goals. 



We're Seeking Individuals Who Are Aligned with Our Core Values...

• Service Above Self: You have a CARING heart and a HUMBLE attitude to put patients’ needs before yours.

• Commitment: You are persistent and disciplined in reaching your OWN goals that are demonstrated by your consistent performance and growth.

• Accountable: No excuses allowed. You are responsible for everything that happens to you and everything that doesn’t happen to you. You are responsible for everything that you have and everything that you don’t have.

• Results Oriented: While we acknowledge your effort, you are only rewarded when producing results that are measured via the statistics for your positions and for the company.

• Transparency: You maintain and practice clear, honest, and direct communication about your thoughts and intentions with every tea
mber and every patient.

• Inspirational: You lead by example to inspire our patients to live a healthy lifestyle by living a healthy lifestyle yourself and you lead by example to inspire each tea
mber by constantly striving to reach your own potential.



WHAT WE OFFER:

• Competitive total Compensation: Base salary + performance bonuses in the acupuncture industry that rewards you based on the RESULTS you produce. If you are looking for a guaranteed salary w/o being accountable to meeting KPIs, this is not the team for you.

* A team and environment that is collaborative, accountable, caring, supportive, honest, transparent, as we remove all employees who talk behind peoples back and lack integrity

• Learning & Growth Opportunities: Access a wealth of resources to keep sharpening your mindset, communication, and customer service skills.

• Wellness Initiatives: Benefit from complimentary virtual health services, ensuring your well-being is always a priority.

• Work from Home: Be able to build a career working from home, no more 3-4 hour commutes to work.

• Other Benefits: Paid-Time off and medical insurance for qualified tea
mbers after successfully completing the 90-day training period.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

* assist the Chief Marketing Officer in reviewing
s, marketing material, uploading videos onto social media

* use Editing Apps that integrate AI (ie. CapCut, Canva, ChatGPT) to generate thumbnails, images, reels

* organize all of our marketing tasks and make sure all tasks are executed in a timely manner w/ excellence

* respond to social media comments

* create newsletters

* track All marketing stats

* Transcribe videos into
s and blogs

* vitally important = be able to follow the CMO's instructions

* and additional admin tasks



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS & QUALIFICATIONS

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must be organized and be able to handle multiple tasks and responsibilities everyday. If you’re looking to only do one or two tasks per day, we are the wrong team for you.

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must sleep the same schedule 7 days a week. Your Health is our priority, and if you don’t value your own health we don’t want you on our team.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.



Computer/Laptop/Internet Requirements:

• Fast and reliable wired internet connection of not less than 10 Mbps

• Secondary and Tertiary Back up Internet

• Intel Core i5 or higher Operating System with at least 8gb RAM

• Excellent quality headset with microphone, and a working webcam

• Quiet, private home office free from noise background or distractions



WORK HOURS

* Option Full-time =  40 hours per week, work schedule is based on your time zone and must be consistent work hours, you cannot work whenever you want.

* Option PART-TIME = Part-time 20 hours/wk, in your timezone, but assignments/projects/tasks must be completed by 6am CST everyday M-F 

* BOTH must attend our morning marketing huddle mon-fri 8:09am CST - 8:45am cst





COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS:

* be able to build a career working from home, no more 3-4 hour commutes to work

* monthly salary for full-time

* pay is based on your ability to produce measurable results and not experience

* the more Qualified Leads you help our clinic generate the higher your compensation

* we offer lucrative performance based bonuses that are paid monthly

* Paid Time Off, Paid Holidays for qualified tea
mbers

* Medical Insurance for qualified tea
mbers

* The biggest Benefit of joining our team is we help our tea
mbers achieve their Personal, Professional and Financial Goals. When was the last time you joined a company that invested resources to help you achieve YOUR professional, financial and personal goals? We could be your first.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: We're looking for a Digital Marketing Specialist to manage and execute our advertising strategy, with a primary focus on Meta platforms. This is a remote position open to candidates in the Philippines. In this role, you'll own the complete ad lifecycle—from creative development through campaign optimization and performance analysis. Your responsibilities will include creating ad creatives in-house or outsourcing to freelancers and agencies as needed, setting up and managing ad campaigns across Meta and other digital platforms, monitoring campaign performance and adjusting strategies based on data, and maintaining organized workflows for asset management and reporting. You should have solid experience with Meta Ads Manager and ad platforms in general, understanding of design fundamentals or ability to brief creative teams, analytical skills to read performance data and make optimization decisions, and strong organizational and project management abilities since you'll be coordinating creatives and campaigns simultaneously. Compensation is very flexible and negotiable based on experience and performance. This is a great fit if you're detail-oriented, self-motivated, comfortable wearing multiple hats, and excited about building out a digital advertising operation from the ground up.

title: E - Commerce Video Editor
description:
Overview

We are seeking an exceptional, data-driven Video Editor obsessed with driving conversions for e-commerce/DTC brands. This is a fast-paced role requiring a marketer's mindset, platform expertise, and rapid iteration based on performance data.



Core Responsibilities (What You Will Do)

Conversion Focus: Edit raw footage (often UGC-style) into scroll-stopping, short-form ads (15-60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube, focused entirely on driving sales.



DR Implementation: Structure videos using Direct Response (DR) frameworks (e.g., Problem-Agitate-Solution), ensuring a powerful hook in the first 3 seconds, and seamless CTA integration.



Technical Execution: Apply advanced post-production techniques: color grading, audio mixing, speed ramping, dynamic transitions, and creating engaging typography/subtitles.



Rapid Iteration: Maintain fast turnaround (24 for first cuts) and produce multiple testing variations based on performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, Hook Rate).



Platform Mastery: Optimize content (9:16, 1:1, etc.) for native feel and best practices across TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Ads.



Pre-requisites (Must-Haves)

Experience: Proven portfolio of successful e-commerce/DTC ad editing (not just cinematic/corporate work).



Software Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro.



Mindset: Deep understanding of DR Marketing and key metrics (ROAS, CTR). Must be performance-driven, flexible, and willing to iterate based on data without ego.



Skills: Expertise in UGC-style editing, audio/sound design, and closed captioning/subtitles.



Bonus Skills

Proficiency in After Effects, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve.



Familiarity with ad platforms and marketing metrics.



Workload: Initial paid trial, then transitioning to 10 - 20 hours per week ongoing.



Shift: Flexible hours; work is output-based with strict deadlines.



To Apply:

If you are an exceptional designer with a portfolio that demonstrates world-class DTC brand quality, kindly fill out the application form:






Looking forward to receiving your application!

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Sales Representative
description:

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist - Non-Profit Home Health Care Agency
description:
MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH US BASED COMPANIES IN WASHINGTON STATE AND/OR CALIFORNIA. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH MEDICARE/MEDICARE, WELLSKY AND WORKDAY. 



Please apply through this form: 



Summary / objective 

The Talent Acquisition Specialist is responsible for driving the recruitment efforts for a home health care agency and recruitment initiatives, ensuring that we attract, engage, and hire top

talent to meet our organization needs. You will manage the end-to-end recruitment process, from 

sourcing and screening candidates to facilitating interviews and extending job offers. Your role will 

involve collaborating closely with hiring managers to understand their staffing requirements, 

developing effective recruitment strategies, and fostering a positive candidate experience. 



Essential functions & responsibilities

• Collaborate with hiring managers to understand specific hiring needs, job requirements, and

qualifications.

• Responsible for creating and managing job postings for open positions.

• Regularly update hiring managers on the recruitment progress, maintaining transparent

communication throughout the process.

• Monitor and assess the performance of job postings and promptly adjust recruitment strategies

as necessary to attract qualified candidates effectively.

• Review resumes, conduct initial screenings, and evaluate candidate’s qualifications to determine

suitability for open positions.

• Coordinate interviews, including phone screens, and virtual hiring events.

• Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the recruitment process. This includes clear

communication, timely feedback, and a smooth onboarding process.

• Extend jobs offers and facilitate the onboarding process through the BambooHR system,

overseeing tasks such as contacting references, E-Verify, scheduling fingerprint appointments

and coordinating TB testing if necessary.

• Ensure all new hire paperwork is completed accurately and properly filed.

• Schedule and facilitate new hire orientations, collaborating with the training team to ensure a

seamless onboarding experience.

• Collect feedback from new hires and hiring managers to assess the effectiveness of the

onboarding process.

• Make recommendations for improvements to enhance the onboarding experience.

• Provide weekly summaries of recruiting activities and progress to Human Resources Director.

• Stay informed of industry trends and best practices in recruitment ensuring compliance with all

relevant laws and regulations governing recruiting and hiring processes

• Provide administrative support to the HR department as needed.

• Contributes to recruiting projects and initiatives.

• Promote the Mission, Vision and Values of the company in all areas of responsibility, and

demonstrate commitment to Culture of Excellence and strategic goals.

• Other duties as assigned.



Required Knowledge, Skills & Abilities

• Understanding of relevant employment laws and regulations, including equal employment

opportunity (EEO) laws, fair hiring practices, and data privacy laws.

• Strong interpersonal and communication skills to effectively communicate with candidates and

hiring managers.

• Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple job openings simultaneously, and meet deadlines.

• Proficiency in using Workday systems to manage employee data.

• Ability to handle sensitive and confidential information with discretion and maintain

confidentiality at all times.

• Meticulous attention to detail to ensure accuracy in HR documentation, data entry, and

compliance with policies and procedures.

• Ability to remain flexible, positive, collaborative, and enthusiastic to changes, shifting priorities

and new assignments.

• Possess a professional demeanor, demonstrates initiative, and can work independently.



Required Education & Experience

• High school graduate or equivalent.

• 3-5 years of relevant experience in recruitment and onboarding.



Please apply through this form:

title: Content Reviewer & Editor
description:
2-Week Contract (Remote, Philippines)



**Pay:** $5.00 USD/hour (plus a small bonus per real error caught — details shared at kickoff)

**Hours:** Monday–Friday, 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM Philippine Time (7 working hours + 1 paid lunch hour)

**Start Date:** Week of May 3

**Contract Length:** 2 weeks, with potential for renewal or longer-term work for top performers

**Positions Available:** 4



---



## About Beyond The Fall



Beyond The Fall is a global preparedness brand built around an 852-page hardcover survival encyclopedia — 5 years in the making, with 80+ expert contributors from 50 countries. We sell direct-to-consumer and through Amazon across the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and Europe. Small, fast-moving team. Serious about the work, fun to work with.



## About the Role



We're prepping our first edition for a second-edition release and need sharp-eyed reviewers to make sure nothing embarrassing slips through. This isn't deep editing — it's a focused **error sweep**. We want the big stuff: misspellings, wrong words, broken sentences, factual mistakes, things that look visually off.



You'll work as part of a four-person team split into two review pairs. Each pair reads the same pages, so two sets of eyes are on every page. You read, you catch, you flag — directly in the file using **Adobe Acrobat Pro**.



## What We're Looking For



- A genuinely sharp eye — you catch what others skim past

- Strong command of written English

- Reliable, consistant, on-time

- Comfortable working closely with a review partner

- Prior proofreading or editing experience is a plus, not a must



## How to Apply



Send your **resume** along with a short cover letter that includes:



1. A quick summary of your relevant experience

2. A real example of a mistake you've caught in someone else's writing

3. Confirmation you can work Monday–Friday, 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM Philippine Time

4. Your earliest available start date



**Start your
 with the word PINEAPPLE** — that's how we know you read this all the way through. We are looking to begin interviews Wednesday & Thursday AM.  Our ideal candidates will be selected ASAP.



We move fast. If you're a fit, you'll hear from us quickly.

title: Billing & Procurement Account Manager

Strong knowledge of procurement processes, vendor management, and invoicing best practices.

title: Instagram DM Setter & Lead Conversion Specialist (Fitness Coaching Brand)
description:
Instagram DM Setter & Lead Conversion Specialist



Pay: $5–$7/hour + performance bonuses

Schedule: Up to 2 hours per day (including weekends)

Location: Remote



About the Role

We’re hiring an Instagram DM Setter to help manage inbound conversations and turn engagement into booked consultation calls for a growing online fitness coaching business, Transform-Nation Fitness.

This is NOT a cold outreach or spa
ssaging role. Every conversation is with someone who has already shown interest through content, stories, or engagement.

Your role is to build genuine conversations, create trust, and guide potential clients toward taking the next step.



You will be using proven scripts and systems to:

• Respond to inbound Instagram DMs

• Engage with comments, story replies, and active followers

• Qualify potential leads by understanding their goals and challenges

• Book consultation calls



This is a great role for someone who enjoys connecting with people, can move quickly, and takes pride in doing high-quality work.



What Success Looks Like

In this role, DMs are treated like live conversations, not
s.

Speed, care, and attention to detail matter.



You will:

- Respond quickly to inbound messages using our scripts and frameworks

- Qualify leads by learning about their goals, struggles, and readiness

- Book consultation calls using our scheduling process

- Track conversations, follow-ups, and booked calls in our CRM

- Consistently follow up with leads

- Manage your time effectively and stay on top of conversations



We care deeply about quality over quantity. Every conversation should feel natural, helpful, and professional.



Who This Role Is Perfect For

You’ll thrive here if you:

-Enjoy talking to people and building genuine connections

-Naturally respond quickly and stay organized

-Can follow systems while keeping conversations human and engaging

-Pay attention to details and don’t miss follow-ups

-Are reliable and communicate clearly with a remote team

-Have stable internet and a focused work environment



The Traits We Value Most:

We operate with high standards. The person in our DMs represents the brand.



We look for:

Ownership – You take responsibility and improve quickly from feedback

Urgency – You treat conversations like real-time interactions

Strong Communication – Clear, professional, and engaging

Integrity & Excellence – No shortcuts, no sloppy work

Positive Attitude – Solutions-focused and consistent

Coachability – Open to feedback and eager to grow



Training & Support

We provide everything you need to succeed:

-Proven scripts and conversation frameworks

-Messaging tone and DM guidelines

-Coaching for different lead scenarios

-Ongoing feedback and support

You will not be expected to figure things out on your own.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to help people connect with life-changing coaching while building valuable communication and sales skills, we’d love to hear from you.



IMPORTANT You will be asked to answer the following questions when submitting a proposal:



1) Have you ever done similar work before? (Customer support, social media, sales, appointment setting, or DM conversations.) If yes, please describe what results you helped achieve. If not, tell us why you believe you would still be great at this role.

title: Data entry/ personal assistant
description:
Role: NYC Restaurant Researcher — Let's Get Lunch

Let's Get Lunch (letsgetlunch.nyc) is a NYC platform that helps office workers find prix-fixe lunch deals at real restaurants. We're populating our directory with restaurants that publicly advertise lunch specials. I'm hiring one researcher for ongoing part-time work — start with a paid trial of 10 restaurants, then scale to 20–30 hours/week if it goes well.

What you'll do, per restaurant:

Research the restaurant on the web (their website, Instagram, Google Maps, Yelp) and confirm they publicly advertise a lunch special or prix-fixe lunch menu.

Capture: name, full address, neighborhood, cuisine, lunch special description, price, hours, days available, and the public source (URL + date).

Find the restaurant's contact info — general phone number, general
 if listed, and ideally the manager or marketing person's name and contact.

If the manager's
 isn't public, call the restaurant during off-peak hours (3–5 PM Eastern Time, NYC) and politely ask: "Hi, I'm researching lunch deals for a NYC website that drives free traffic to restaurants. Could I have the
 of whoever handles your marketing or lunch specials?"

Select 1–3 photos from the restaurant's own public sources (their website or Instagram) that accurately represent the restaurant's food and atmosphere. Save photo URLs. Do NOT pick photos from food blogs, Yelp user uploads, or stock images.

Enter all of this into a 
 & Google Sheet I'll provide. One row per restaurant.

Volume target: 7-10 restaurants per hour at part-time hours. Quality matters more than speed.

What you won't do: make any commitments to restaurants, represent yourself as the owner of the site, scrape platforms with login walls, or upload photos to my actual website (you'll provide URLs; I handle uploads).

Hours: Flexible, but research-only work can be done any time. Restaurant phone calls must happen 3–5 PM Eastern Time, which is 3–5 AM Manila time (this is the constraint — confirm you can do this). About 30 minutes of phone calling per day is expected.

Trial: Paid trial of 10 restaurants at your hourly rate. If quality is good, ongoing engagement at agreed hours per week

description:

Strategy Development: Create tailored Local SEO strategies focused on Google Business Profile (GBP) optimization and local ranking factors.

mbers.

Technical Literacy: Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as they relate to SEO, along with experience in Google Search Console and GTM.

Communication: Excellent written and verbal English skills with a collaborative, "growth-oriented" mindset.

Software Familiarity: Comfort with communication tools like Slack or Pumble, and project management tools like ClickUp or Monday or Plaky.

Work Ethic & Growth

What We Offer

competitive rates

The chance to grow with a supportive team in a specialized niche

An opportunity to truly make an impact on client results and agency growth

title: Amazon Growth Operator (PPC + Revenue Ownership)
description:
We are a growing consumer brand in the DIY / home & garden space (terrarium kits and related products), currently selling across Amazon and major retail platforms.



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of Amazon performance, not just manage campaigns.



This is not a typical PPC role.







What This Role Is



You will be responsible for:

 • Growing Amazon revenue profitably

 • Managing and optimizing Sponsored Products campaigns

 • Making decisions that impact ranking, sales velocity, and TACOS

 • Identifying opportunities to scale winning products and keywords



You should think like an operator, not a technician.







What This Role Is NOT

 • This is not just “optimize campaigns weekly”

 • This is not reporting metrics without insight

 • This is not a passive role where you wait for direction





Responsibilities

 • Own PPC performance across all ASINs

 • Manage and optimize Sponsored Products campaigns (core focus)

 • Build and maintain campaign structure (match types, segmentation, etc.)

 • Identify and push high-impact keywords for ranking and growth

 • Control wasted spend through search term analysis and negation

 • Allocate budget across SKUs based on performance and growth potential

 • Balance ACOS vs TACOS vs revenue growth

 • Provide clear weekly insights:

 • What improved

 • What declined

 • Why it happened

 • What actions are being taken next







What We’re Looking For



You should:

 • Have hands-on experience managing Amazon PPC accounts with multiple SKUs

 • Understand how PPC impacts organic ranking and total sales

 • Be comfortable making decisions that involve trade-offs (profit vs growth)

 • Be proactive — bring ideas without being asked

 • Be able to explain your thinking clearly and with numbers







Required Experience

 • Proven experience managing Amazon Sponsored Products campaigns

 • Experience working with consumer products (preferred)

 • Experience scaling products, not just maintaining them

 • Strong understanding of:

 • Keyword targeting (broad, phrase, exact)

 • Search term harvesting & negation

 • Bid and placement strategy







How We Evaluate Candidates



You will be asked questions like:

 • “If your top keyword drops from page 1 to page 2, what do you do?”

 • “Would you ever run campaigns at a loss? When and why?”

 • “How do you d
 when to scale vs pull back spend?”



We are looking for clear, real answers based on experience, not theory.







To Apply



Please include:

 1. A brief overview of your experience

 2. A real example where you increased sales or improved performance

 3. Your answer to this question:



“If ACOS increases but total sales and organic ranking improve, is that a good or bad outcome? Why?”







 Additional Notes

 • This role can be part-time or contract to start

 • We are looking for someone who can grow with the business

 • Compensation will be based on experience and level of ownership







We’re looking for someone who wants to take responsibility for results — not just manage campaigns.

title: Shopify E-Commerce Manager - Operations, Meta Ads & Customer Journey
description:
Job Overview-



I'm looking for an experienced, organized, and proactive E-Commerce Manager to take ownership of my Shopify store from the back end up. The store has grown faster than the systems behind it, so the first job is to clean up the mess: inventory, product data, app stack, and workflows. From there, you'll help me put real structure around product management, the customer journey, and Meta ads so the business can scale without breaking.



This is not a "do small tasks" role. I need someone who can see the whole picture, propose a plan, and execute it, then keep things running smoothly week to week.



What You'll Do

Back-End Cleanup & Structure



-Audit my current Shopify setup (products, collections, variants, tags, metafields, apps, themes) and propose a cleanup plan

-Standardize product data, naming conventions, and inventory records

-Remove unused apps, fix broken integrations, document what's left

-Build SOPs so the store doesn't drift back into chaos



Product & Inventory Management



-Maintain accurate inventory across all SKUs and sales channels

-Manage product launches end-to-end: listing creation, pricing, images, SEO copy, variants, inventory setup

-Track stock levels, flag reorder points, coordinate with suppliers/fulfillment

-Optimize existing listings for conversion and search



Shopify Store Management



-Day-to-day store operations and order processing

-Theme edits, page updates, app configuration

-Discount codes, campaigns, seasonal updates

-Basic CRO improvements (PDP layout, checkout flow, trust signals)



Meta Ads



-Plan, launch, and manage
/Instagram ad campaigns

-Build and test creatives, audiences, and offers

-Monitor KPIs (ROAS, CPA, CTR), kill underperformers, scale winners

-Report weekly with clear takeaways and next steps



Customer Journey



-Map the current customer journey from first ad click ? post-purchase

-Identify drop-off points and propose fixes

-Set up or improve
/SMS flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back)

-Build a repeat-purchase strategy



Requirements (Must-Have)



3+ years managing Shopify stores end-to-end (not just listing edits)

Hands-on Meta Ads Manager experience with proof of results

Strong inventory and product data management background

Experience cleaning up disorganized stores and building systems from scratch

Excellent written English and proactive communication

Reliable internet, full-time availability, and comfortable working independently

Familiar with: Shopify, Meta Ads Manager, Klaviyo or Mailchimp/Omnisend, Google Analytics 4, Canva, project management tools (Monday/Asana/ClickUp/Notion)



Nice-to-Have



Experience with print-on-demand (Printful, Printify) or third-party fulfillment

Basic Liquid / theme editing

Klaviyo flow building

Conversion rate optimization experience

SEO for product pages



What I'm Looking For (Soft Skills)



A finisher, not just a starter, you close loops

Comfortable telling me what you think we should do, not just waiting for instructions

Organized enough that I never have to ask "what's the status of X?"

Honest about what you don't know



Hours & Pay



Full-time, 40 hours/week

$7+ depending on experience, + commission once fully set up and hitting sales goals

Performance reviews at 90 days with room for raises as the business grows

Paid Philippine holidays after 90 days



How to Apply

Please send a
 to 
 that includes:



A short paragraph on the most disorganized Shopify store you've cleaned up, what shape was it in, and what did you do?

One Meta Ads campaign you're proud of (industry, budget, result)

Your favorite tool for managing product/inventory data and why

Your available start date and time zone overlap with US Central Time

The word "banana" at the top of your reply, so I know you read this



Generic copy-paste applications will be ignored.

title: Sales & Outreach VA — Fluent English + Proven Lead Gen Experience
description:
We're a Sydney-based electrical services business, family-run and growing fast. We need a Sales & Outreach VA who can think for themselves, generate ideas for new revenue streams, and execute on them. We're not looking for someone who waits to be told what to do — we're looking for someone who comes to the role with a head full of ideas.

The two non-negotiables

1. Fluent English — spoken and written. Not "intermediate." Not "good." Fluent. Our customers are Australian and they won't respond to anyone whose English sounds non-native. If English is not your strongest language, please save us both time and don't apply.

2. Proven previous experience in a cold outreach, lead generation, business development, or appointment setting role. This is not an entry-level position. You must be able to point to specific outbound campaigns you've run, leads you've generated, and sales you've helped close. Career-changers or general VAs without specific outbound experience will not be considered.

If you clear both bars, keep reading.

About the role

This is a thinking and doing role. You will be expected to identify opportunities to generate work for an Australian electrical services business, build the campaigns yourself, and execute them. You won't be handed a playbook on day one — you'll be expected to bring one. You will work directly with the business owner and report on results every Friday.

What you'll do



Identify and propose new lead-generation channels and angles every month

Build target lists from scratch — research, contact details, qualifying notes

Write and send personalised cold outreach 
 and where appropriate, LinkedIn or other platforms)

Keep the CRM tracker current — every lead, every status, every next action

Send a clear Friday report: outreach sent, replies, calls booked, jobs won, revenue attributed



Must-haves



Fluent spoken and written English

2+ years of measurable cold outreach, lead generation, BDR, SDR or appointment setting experience

Track record you can talk to (specific campaigns, specific results)

Initiative — you bring ideas, not just questions

Comfortable with Gmail, Google Sheets, Google Docs, and a CRM

Stable internet and a quiet workspace for calls



Schedule



40 hours/week, Monday to Friday

Working hours: 9:00am–5:00pm Sydney)



Performance bonus will be included

60-day review with a pay rise opportunity if targets are hit





How to apply — read carefully

Step 1 — Voice recording (mandatory). Record a 60–90 second voice message introducing yourself in English. Tell us:



Your name and where you're based

Why you're a fluent English speaker (schooling, work history, time abroad, etc.)

One specific lead generation campaign you've run, what you did, and the result

title: Medical Office Virtual Assistant — Back in Action Fitness (PI Chiropractic)
description:
Medical Office Virtual Assistant — Back in Action Fitness (PI Chiropractic)



**Location:** Remote (Philippines preferred)

**Hours:** Part-time, 15-20 hours/week with potential to grow

**Rate:** $5-7/hr depending on experience

**Start:** Immediately



---



About the Role



We are a personal injury chiropractic clinic in South Florida seeking a sharp, detail-oriented virtual assistant to handle billing operations, insurance follow-up, and administrative support. This is a high-impact role — you will directly affect how much revenue the clinic collects.



You will work alongside the clinic owner and front desk staff. You will have clear tasks every day. You will be trained on our internal systems and workflows. We value accuracy, follow-through, and communication above all else.



This role has a unique growth path. We are building a healthcare operations platform (Axis Workspace) that automates the exact workflows you'll be doing manually. Your real-world experience will directly shape how we build the product. As the platform develops, your role evolves from manual operations to platform operations — managing signals, reviewing AI outputs, and running the system instead of doing everything by hand.



---

What You'll Do



**Billing & Insurance (Primary)**

- Post EOBs (Explanation of Benefits) to ChiroTouch

- Submit claims via fax and electronic submission

- Verify fax confirmations — if a fax fails, catch it immediately (this is critical)

- Follow up on denied and unpaid claims by phone and

- Call insurance companies to verify coverage, check benefits, and resolve claim issues

- Track PIP (Personal Injury Protection) balances per patient

- Flag approaching PIP limits and exhaustion

- Identify underpayments and initiate appeals

- Maintain payer code reference and denial reason tracking



**Medical Records & Case Management**

- Request previous medical records from prior providers

- Track MRI, EMG, and other diagnostic referrals

- Verify insurance coverage for new patients

- Confirm attorney information and send intro letters

- Track LOP (Letter of Protection) status per case

- Follow up on missing documents within 48 hours



**Administrative**

- Organize patient files in Google Drive

- Manage and monitor fax inbox (RingCentral)

- Schedule follow-up tasks and flag overdue items

- Support front desk staff with overflow administrative work

- Maintain clean, updated records in ChiroTouch



**Communication (Phone Required)**

- Call insurance companies to follow up on claims and denials

- Call attorney offices regarding case status and PIP suits

- Call patients for scheduling and balance follow-up

- Professional, clear English on every call



---



## Required Skills



- 2+ years US medical billing experience

- Strong understanding of CPT codes, EOBs, CMS-1500 forms

- Experience reading and interpreting EOBs from multiple payers

- Insurance verification and benefits checking

- Denial management and appeals process

- Strong spoken and written English (phone calls required — B2 or higher)

- Comfortable with Google Workspace (Drive, Sheets, Gmail)

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace for calls

- Detail-oriented — you catch errors before they become problems

- Self-directed — you don't wait to be told what to do next



## Strongly Preferred



- ChiroTouch experience (this is a major advantage — say so in your application)

- PIP / auto a
 / personal injury billing experience

- Florida medical billing experience

- Chiropractic or physical therapy billing background

- Fax management experience (RingCentral or similar)

- Call center or phone support background



---



## Test Task (Paid — 1 hour)



Before hiring, we will send you a paid test task ($6):



1. Read a real anonymized EOB and extract: payer, check number, DOS, CPT codes, billed/allowed/paid amounts, denial codes

2. Identify what's wrong with the claim and recommend next steps

3. Name the procedure for 5 CPT codes commonly used in chiropractic

4. 5-minute phone screen — role-play calling an insurance company about a denied claim



---



## Why This Role is Different



You're not joining a call center or a generic admin pool. You're joining a small clinic with a founder who is building the future of healthcare operations technology. Your day-to-day work directly informs how we build our platform. You'll see your manual workflows become automated features. And as the platform grows, so does your role — from manual billing to platform operator to team lead.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow, not just clock hours.



---



## How to Apply



Send an
 to 
 with:



1. Your resume

2. A short paragraph on your US medical billing experience — which specialties, which EHR systems, how long

3. Whether you have ChiroTouch experience (yes or no)

4. Your availability and preferred working hours (we are in EST)

5. Your expected hourly rate



Subject line: "Medical Office VA — [Your Name]"



We respond within 48 hours. Test task is paid. Onboarding starts immediately for the right candidate.

title: VSL Video Editor - Long-Form (DTC Beauty Brand) - Full Time
description:
About us

We are a fast-growing DTC beauty brand selling skincare products across the US and EU markets. We run high-volume paid media on Meta and other platforms, and video is at the core of everything we do.



We're looking for a skilled long-form VSL video editor to join our team full-time and help us scale our creative output.



What you'll be doing

- Editing long-form Video Sales Letters (VSLs) for our paid ads (Meta, YouTube, etc.)

- Sourcing raw footage from social media (TikTok, Instagram, Reels) — UGC, lifestyle clips, reactions, skincare 
nts

- Blending raw footage with AI-generated clips (Seedance, Kling, Runway) to create dynamic, scroll-stopping videos

- Maintaining a fast pace: clips of 3-4 seconds maximum, frequent cuts, dynamic editing

- Adding captions, sound design, music, transitions, and on-screen text

- Iterating quickly on feedback and producing multiple variations of winning concepts



What we're looking for

- Proven experience editing VSLs or long-form direct-response video ads (please share your portfolio)

- Strong understanding of pacing, retention, and what makes a viewer keep watching

- Mastery of Adobe Premiere Pro and/or CapCut

- Ability to source raw footage from social media efficiently

- Experience with AI video tools (Seedance, Kling, Runway, Sora) is a strong plus

- Excellent written English

- Reliable internet connection and a setup capable of handling 4K editing

- Detail-oriented, fast turnaround, able to handle multiple projects in parallel

title: GoHighLevel Specialist & Funnel Builder
description:
About the Role



We're a US-based marketing agency serving premium expert-led businesses: authors, consultants, professional services firms. We're seeking an independent contractor who can build clean, conversion-focused funnels and websites in GoHighLevel and execute the technical marketing operations behind them.



This is an ongoing international contractor engagement for a hands-on builder who has worked with an expert, coach, consultant, or small agency owner before — and wants consistent, long-term contract work with a small team that values quality execution and follow-through.



The ideal contractor is operationally disciplined, technically capable, and quality-focused. If you're someone who keeps a founder's GHL infrastructure running clean — building funnels right the first time, catching details, owning execution — this engagement is built for you.



What You'll Deliver



Across our client work and internal brand:



- GoHighLevel funnel pages, websites, workflows, and
/SMS automations

- Funnel and page architecture: layout, hierarchy, mobile responsiveness, conversion-focused structure

- CRM configuration: pipelines, tags, calendars, custom fields

-
 and SMS sequence builds and automation triggers

- Integration setup with external tools (Zapier, Make, payment processors, etc.)

- Content operations: asset organization, version control, QA testing builds before launch



Our Standards



- Operator mindset. You think in systems. You build SOPs, track deadlines, catch your own errors before delivery, and turn chaotic inputs into organized output.

- Strong design judgment. You can build polished funnel pages and
 templates that look professional. You don't need to be a graphic designer, but you recognize good visual hierarchy and reject sloppy work.

- Sound judgment. You push back on weak briefs and improve them rather than executing them as-is.

- AI fluency with override discipline. You use current AI tools daily — but you rebuild AI output when it's generic, off-brand, or mediocre. If you ship whatever the model gives you, this engagement isn't for you.

- Bonus: WordPress and Wix experience for building or updating high-end websites in addition to GHL.



Non-Negotiables



- 2+ years hands-on GoHighLevel (real client builds — funnels, websites, workflows, automations)

- Demonstrated ability to build conversion-focused funnels and websites with portfolio proof

- Prior experience supporting an expert, coach, consultant, or small agency owner

- Excellent English, verbal and written

- Available for ongoing engagement at full workload



Engagement Terms



- Ongoing international contractor engagement

- Expected workload: up to 40 hours per week

- Paid via Wise, Deel, or Payoneer



How to Apply



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph using your individual profile. We're contracting with one person, not an agency, and we verify each applicant's identity through the platform. Applications submitted by agencies, recruiters, or from
s not associated with the OnlineJobs.ph account will not be considered.



Include:



1. A 2–3 minute spoken Loom introducing yourself and walking us through one piece of work you've shipped — explain why you made the structural and design choices you did

2. One specific example where AI gave you an output and you rebuilt most of it — what was wrong, what you replaced, and why

3. Links to 2–3 pieces of your strongest work: at minimum one GHL funnel (live URL or walkthrough) and one website you've built

4. Your monthly contractor fee expectation

5. Confirmation you can begin engagement within 1–3 weeks



Generic applications will be ignored.

title: CREATIVE STRATEGIST
description:
Creative Strategist (Part-Time) — KIKO

Location: Remote

Commitment: ~20 hours/week (fully flexible)

Compensation: $200/month (startup stage, growth-based increases)

If You’re Interested: Please text me on WhatsApp at 
About KIKO

KIKO is a new beauty brand built for girls who live in braids.

We’re creating high-quality, expressive braiding hair that gives you the freedom to switch styles, play with color, and show up boldly — without breaking the bank. This is more than just hair. It’s identity, creativity, and culture.

We’re at the very beginning — building from scratch — and looking for someone who wants to help shape the visual world of KIKO from day one.



The Role

We’re looking for a Creative Director to help define and execute the KIKO brand aesthetic across everything we touch.

This isn’t a corporate role. This is hands-on, build-it-with-us energy.

You’ll be responsible for translating the KIKO vision into a cohesive, standout visual identity — from packaging to web to content.



What You’ll Work On

    •    Define and evolve KIKO’s visual identity

    •    Design or guide direction for:

 Design (Klaviyo)

    •    Ensure consistency across all brand touchpoints

    •    Collaborate closely on product launches and campaigns



Who This Is For

    •    You have a strong eye for beauty, fashion, and culture

    •    You’re obsessed with aesthetic and brand world-building

    •    You’re comfortable designing or directing (Canva, Figma, Adobe, Illustrator, photoshop, etc.)

    •    You thrive in startup environments — fast, scrappy, evolving

    •    You care about beauty, culture, and self-expression

    •    You’re not just looking for a job — you want to build something



Important Note on Compensation

We want to be transparent:

This is an early-stage startup role with a current compensation of $200/month.

As KIKO grows, compensation will increase and there will be opportunities to grow with the brand long-term.

This role is best suited for someone who:

    •    Wants to build a portfolio with a real brand

    •    Believes in the vision

    •    Is excited by ownership and creative freedom



Why Join KIKO

    •    Shape a brand from day one

    •    Full creative ownership — your work defines the brand

    •    Flexible schedule — work when and how you want

    •    Opportunity to grow into a long-term, higher-paying role as we scale



How to Apply

Texxt 

    •    Your portfolio (or examples of your work)

    •    (Optional but encouraged) A quick moodboard or vision for KIKO



If you’re the type to say “I could make this brand go crazy” — we want you.

title: Full-Time SDR / Appointment Setter — US Property Managers (Graveyard Shift, Permanent)
description:
We're hiring a full-time SDR to dial US property managers and book qualified demos. Smart access control company (hardware + SaaS). The pipeline is real: 24,000-unit retail order confirmed, national retail meeting end of month, FCC-certified hardware. Leads are loaded in GoHighLevel and waiting.



COMPENSATION

- Base: $1,000 USD per month flat (~?56,000 PHP)

- Bonus: $25 per fully-shown demo + $100 per closed deal

- Top performer Week 4+ earnings: ~$2,900/month USD

- Pass 30-day trial? permanent seat + raise + expanded bonus



SCHEDULE

- Full-time, 40 hours/week, Monday–Friday

- 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST OR 10:00 AM–6:00 PM EST (you pick one and commit)

- That's 9:00 PM–5:00 AM PHT or 10:00 PM–6:00 AM PHT — confirm you can do graveyard shift before applying



WHAT YOU DO EVERY DAY

- 100-150+ outbound dials (top performers do 150–200)

- Qualify on script: door count, decision-maker, pain point, urgency

- Book qualified demos onto the Sales Manager's calendar

- Log every touch in GoHighLevel, same-day

- EOD report submitted unprompted by 5 PM EST

- Friday 1:1 with your manager



REQUIRED

- 2+ years real B2B cold calling — 100+ dials/day, not 30

- Fluent professional English with confident phone presence

- Worked with US clients before

- GoHighLevel experience preferred (HubSpot/Salesforce acceptable)

- Quiet home office, professional headset

- Reliable internet: primary ISP + backup (Globe, PLDT, Smart, mobile hotspot — name them)



THE TRIAL

30 days paid. Day 15 KPI alignment with your manager. Day 30 permanent seat decision. Pass the trial and the role is permanent with raise and expanded bonus.



HOW TO APPLY (incomplete applications are ignored)

1. Send your resume

2. Audio sample: 60-second self-intro + one cold call recording (Vocaroo or attached)

3. Highest dials in a single day (be honest — we role-play to verify)

4. ID-verified status on OnlineJobs.ph (badge required)

5. Speedtest.net screenshot of your home internet

6. Confirm: "I can work the full graveyard shift, EST hours, starting within 5 business days."



PAYMENT

Paypal: No platform fees on either side. Permanent seat post-Day 30 includes a raise and an expanded bonus.



Generic applications and copy-paste cover letters will be ignored.

title: Travel Assistant (Insurance Support) | Full-Time | Training Provided
description:
Travel Insurance Assistant / Specialist



(Full-Time, Remote, EST)



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



$6/Hour Starting Rate | 40 Hours | Full-Time



Opportunity for increases based on performance

Strong performers in this role have earned consistent pay increases.

We review every application manually, so thoughtful, tailored applications are prioritized.



Full-time remote role focused on:



Travel insurance coordination and related tasks: drafting travel insurance for review, calling Viking/speaking directly with guests, and maintaining HubSpot CRM and trackers.



DO NOT APPLY if:



-You do not have clear, confident spoken English that can be easily understood by senior clients over the phone.



-You do not have experience in the travel industry or working with detailed, client-facing processes.



-You submit template applications or generic resumes. Please keep your introduction natural and personal so we can understand you.



-You're seeking part-time, short-term, or freelance work.



-You cannot commit to U.S. Eastern Time business hours (9am–5pm EST, night shift PHP)



-You do not carefully follow application instructions. Applications missing steps may not be reviewed.



DO APPLY if:



-You have worked in the travel industry OR have strong experience handling detailed client support, bookings, or coordination tasks.



-You have experience explaining policies, handling client questions, or working with structured documentation (insurance experience is a strong advantage, but not required).



-You can send a short video introduction.



-You are looking for a long-term, full-time remote role with a stable team that invests in your growth.



-You are professional, detail-oriented, and take pride in doing things correctly.



-You can work independently, follow documented processes, and ask questions when something is unclear.



-If you have handled complex client situations, briefly mention one example in your application.



-If you have worked with senior or high-touch clients before, please highlight this.



About Us



We are a boutique travel agency based in Atlanta, GA (EST). We specialize in luxury river cruises with Viking and provide high-touch support for our clients.



We're warm, organized, and focused on delivering excellent service. Our team is small, collaborative, and values doing things right.



We have clear processes (SOPs) for most tasks. You will be trained and supported.



We're looking for someone who wants to grow into this role long-term.



Who We're Looking For



Must-Have:



Prior experience as a virtual assistant or in a similar remote support role



Excellent written English with a professional and friendly tone



Proven ability to work independently and manage detailed tasks



High attention to detail, follow-through, and accountability



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace



Bonus Points:



Experience with TripMate, Allianz, or Travel Insured



Any experience with Viking Cruises or river cruising



HubSpot CRM experience (or experience with similar CRMs)



Familiarity with booking systems, invoices, or client records



Experience reviewing, explaining, or processing insurance (any industry)



Your Role



As our Virtual Assistant, you'll be responsible for:



Drafting client
s



Updating HubSpot CRM and internal trackers



Calling Viking Cruises and partners to verify information or resolve questions



Supporting the insurance department with administrative tasks



Accuracy matters. Small mistakes in names, dates, or policies can impact the client experience.



You will be trained and supported as you learn our systems.



So expectations are clear:



You'll work directly with our team as internal support



Guest/client
s are drafts for review



You'll have autonomy for routine tasks, with guidance on when to escalate



You'll be supported by an experienced team invested in your success



Schedule



Target hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm EST (evening/night shift in the Philippines — please confirm this works for you)



Hours may vary slightly based on business needs



Saturday coverage may be introduced later via rotation



How to Apply



Applications that don't follow these instructions may not be reviewed. This helps us identify candidates with strong attention to detail.



Candidates who clearly follow all steps are prioritized.



Step 1:



Send your application with the subject line or first sentence including: "Meghan's #1"



Step 2:



Include a short video introduction that:



Explains your relevant experience (insurance experience is a bonus, not required)



Shares why you're interested in this role



Describes what excites you about working with a team like ours



Keep it natural and concise. We are looking for clarity, not perfection.



Step 3:



Attach your CV or resume (if using Google Drive, ensure access is granted)



We're excited to meet someone who cares about doing great work and wants to grow with a strong team.



If that sounds like you — we encourage you to apply today.

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
Video editor to support my growing personal brand, starting with YouTube podcast and possibly Instagram Reels.



My brand sits at the intersection of identity, self-worth, confidence, personal branding, soft success, and feminine ambition. The overall world is emotionally intelligent, chic, refined, and very internet-aware. Think elevated it-girl meets thoughtful big sister, with a polished Pinterest/editorial aesthetic.



This role is perfect for someone who has a strong eye for detail, understands internet culture, and can edit content in a way that feels beautiful, binge-worthy, polished, and emotionally engaging.



Scope of Work:

The main focus will be editing one YouTube podcast episode per week and 2-3 short form reels.

Depending on workflow, I may send footage weekly or send drafts/content for four videos once a month.



Primary Responsibilities:



YouTube Podcast Editing: You will be responsible for editing long-form YouTube podcast episodes with a polished, aesthetically elevated style.

This includes:

- Cutting and pacing the episode so it feels engaging, smooth, and easy to watch

- Removing awkward pauses, filler, repeated lines, and unnecessary dead space

- Adding (minimal) tasteful zooms, cuts, and visual rhythm without making the edit feel chaotic

- Selecting aesthetic Pinterest-style images for pop-ups, references, and visual storytelling

- Adding minimal, intentional sound effects where appropriate

- Creating beautiful, clean branded text overlays when needed

- Understanding when to let a 
nt breathe and when to tighten the pacing

- Making the video feel visually aligned with an elevated, feminine, modern brand

- Maintaining a chic, minimalist, internet-native editing style

- NOT your typical colorful, loud, super animated Youtube style of video



Instagram Reels Editing:

This may include:

- Pulling strong clips from podcast episodes

- Editing sent drafts 

- Adding captions/subtitles

- Using tasteful pop-ups, B-roll, images, and text overlays

- Editing for pacing, clarity, and emotional impact

- Keeping the visuals aligned with the brand’s refined it-girl aesthetic

- Aesthetic Direction



I’m looking for someone who naturally understands:

- Pinterest/editorial imagery

- Chic internet-girl aesthetics

- Minimal but effective sound design

- A polished but not overproduced feel

- Feminine but not overly cutesy visuals

- Modern creator/podcast pacing

- Soft luxury, lifestyle, wellness, beauty, and personal development aesthetics





Brand Context:

My content is for women who are ambitious, thoughtful, feminine, and in an era of becoming. This means the editing should feel emotionally resonant and aspirational, not overly corporate, generic, loud, or gimmicky.



Ideal Candidate:

- Have experience editing YouTube videos, podcasts, or talking-head content

- Understand creator content and what keeps viewers watching

- Have a strong eye for pacing and visual storytelling

- Know how to select aesthetic images, B-roll, and pop-up visuals

- Understand fonts, layout, composition, and spacing

- Can edit in a style that feels chic, polished, and modern

- Are detail-oriented and can follow brand direction

- Understand Instagram Reels and short-form retention

- Are organized, communicative, and reliable with deadlines

- Can take feedback and refine quickly



Must-Have Skills

- Video editing experience

- Strong pacing instincts

- Good taste in visual references

- Basic sound cleanup

- Aesthetic image sourcing

- Ability to follow brand guidelines

- Familiarity with YouTube and Instagram content



Please do not apply if your editing style is overly flashy, corporate, basic Canva-template style, or overly “YouTuber bro” editing.



Monthly deliverables may include:

- 4 edited YouTube podcast episodes per month (approx 10-20 min episodes)

- 6 short-form talking head reels 

- Exported final files ready to upload



How to Apply

Please send:

- Your portfolio or examples of past video edits

- Examples of YouTube/podcast edits if available

- Examples of short-form Reels/TikToks if available

- A short note on your editing style

- Your usual turnaround time for a 10-20 minute YouTube video

- The editing software you use

- Your availability for 30–40 hours per month



We would likely need to do a trial to see how you would edit my videos. I will share the raw footage, please edit the first 5 minutes of it. 



Bonus points if you already understand creators in the self-development, wellness, lifestyle, beauty, feminine empowerment, personal branding, or internet it-girl space.

title: Implementation Engineer - SaaS Onboarding & Integrations
description:
SeatLess Software builds custom business applications for SMBs using AI-orchestrated development. We deliver production-ready software in days rather than months.



We are hiring a full-time Implementation Engineer to help us get newly built applications across the finish line and into clients' hands.



This role sits between product, implementation, onboarding, and support. You will test applications end-to-end, fix smaller issues using AI development tools, configure third-party integrations such as Resend/S3, help clients get live, and support them through the first 30-90 days.



You will work directly with the founder and be the first hire of this kind at SeatLess, so this role comes with real ownership and room to grow.



What you'll do:



- Test newly built web applications end-to-end and identify bugs, edge cases, and broken flows

- Fix smaller issues yourself using AI dev tools such as Replit, Cursor, Claude Code, or similar

- Configure third-party services such as Stripe, SendGrid, Mailgun, Google/Microsoft auth, calendars, CRMs, and webhooks

- Manage API keys, environment variables, and client credentials carefully

- Run user acceptance testing with clients and help close the loop on issues

- Train users via live walkthroughs and Loom videos

- Produce short client-facing guides and onboarding documentation

- Be the first responder for client questions, minor fixes, and post-launch support

- Escalate larger technical issues to the founder when needed

- Feed recurring issues back into our delivery process so we keep improving



You may be a strong fit if you:



- Are technically literate, even if you are not a traditional developer

- Can read code, understand what it is doing, and make smaller changes with AI assistance

- Are comfortable reading API docs, understanding OAuth, troubleshooting integrations, and working with environment variables

- Have experience with tools like Stripe, SendGrid, Zapier/Make, HubSpot, Salesforce, Google Workspace APIs, Microsoft 365 APIs, or similar

- Are methodical in testing and genuinely pay attention to detail

- Communicate clearly with non-technical users by chat,
, and Loom

- Are comfortable working remotely, independently, and in a small fast-moving team



Nice to have:



- SaaS onboarding, implementation, technical support, customer success, or solutions engineering experience

- Familiarity with React apps and browser dev tools

- Light coding background

- Experience supporting clients across time zones



Working hours:



- Full-time, Monday to Friday

- 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM Manila time

- Founder is based in Thailand, so time zone overlap is easy



Engagement:



- Independent contractor

- 100% remote, anywhere in the Philippines

- Paid monthly in PHP or USD via Wise or similar



Benefits:



- 13th-month bonus

- 15 Philippine public holidays paid per year

- 15 days paid leave per year

- 1-month paid probation at the full agreed rate

- Clear path to grow into a lead role as we scale



How to apply: Start your application with the word PURPLE.



Then include:



- A short intro about yourself and why this role interests you

- The most complex integration you have configured and what made it tricky

- Any experience with AI coding tools like Replit, Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, or ChatGPT for coding

- A short Loom video (2-3 minutes) walking through something technical you built, configured, or debugged

- Your expected monthly salary in USD and earliest start date



Applications without PURPLE will be ignored.
