title: E-commerce Growth Manager (Amazon Experience | Focus on Mercado Libre)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled E-commerce Growth Manager with strong Amazon experience.



While your background in Amazon is important, your primary responsibility will be to manage and lead the growth of our Mercado Libre account.



This role is ideal for someone who understands e-commerce fundamentals—PPC, listings, inventory, and profitability—and is ready to apply those skills to scale a new marketplace.



Responsibilities:



Mercado Libre Account Growth (Primary Focus)

- Take full ownership of our Mercado Libre account

- Develop and execute strategies to drive sales growth

- Optimize listings, pricing, and overall marketplace performance

- Monitor account health and ensure platform compliance



Amazon Account Support (Secondary)

- Support ongoing optimization of Amazon accounts

- Apply best practices from Amazon to improve performance across platforms



Inventory Management

- Monitor inventory levels and turnover

- Coordinate with the Supply Chain team to prevent stockouts and overstocking



Listing Optimization

- Collaborate with the Creative team to improve product listings and content

- Continuously optimize for higher conversion rates



Paid Ads Management

- Manage and optimize ad campaigns (Amazon & Mercado Libre if applicable)

- Monitor key metrics: CTR, CPC, CVR, ACOS, ROAS

- Adjust bids, budgets, and targeting to improve performance



Data & Strategy

- Analyze sales and traffic data regularly

- Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis

- Identify growth opportunities and implement strategies



Profitability & Reporting

- Monitor P&L and ensure profitability targets are met

- Maintain TACOS targets where applicable



Team Collaboration

- Work closely with the Gen VA team for account support



Requirements:

- Proven experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts

- Strong understanding of Amazon PPC (ACOS, TACOS, ROAS)

- Experience in listing optimization and conversion improvement

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

- Willingness to learn and lead Mercado Libre account growth

- Experience with other e-commerce platforms is a plus



Tools Used:

Helium 10 (H10)

DataDive

Scale Insights

SoStocked



Important Note:

We are a fast-paced company. While we work as a team, each member is expected to take full ownership of their role and work independently. Please apply only if you are confident in your ability to meet these expectations.



To Apply, Please Include:

- Your experience managing Amazon accounts

- Any experience with Mercado Libre (if applicable)

- Sample results (before/after metrics, if available)

- Tools you have used

- Your expected monthly salary

- A short summary of how you approach scaling a new marketplace

title: Sales Admin Assistant (Remote | Full-Time)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Sales Admin Assistant to directly support our US-based Sales Team. This role is critical to keeping our sales operations running smoothly by managing scheduling, generating qualified leads, maintaining CRM accuracy, and handling key administrative tasks.



You will work closely with US sales representatives to ensure their calendars stay full, meetings run efficiently, and follow-ups never fall through the cracks. This is a fast-paced role that requires precision, strong communication skills, and the ability to manage multiple priorities.



Key Responsibilities



- Sales Call Scheduling

- Schedule and coordinate calls for US-based sales representatives

- Manage calendars across US time zones

- Send confirmations and reminders to prospects

- Handle rescheduling and resolve calendar conflicts quickly

- Ensure high attendance rates and minimal no-shows

- Lead Generation & CRM Management

- Research and identify qualified leads

- Build and maintain organized lead lists

- Input and update data accurately in the CRM

- Support outreach campaigns and follow-up tracking

- Ensure CRM records are clean and up to date

- Administrative Support

- Manage inbox communications related to scheduling

- Prepare reports and maintain tracking dashboards

- Organize documents and sales materials

- Assist with day-to-day administrative tasks to support the sales team



Requirements



- Proven experience as a Sales Admin Assistant, Executive Assistant, or Sales Support role

- Experience supporting US-based teams preferred

- Strong written and spoken English

- Experience scheduling across US time zones

- Familiarity with CRMs (HubSpot, Salesforce, GoHighLevel, or similar)

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Tech-savvy and able to learn new tools quickly

- Reliable internet connection (minimum 20 Mbps)

- Quiet and professional remote work setup

- Performance Expectations

- Sales calendars consistently filled

- Low meeting cancellation and no-show rates

- Accurate and organized CRM records

- Proactive communication and task follow-through

- Dependable daily execution without supervision



Position Details:

Full-Time Remote

Long-term opportunity

Competitive compensation based on experience

Growth opportunities for high performers



How to Apply

Please submit the following:



A short introduction about yourself

Your experience supporting sales teams

Tools and CRMs you have used

Include the word “Calendar Pro” at the top of your application

Applications without the keyword will not be reviewed.

title: AU Mortgage Parabroker (AU) - Remote PH
description:
AU Mortgage Parabroker | Work From Home

IMPORTANT: Direct AU mortgage experience is required

(Remote - PH)

Mortgages (Banking & Financial Services)

Full time

75,000+ per month (PHP)



SUM+ is an adaptable, energetic mortgage broking business based in Sydney, with a growing support team across the Philippines. We pride ourselves on a collaborative, family-feel environment where people are supported to perform at their best and grow their careers. 

We’re looking for a skilled Mortgage Parabroker ready for their next step.



Why Join SUM+

High-Support Environment – Regular check-ins with Operations and monthly one-on-one catch-ups with the Director

Permanent Work From Home – Flexibility while working with a friendly, professional team

Growth Opportunities – Comprehensive onboarding, structured training, and opportunities for further formal study

Competitive Compensation – Above-market salary plus bonuses for accuracy, volume, and project completion

Innovative Culture – Smart use of AI and modern systems to improve productivity



About You

-Minimum 2 years’ experience in the Australian mortgage industry and ready for a new challenge

-Strong understanding of residential lending, including investment loans, refinances, and first home buyers

-Enjoy “dotting i’s” and “crossing t’s”

-Highly organised with great attention to detail

-Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

-Collaborative, proactive, and enjoy solving problems creatively

-Comfortable working with self-employed clients, investor scenarios, and alt doc products.



Your Role with SUM+

As a Credit Analyst at SUM+, you will play a key role in assessing loan applications, analysing financial information, and supporting brokers to deliver tailored lending solutions. You will ensure accuracy, compliance, and efficiency throughout the credit process while helping clients achieve their property goals.



Key Responsibilities

-Utilise MyCRM, BrokerEngine, ApplyOnline, and Simpology to manage loan workflows

-Manage loan files and ensure all documentation is complete and accurate

-Assist brokers with lender research and product comparisons

-Review financials to assess borrowing capacity

-Work with brokers to structure deals and find suitable lending options

-Prepare and submit compliant, high-quality loan applications

-Track application progress and resolve issues promptly



Salary & Benefits

-PHP 75,000+ per month

-HMO allowance

-Government benefits allowance

-20 days paid annual leave

-Permanent work-from-home setup

-Clear development and career progression plan

-Regular team catch-ups



Additional Information

This role is offered on an ongoing contractor basis. Contractors are responsible for their own government and personal lodgements. Proof of registration is required within two months of hire.



How to Apply

 your resume/CV to 
 including a brief explanation of why you would be an outstanding candidate for this role.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Finance Assistant
description:
As we grow, we’re looking for a Finance Assistant who can take ownership of our bookkeeping and operational admin support. This role exists to help free up our Business/Operations Manager from day-to-day finance and administrative work.



You’ll ensure finances are accurate, reporting is clear, and backend systems are organised and documented. This is a role for someone who enjoys clean numbers, clear systems, and taking initiative.



What You’ll Be Doing

Finance & Bookkeeping (Primary Focus)

- Xero Management: Full cycle bookkeeping, accounts payable, and bank rule optimization.

- Compliance: Accurate Australian GST treatment, manual journals, and quarterly BAS preparation.

- Reporting: Producing monthly activity statements, P&L reports, and data stock usage analysis.

- Systems: Learning revenue streams and documenting all finance workflows into clear SOPs.



Admin & Operational Support

- Inbox Management: Filtering the Business Manager’s
 and coordinating next steps with the Practice Manager.

- Data & Research: Gathering information, providing concise summaries, and assisting with bookings.

- Organisation: Maintaining digital filing (Dropbox) and updating policy and procedure manuals.



You’re a great fit if you…

- Have an Accounting degree or strong Australian bookkeeping experience

- Are confident using Xero

- Have experience preparing BAS and handling GST correctly

- Can prepare Profit & Loss statements and manual journals

- Are detail-oriented and organised

- Can think beyond step-by-step instructions and apply logic

- Are comfortable working with a direct, time-poor manager

- Can figure out who to ask for what  and when to solve something independently

- Are reliable when you say yes, you mean yes

- Take initiative and care about doing things properly

- Are emotionally intelligent and able to adjust to different personalities

- Can work independently without needing constant supervision



How to apply

Please answer the following with the subject line:

“Finance Assistant Application – [Your Name]”



Your cover letter answering the following (we will not proceed with applications that do not answer these questions):

1. Specific fit and interest in the role.

2. Detailed Australian bookkeeping and BAS experience.

3. Self-assessment of Xero confidence and experience level.

4. Expected hourly rate.

5. Current and ideal weekly hour availability.

6. Brief personal background and professional goals.



Please also include:

- Your CV

- A screenshot of your internet speed



We look forward to your application.

title: Healthcare Call Center / Virtual Assistant - Healthcare experience is required.

title: Sales & Admin Agent Car Rental & Auto Repair Support**
description:
We are a Michigan-based car rental and auto repair company seeking a **highly reliable and detail-oriented virtual assistant** to handle customer inquiries, rental coordination, and problem resolution. You’ll work directly with customers who want to rent vehicles or are experiencing issues with their current rental.



This is a **full-time role (50 hours/week)**. You must be available to work **5 days per week, including Saturdays and Sundays**, with the ability to work as late as **10 PM Eastern Time**.



### Responsibilities:



* Respond promptly to inbound customer requests (calls, texts, and messages) regarding car rentals

* Troubleshoot rental issues (e.g., car won’t start, flat tire) and coordinate roadside assistance or towing

* Coordinate maintenance or repair needs with our auto repair team

* Schedule vehicles and update customer records

* Follow up with renters and maintain accurate communication logs



### Qualifications:



* Excellent spoken and written English

* Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills

* Experience in customer service, preferably with cars, rentals, or logistics

* High-speed internet, noise-canceling headset, and a quiet workspace

* Tech-savvy and able to learn new tools quickly (e.g., CRM, text/call software, GPS tracking systems)



---



### **IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY:**



To show us you pay attention to detail and follow instructions, **please include the word “watermelon” in your subject line or response title**.



At the **very top** of your application, answer all of the following:



1. What time zone you’re located in

2. What your expected hourly rate is (in USD)

3. What days/hours you are available to work (please confirm weekend availability)

4. Send me a recording discussing your work history starting in 2018. Start with 2018 and discuss where you worked, what the company did, and what your role in the company was and then why you left, and then move forward in time.



**Applications without these details or the word “watermelon” will be ignored.**
